subject: A note about our donations this month

Fellow American,

As you may be aware, the first quarter fundraising deadline is fast approaching; in fact, it's only a few hours away.

**Why I'm writing:** I'm sending you this because, while we've had an all-around pretty-good month of fundraising, but we've yet to reach our goal of *unique* donations. As things stand, 14,829 contributions have come in online since launching the campaign. That is not a shabby number, but with a little bit of time left in the month, **[I'm hopeful we can grow that number.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8db51a723cb740dc972a0b19f6730bf8&_e=6GOk-mpQLg0Iy8aNsEWqORM5xEBjXPzz5vtwh0AX6H-7vgLz0FavqERjxc2jwiGJlTnCtlUreVXRaw0A_BZS-Wj1KtVqEUsgdOOd_5PrbqkxgyfJyBoqA4H1zJsNf-XgYCD5KXCqDNGToEooYsOqHOmzQVTIVNhDWTGtM140c2uZXzZS_I6X4FmuitsfAOPnrBi6k4M7U7GSfqMBqd_hsPjhOV8BYqPJ-s8mmPagzSm-s_QodgNe1EZ9WIs5VN-0PonG4gzlpLsSNJCS3NdxW9azby75gZ96s815ZhBjVTTL2heUw2QIlCeP1sSi7oYesgR0LSMUQ2F8lviivAUoaeVhDxf8xFVBtVEuTGUDyOCRXhOg_q38iaOzcpYY_OzS4CzfUs95M0Vi6ED2wbJtq0pj8PmENpylVfbYZWFUsNI%3D)**

**Why it matters:** While nothing is concrete, we've heard rumblings that the Republican National Committee is going to require candidates to have a specific number of donors to appear on the presidential debate stage later this year.

**My ask:** We'd like to hit the 15,000 unique donations by midnight tonight. That means **[we need an additional 171 donors to step up between now and then.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8db51a723cb740dc972a0b19f6730bf8&_e=6GOk-mpQLg0Iy8aNsEWqORM5xEBjXPzz5vtwh0AX6H-7vgLz0FavqERjxc2jwiGJlTnCtlUreVXRaw0A_BZS-Wj1KtVqEUsgdOOd_5PrbqkxgyfJyBoqA4H1zJsNf-XgYCD5KXCqDNGToEooYsOqHOmzQVTIVNhDWTGtM140c2uZXzZS_I6X4FmuitsfAOPnrBi6k4M7U7GSfqMBqd_hsPjhOV8BYqPJ-s8mmPagzSm-s_QodgNe1EZ9WIs5VN-0PonG4gzlpLsSNJCS3NdxW5MUQrRXaISt2Pz1DMJfwVObauywmDcmCw8mZ7WpmZN2vD190SO7JL2N9Vnae3v5rFwdeLQWWJZs580zXmnVBHiriHbeq_VEEfFTorwEcNZi9Qkc9HSdks6V8fumhdJCXwSrP303i2TgO8-ceAnUANE%3D)** I know that is possible with the team we've built out so far, but it's not going to be easy. Remember, it's not the amount you contribute, it's the fact that you're _**making**_ the contribution.

| [** CHIP IN $1 TODAY
HELP US HIT 15,000 DONATIONS -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8db51a723cb740dc972a0b19f6730bf8&_e=6GOk-mpQLg0Iy8aNsEWqORM5xEBjXPzz5vtwh0AX6H-7vgLz0FavqERjxc2jwiGJlTnCtlUreVXRaw0A_BZS-Wj1KtVqEUsgdOOd_5PrbqkxgyfJyBoqA4H1zJsNf-XgYCD5KXCqDNGToEooYsOqHOmzQVTIVNhDWTGtM140c2uZXzZS_I6X4FmuitsfAOPnrBi6k4M7U7GSfqMBqd_hsPjhOV8BYqPJ-s8mmPagzSm-s_QodgNe1EZ9WIs5VN-0PonG4gzlpLsSNJCS3NdxW-nxo8GNBlW-01bVi7bQePcHWFWrt_P-E5gfMuUy4u7BQiE3KcDODqXBPNyA2sx8NbAEisQkwdrwrXDufCWIWsDqC83yFK3lGurj2MtOpOq2JhAu_ECU-MGp-5AX2ySdrlza1lKxhsAk50e5iGr776A%3D)

I believe that a series of robust primary debates will serve the eventual Republican nominee well. There is no better place to hone-in why one is running for president of the United States than on a stage with like-minded competitors. No one should be anointed with the Republican Party's nomination; they must _**EARN**_ it. I have a unique perspective to bring to the table and **[it's my sincere hope that you'll show your support for our campaign today with a gift of any amount.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8db51a723cb740dc972a0b19f6730bf8&_e=6GOk-mpQLg0Iy8aNsEWqORM5xEBjXPzz5vtwh0AX6H-7vgLz0FavqERjxc2jwiGJlTnCtlUreVXRaw0A_BZS-Wj1KtVqEUsgdOOd_5PrbqkxgyfJyBoqA4H1zJsNf-XgYCD5KXCqDNGToEooYsOqHOmzQVTIVNhDWTGtM140c2uZXzZS_I6X4FmuitsfAOPnrBi6k4M7U7GSfqMBqd_hsPjhOV8BYqPJ-s8mmPagzSm-s_QodgNe1EZ9WIs5VN-0PonG4gzlpLsSNJCS3NdxW4bG0Hh6bAMh3ukHwoIF67l7EXDo7_-PizCfQzZoadgxXi0JNfJu-JSN7GCJkzKseAq0JhuWPJpzoQf2W8KkDWgVfyU6ORx6Ab34Tkd57VSpRfl5RmZtfktAx-6r_V5PrvbxKLxHjaUh-M0lO1Ja6Y8%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Lateefah for Congress
subject: What do you say?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re tracking a bit behind where we need to be.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=7%2E1163%2EBrgFw7)
Tonight is our campaign's first official end-of-quarter fundraising deadline -- and all we can say is **we're deeply grateful for all your support.**
Our beloved community has stepped up to help us deliver the strongest fundraising numbers possible and build a campaign and movement that will deliver for CA-12.
Still, we're a bit behind our fundraising goal — which is a key marker of proving our movement has what it takes to win. Our team just crunched the data:
**[If 132 Team Lateefah supporters chip in just $7, we'll surge past our fundraising goal and have the resources we need to keep our campaign going strong. Can we count on you to chip in now and help us get there?](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/75?t=2&akid=7%2E1163%2EBrgFw7)**

But my first few months in Congress would not be the same without my friend, Becca Balint. Let me share just a bit about our ongoing fight: _**House Republicans just passed a bill to defund public schools that 1) allow transgender children to participate in sports or 2) allow books on LGBTQ history in their classrooms.**_ This bill is part of a growing movement – we’ve seen these same bills brought up in my home state of Texas, but now Republican extremists are using the same playbook in Congress, and we need your help. **I’m proud to be working and fighting alongside leaders like Becca, but I know our movement will only succeed if we're able to come together and grow the power of progressive voices in Congress.[If you’re with us, split a donation between our campaigns now before our first FEC deadline of 2023 clean_body: House Republicans just passed a bill to defund public schools | | = Peter, I’m Greg Casar, and I’m the newest progressive member of Congress from Texas. But my first few months in Congress would not be the same without my friend, Becca Balint. Let me share just a bit about our ongoing fight: House Republicans just passed a bill to defund public schools that 1) allow transgender children to participate in sports or 2) allow books on LGBTQ history in their classrooms. This bill is part of a growing movement – we’ve seen these same bills brought up in my home state of Texas, but now Republican extremists are using the same playbook in Congress, and we need your help. I’m proud to be working and fighting alongside leaders like Becca, but I know our movement will only succeed if we're able to come together and grow the power of progressive voices in Congress.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Extremists want to turn our classrooms into a battlefield for waging divisive culture wars – and our students, educators, and LGBTQ youth deserve better. Becca and I both know that Congress should be working on issues that impact every family – from health care, to affordability, to housing, to the climate crisis. But instead, we’re having to defend basic rights. Linda

I know it feels like we have a long way to go – but I’ve seen time and time again _just_ how much this grassroots movement can accomplish when we stand strong and united. I know we can do this. All we need is you.
The investment of our grassroots supporters helps us to build winning campaigns, strengthen on-the-ground efforts in the states, and mobilize voters. This work is a vital part of our strategy to defend state legislatures against a right-wing takeover.
**But if we don’t hit tonight’s goal, we won’t be able to ramp up our efforts, and state Republicans could head into April with a competitive edge. And, with high-stakes special elections over the next couple of months, meeting our March deadline is critical.**
[So please, will you represent your area and chip in a 5X-matched gift of $7 right now to help build Democratic power across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrYcoJtB6WxMLHLFUkRTbE4khqrI_ktcQm1qWy0BbBMnequLWNLXKFNEZ_rHStPjoa5xb1VLOnGCTG3pP1bn5z4dJDJMVbNory-TMK62pGoj2mVg3GzJCjQ4HoG7v9P77tBmLS275edL56GMBFxUUZap_Y8WA9GvB6p7h7MQZs8XpmV9M8ushegOpCpIwSP3Fk4qe1Feeyuy8YyWfVWRi7-YwUrTkZTydoJ7Tjfhj9-3LSdVIxAQHMehXyr6MVFJEvVu1ijje3EVoKzNDrRMIJEnpgtz1QrJ0j3ZogcEsx0QH7WLbvqlbrGx_XN5YWH_YgaM3xE-8Ax5BfTXkGCWZy-DRZ6YFE-pY2THodz57AlhGkjftycfX1cB9ov1PFJRVeEmFwJQrpHSf7E4sRqxT5RYAMkRLUM1NtKX6QafNhgPKkiYedzw0ctgwzjESPpUkrcQDE1fBhDLz3cvOv0j0W5o0r8p6YCVePo_55oZS_A_K5C1n_YK9knsdVUgK6YCs2/3uz/nSsMabvtSVe3l85j9-bPbw/h7/nX2ktJHxZvsVhmG8I-F6QMVGNcs0ZJOVPwNFNAj2NUQ)

clean_body: This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-quarter deadline. | | | | | This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-quarter deadline. But first, here’s where things stand: There are FOUR HOURS left until our March end-of-quarter deadline. But we’re still $13,489 short of our critical goal. And based on our projections, we need strong grassroots Democrats in your area to help us close this gap. The moment that we announced our QUINTUPLE-MATCH offer, something incredible happened: Democrats took this opportunity to make their voices heard, loud and clear – they’re pouring in gifts to support our movement and defeat state Republicans: So we’re counting on you to help us keep this momentum going until the clock strikes midnight. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | I know it feels like we have a long way to go – but I’ve seen time and time again just how much this grassroots movement can accomplish when we stand strong and united. I know we can do this. All we need is you. The investment of our grassroots supporters helps us to build winning campaigns, strengthen on-the-ground efforts in the states, and mobilize voters. This work is a vital part of our strategy to defend state legislatures against a right-wing takeover. But if we don’t hit tonight’s goal, we won’t be able to ramp up our efforts, and state Republicans could head into April with a competitive edge. And, with high-stakes special elections over the next couple of months, meeting our March deadline is critical.** Thanks for standing with us, Jose Cornejo VP Mobilization, DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Whatever you can give right now will help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we want to
talk about why this month is so important for our campaign.

Tonight at midnight, our organization will close our books and submit a
public report to the FEC detailing how much we’ve fundraised in the last
three months.

As one of the most heavily targeted organizations by establishment
Democrats and Republicans alike, our report will draw huge attention from
political opponents, pundits, and powerful special interests who are
hoping to see our movement lose momentum.

Our team has always spoken truth to power: Most recently, from calling out
government funding of Israeli violence against Palestinians, to fighting
for a billionaire tax, to holding Biden accountable for siding with Big
Pharma over cancer patients.

We know that whenever we use our voice to call out corruption or fight for
working people, these special interests will look for ways to put a stop
to our movement and defeat our chances of electing more change-makers to
Congress.

That’s why it’s critical that we finish this quarter strong. Every
contribution — no matter the amount — shows that our policies from a Green
New Deal to Medicare for All have strong support from Cresco and
across the country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132709?refcode=em20230331-28266&t=1001&akid=28266%2E1203867%2Ei1vaIV ]Can you make a $3 donation right now to help show your
support for Justice Democrats on this report and help our team reach this
critical fundraising goal before midnight?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132709?refcode=em20230331-28266&t=1020&akid=28266%2E1203867%2Ei1vaIV ]Contribute $3

When hundreds of thousands of people chip in $5, $10, and $20 at a time,
it all adds up to compete against the billionaires and corporations who
use their money to rig the political system in their favor.

Thank you for fighting for a better future with us. We know that together,
there is so much more we can achieve.

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=28266%2E1203867%2Ei1vaIV ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=28266%2E1203867%2Ei1vaIV ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230331-28266-footer&t=1023&refcode2=28266_1203867_i1vaIV&akid=28266%2E1203867%2Ei1vaIV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=28266%2E1203867%2Ei1vaIV

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Miyares
subject: eroding our core principles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
It's time to take a stand and tell these rogue, far-left progressive district attorneys

| | | Friend, All across America, and even here in Virginia, when far-left progressive prosecutors pick and choose which crimes to prosecute and which ones to ignore to advance their ideological and political agenda, our nation's core principles of equal justice under the law are eroded. When we see violent crime spiking across the nation in cities like New York, San Francisco, and Chicago, but their liberal district attorneys institute a blanket policy and refuse to prosecute certain crimes, they are showing small business owners, police officers, and families that keeping their citizens safe is not their priority. **That 's wrong.** It's time to take a stand and tell these rogue, far-left progressive district attorneys that it's time to stand up for the victims, not push a divisive political agenda. As Attorney General, Jason's top priority is finding ways to keep our kids, our neighborhoods, and our communities safe. Above all else, that must be our top priority, but too many of these radical district attorneys in places like New York and San Francisco are taking a criminals first, victims last approach and that has to stop. **[Can we count on you to stand with Jason and help fight to keep our communities safe?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6a7afc216f543bb99c74edcf0858143&_e=eyvyNuLwWS-gFlU8NrYOkdqiqsWxDvOx7Zbtkch36UMv7UuRmiGAy_JSP9UTLJQ0IyqzhuBiCsU0rxEjCThrJfpdoNamxg8o7K8cC0X3CGEVsUu4WyBjCloSCi8OZptqa8jkO0QKnE8urVvqB8KqPO-6DVoGB-GVrHRq8GR7qOCXuiLz95NrRtgV9YLkghv8aEiX2rPwtDBO8lGyNJL1gTU4euDY863uIDcub68qtTOhFvbc4yPcEQAmBU8SQnEQSerr0V8RJ7JqptbW3f5ptU3N_AbLp4BzQYKmZoit48LQTOxCOphnKux4eE1_K6IVt4K113fP3jVJMo1W4AW_5vmRWKz8gtIkxGbbL56Lv5hVKWpn0RI6Xg97_1gXxSy9hAhhpKDJkxU3Z3aG4ZAdQcSv6YQ5ygVz6wsuZqc7hfn0o6DKTM_Lb3hRgmvNOQkd "Can we count on you to stand with Jason and help me fight to keep our communities safe?")** The billionaires and far-left dark money groups, who are funding the campaigns of these radical district attorneys, are already targeting Jason. They know that he won't back down and will continue to fight their liberal soft on crime policies. We have a big fight ahead of us. For example, in 2022, _major crime increased by 36%, in New York City_ according to the NYPD, but their radical District Attorney Bragg instituted a blanket policy of not prosecuting some criminals. This is a tragedy for violent crime victims and is one of the reasons Americans are losing trust in the government. Liberal out of touch prosecutors are just wrong. It's time we return to upholding the law honestly, fairly, and without prejudice and focus on serving the people that need our protection. _**[Can we count on you to show your support today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6a7afc216f543bb99c74edcf0858143&_e=eyvyNuLwWS-gFlU8NrYOkdqiqsWxDvOx7Zbtkch36UMv7UuRmiGAy_JSP9UTLJQ0IyqzhuBiCsU0rxEjCThrJfpdoNamxg8o7K8cC0X3CGEVsUu4WyBjCloSCi8OZptqa8jkO0QKnE8urVvqB8KqPO-6DVoGB-GVrHRq8GR7qOCXuiLz95NrRtgV9YLkghv8aEiX2rPwtDBO8lGyNJL1gTU4euDY863uIDcub68qtTOhFvbc4yPcEQAmBU8SQnEQSerr0V8RJ7JqptbW3f5ptU3N_AbLp4BzQYKmZoit48JnJzgmygquOFtIXXKIkkC8zKxORizcUSNY64u7YJjww-lopXHmHvMOZv4ZG3D0rFqcwNdI6nqpj0xEMcPSpmoksa7BpiY-qlLSpw3aPbp9YdCJQtpbGg3W9yzYyS_ZN3Erznpy4b7obUUPOnQ1hmY7)**_ Thank you,
Team Miyares

clean_body: It's time to take a stand and tell these rogue, far-left progressive district attorneys | | | Friend, All across America, and even here in Virginia, when far-left progressive prosecutors pick and choose which crimes to prosecute and which ones to ignore to advance their ideological and political agenda, our nation's core principles of equal justice under the law are eroded. When we see violent crime spiking across the nation in cities like New York, San Francisco, and Chicago, but their liberal district attorneys institute a blanket policy and refuse to prosecute certain crimes, they are showing small business owners, police officers, and families that keeping their citizens safe is not their priority. That 's wrong. It's time to take a stand and tell these rogue, far-left progressive district attorneys that it's time to stand up for the victims, not push a divisive political agenda. As Attorney General, Jason's top priority is finding ways to keep our kids, our neighborhoods, and our communities safe. Above all else, that must be our top priority, but too many of these radical district attorneys in places like New York and San Francisco are taking a criminals first, victims last approach and that has to stop. "Can we count on you to stand with Jason and help me fight to keep our communities safe?" The billionaires and far-left dark money groups, who are funding the campaigns of these radical district attorneys, are already targeting Jason. They know that he won't back down and will continue to fight their liberal soft on crime policies. We have a big fight ahead of us. For example, in 2022, major crime increased by 36%, in New York City according to the NYPD, but their radical District Attorney Bragg instituted a blanket policy of not prosecuting some criminals. This is a tragedy for violent crime victims and is one of the reasons Americans are losing trust in the government. Liberal out of touch prosecutors are just wrong. It's time we return to upholding the law honestly, fairly, and without prejudice and focus on serving the people that need our protection. Thank you, Team Miyares | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Peter,
We have some news to share with you before our fundraising numbers become public after our end-of-quarter FEC deadline tonight at midnight.
We’ll start with the bad news. To be completely honest with you, there are just a few hours left before our first end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 and right now it looks like we could to fall about $6,734 short of our goal.
But here is the good news. Our finance team crunched some numbers and let us know that if just 57 people from your area chipped in, we could make up the gap and reach our goal. Are you able to help us out by rushing a donation before midnight tonight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
This is our last chance to turn things around and show strong support behind our movement, as well as a strong number in our FEC report.
Thank you for everything!

Simona Grace

| Fellow Conservative

I’m forwarding an email that I sent out on Wednesday in hopes that if you didn’t have time to read it then, **you might have the time now**.

We’re barreling toward the first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election cycle, and as things stand right now – **we’re going to come up short**.

**If we’re not able to raise an additional $1,500 by midnight tonight, we’ll be forced to start the 2nd quarter in a deficit.**

As I said in the email that was sent to you on Wednesday, we don’t have access to the billionaire donors that our Democrat opponents do. **[We rely on the generosity of conservatives like you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19edd5381e854c03b88a3eb72c8c9632&_e=Pqaq6TudOkUh38jk2AIPOJnufGDZMK484T4XP8HM9ZIpKcUSy0XRbsHawtP0yJNFz2K7ZTPfvtmlF-mQwYOLzzhLoR_cmoTD_oPEDaB9DGmdEgIp0_JDUs5Kkhm7Pg9tciuBHO4BdlIcOdOCBbpxuenWSIt0Kz5ScRGnqcQ40_kwVLxgwXpIL1H8Wx6lHiMwQYvPnVw7jiUrClSL37B_CXS1HwlXvU_oqM3AH_8YNRDnoUI8sHrCzlKSyF-qupaPdvurM4clwfva9ah3s-mLKLrxajIFRhS4bCEh-oTQxsgZuzH6SlJzXyBWQ6y-Rf8hiURu0_fJTcj3dkm6GifBU91D0qh1F274c6Gp3x5KzyiD1nv03RFzpfZrP_NOPmGxPtg1twy4yDCEHEef2_Wuzw%3D%3D) **

Please take a moment now to read Wednesday's email in its entirety before you click out of this correspondence.

Thank you,
Jim Jordan \--------------------------------------------------------------
From: Jim Jordan
Date: Thu, Mar 30, 2023 at 2:01 PM
Subject: Can I count on you for $5?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Fellow Conservative,

Let me be direct: my team tells me we may come up short on our critical March 31st fundraising goal unless we act TODAY. I hope you can take a moment to click below and **[chip in with a contribution of $5](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19edd5381e854c03b88a3eb72c8c9632&_e=Pqaq6TudOkUh38jk2AIPOJnufGDZMK484T4XP8HM9ZIpKcUSy0XRbsHawtP0yJNFz2K7ZTPfvtmlF-mQwYOLzzhLoR_cmoTD_oPEDaB9DGmdEgIp0_JDUs5Kkhm7Pg9tciuBHO4BdlIcOdOCBbpxuenWSIt0Kz5ScRGnqcQ40_kwVLxgwXpIL1H8Wx6lHiMwQYvPnVw7jiUrClSL37B_CXS1HwlXvU_oqM3AH_8YNRDnoUI8sHrCzlKSyF-qupaPRJJdjtPX4MRVImO5Y4xeEr93GKKVkDwEUxU31nqN_c1SzfF0l74hbTTaViEBaXJ0KZ-ymsKmBE883jjIZWKr6gd51A7pGgnh1Mwr3ZXguxlvrxzFP_QkqHNkuTamvFLzTTnDMhbHRokx9JxNFKXGhw%3D%3D)** or more to help us get over the finish line.

My finance director tells me that **we need to raise another $10,580 before midnight this Friday to hit our goal for the quarter.** If you’re able to help us inch closer toward our goal with a gift right now, we will be very grateful. It’s a great honor to serve you and your family.

[**CHIP IN $5 BEFORE FRIDAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19edd5381e854c03b88a3eb72c8c9632&_e=Pqaq6TudOkUh38jk2AIPOJnufGDZMK484T4XP8HM9ZIpKcUSy0XRbsHawtP0yJNFz2K7ZTPfvtmlF-mQwYOLzzhLoR_cmoTD_oPEDaB9DGmdEgIp0_JDUs5Kkhm7Pg9tciuBHO4BdlIcOdOCBbpxuenWSIt0Kz5ScRGnqcQ40_kwVLxgwXpIL1H8Wx6lHiMwQYvPnVw7jiUrClSL37B_CXS1HwlXvU_oqM3AH_8YNRDnoUI8sHrCzlKSyF-qupaPzUB7dmeMz6H00kUJb_EKLJkrsDRwqfdj6ddx3jy-J7-QT1B_plPQQDnw2A3KSzHp86DxEuFblea38XBFS-F_2yQ4b_6g9VCW5mATGk6JzBWPuq9IMPpLJD-9EyvY0CUvLHidXP0tcgrQX0QYCSax_A%3D%3D)
I’ve not been focused on fundraising for the past few months because of the big changes we are making in Washington.

... We gutted Nancy Pelosi’s autocratic House rules and restored accountability by giving Members of Congress time to actually read bills and debate issues on the House floor.

... We have been exposing the truth about the Biden Administration, from identifying the true origins of COVID-19, to exposing the growing crisis at our southern border, to uncovering how the federal government was used to target the rights and liberties of the American people.

... and we aren’t just “talking the talk” – we have proven solutions on energy, fiscal responsibility, and national security (among others) ready to go!

But as you know, Fellow Conservative, Democrats are _**ALWAYS**_ watching to see if our fundraising numbers show that we still have the support needed to win our races. They’re ready to pounce at any sign of weakness, and that’s why I need you to show your support by helping TODAY.

Democrats’ campaign funding is largely covered by a handful of billionaire elitists and by those who support open borders, censorship of conservatives, and woke socialism. **[Our campaign relies entirely on the generosity of conservative patriots like you](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19edd5381e854c03b88a3eb72c8c9632&_e=Pqaq6TudOkUh38jk2AIPOJnufGDZMK484T4XP8HM9ZIpKcUSy0XRbsHawtP0yJNFz2K7ZTPfvtmlF-mQwYOLzzhLoR_cmoTD_oPEDaB9DGmdEgIp0_JDUs5Kkhm7Pg9tciuBHO4BdlIcOdOCBbpxuenWSIt0Kz5ScRGnqcQ40_kwVLxgwXpIL1H8Wx6lHiMwQYvPnVw7jiUrClSL37B_CXS1HwlXvU_oqM3AH_8YNRDnoUI8sHrCzlKSyF-qupaPjeL9EgqffTCn4OB1EtzuaQyo9JgoU7dsIXWlQuIG_HqH01BGhyBsxKLgFBhqeOYLT_EeCPbNGWWGjLktV50_WTWPzc2t-7sY6d777RUMxIGgtugVN3CGt2-z7nlqdMo1zGJhFxTjjuMHs1D8N78IrA%3D%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN $5 BEFORE FRIDAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19edd5381e854c03b88a3eb72c8c9632&_e=Pqaq6TudOkUh38jk2AIPOJnufGDZMK484T4XP8HM9ZIpKcUSy0XRbsHawtP0yJNFz2K7ZTPfvtmlF-mQwYOLzzhLoR_cmoTD_oPEDaB9DGmdEgIp0_JDUs5Kkhm7Pg9tciuBHO4BdlIcOdOCBbpxuenWSIt0Kz5ScRGnqcQ40_kwVLxgwXpIL1H8Wx6lHiMwQYvPnVw7jiUrClSL37B_CXS1HwlXvU_oqM3AH_8YNRDnoUI8sHrCzlKSyF-qupaPBDpFhsok-4JikwzD97SpnSoVB1N-dDes0nhCzYzEL7nSLa_5Fli4JI_FZGK351x3FpED3Ash4O2fwG7nLYzoAifYD1dTScdMrG0Skt5PUKONIglp_iMHH9Jj-SeZsP_2aWY6fiZT4GeqpEr02hI2Fw%3D%3D)

God Bless,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19edd5381e854c03b88a3eb72c8c9632&_e=Pqaq6TudOkUh38jk2AIPOFPWo1fn2NZWpb7SugBJemoSALg3cQnjJ8UDTU5kmRKmdURpZXuPKP3JGzUgvL_nsZDFXpYgfGSHjpYk6s009XKJbQ_-ZA770CTl6qweo8v82paX5Zd77GXszadDyc4JTy8K2cQmleRy9pVRX1kby24RbUNRu9IJuWbD7Z9a4WGEsazdbJrIfdGssvim3QhTug%3D%3D)
Jim Jordan

P.S. I wanted to remind you that left-wing liberals have already started spending money to defeat me in next year’s election. They know the work we’re doing in the House is going to expose them for years to come. We cannot let them win.

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19edd5381e854c03b88a3eb72c8c9632&_e=Pqaq6TudOkUh38jk2AIPOJnufGDZMK484T4XP8HM9ZIpKcUSy0XRbsHawtP0yJNFz2K7ZTPfvtmlF-mQwYOLzzhLoR_cmoTD_oPEDaB9DGmdEgIp0_JDUs5Kkhm7Pg9tciuBHO4BdlIcOdOCBbpxuenWSIt0Kz5ScRGnqcQ40_kwVLxgwXpIL1H8Wx6lHiMwQYvPnVw7jiUrClSL37B_CXS1HwlXvU_oqM3AH_8YNRDnoUI8sHrCzlKSyF-qupaPsiU8qG4ZYDVYruI_q-uTq7jOi3980xfZ9kOkbByATc_JvoBvRqLWMGYBIw4UJGL9QBeSTzq5zjRQLnqRQFRNOX7KAazDrnj4QQkv-t5T01-1xt3LNhhi0ClDo5Q5tIFOov4pRzcqLO6XhR61_mRFnw%3D%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19edd5381e854c03b88a3eb72c8c9632&_e=Pqaq6TudOkUh38jk2AIPOJnufGDZMK484T4XP8HM9ZIpKcUSy0XRbsHawtP0yJNFz2K7ZTPfvtmlF-mQwYOLzzhLoR_cmoTD_oPEDaB9DGmdEgIp0_JDUs5Kkhm7Pg9tciuBHO4BdlIcOdOCBbpxuenWSIt0Kz5ScRGnqcQ40_kwVLxgwXpIL1H8Wx6lHiMwQYvPnVw7jiUrClSL37B_CXS1HwlXvU_oqM3AH_8YNRDnoUI8sHrCzlKSyF-qupaPQFhTUCbvUeq63GVp5YZIPrWwALC1lDk5-rAuPkDdcnxU0VgrdO5PxkBo91Rpj_8FWe0BTDyZ6kW87sHgnCJHNC1byyC6jthtPtf-yLm9MNfwtEWluFon-UNYOtzq7rtn9zhVEPdMTGr8QtB6HNREDw%3D%3D)

Peter,

These past few weeks have been busy, busy, busy. I’m proud to say that despite a Republican majority in the House, I’ve made significant progress in elevating our progressive priorities.

**✅ I’ve reintroduced my 4-day workweek legislation** and I’m excited to see it picking up steam. I firmly believe it’s time for healthier work-life balance for all Americans.

**✅ I’m also excited to announce that I will be reintroducing the Equality Act to Congress this session.** This legislation is critical to protecting LGBTQ rights, a cause that is very personal to me.

**✅ I’m working around the clock to support gun control, reproductive rights, and stop hateful transphobia from right-wing extremists.**

My Democratic colleagues and I are doing all we can to keep fighting for everyday Americans – despite being in the minority. _**Now, we need your help.**_ [**I have a big $10,000 End of Quarter deadline at midnight. In order to defend Georgians from the radical Republican agenda, we need to elect more Democrats and take control of the House. **I’m watching donations come in, and we’re still $449 short of our monthly goal before our deadline at midnight.**

Here's the link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61075303/399119244/294255004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODliNWE1MC0yNWQwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NEZ4x9MovmDAmIcCBC2r6wXRYVYBW7tTmOBssdvqoRY=)** **Can you show your support by chipping in before our deadline? Thank you so much,

Caroline Pratt Finance Director Georgia House Democrats | The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to _flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia._ **To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. body:
Hi there — apologies for the Friday night email, but my team just let me know we’re only $468 away from hitting our very first end-of-quarter goal of 2023, and since we’re SO close, I knew I had to reach out.

Earlier this week, I emailed you about the unprecedented number of attacks we’re seeing on the ballot measure process in 2023. Attacks like these have existed for years — it’s why we launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign almost two years ago. But the number of attacks we’re seeing in 2023 is more than ever before.

It’s no small coincidence that these attacks are popping up after we successfully secured the first-ever wins to protect abortion access at the ballot box this past November — and we’re gearing up to fight back against every anti-abortion extremist’s thinly-veiled attempt at voter suppression.

So, it’s no surprise just how important hitting every single fundraising goal we set this year is, team. THIS is the year we fight back. Will you rush a donation of $10 or $25 before tonight at midnight to help us crush our first fundraising deadline of 2023? You can use my personal link here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-March2023-FR-March23EOQ?refcode=E20771-20230331-EOQ5-SL-DeadlineOther-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-March2023-FR-March23EOQ?refcode=E20771-20230331-EOQ5-SL-DeadlineOther-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25]

subject: Is there anything we can say, Peter?

body:
Our big FEC deadline is just hours away.
#
Peter — **is there anything we can say to get you to[add your first donation of ANY amount toward Lucas’ goal of raising 30,000 individual donations](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30673?refcode=em20230331-2908&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2908%2E614464%2ENI1DNV) before our big FEC deadline at midnight TONIGHT?**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Colorado Schools AREN'T Safe
body:
Episode #2 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, Boy, a lot has happened in just a week since we launched _Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl_... I planned on continuing my election stories this week, but two more school tragedies happened (one in our very own state) and we need to talk about it. It's time to tell some truths, and lies, about the effort to keep our schools safe in Colorado.If the kids and staff don't make it home every day, NOTHING ELSE MATTERS. Our nation's schools have become dangerous, stressful, and destructive environments for children. No one understands this more than my guests today -- John and Maria Castillo whose only son Kendrick sacrificed his life to save his class in the STEM School tragedy, and Max Schachter whose son Alex was murdered in the Parkland shooting.
### **Episode #2 - In The Danger Zone: Colorado Schools AREN'T Safe**
[WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-y/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-j/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-t/)
### **Not big on podcasts? I started a Substack!****[Subscribe HERE.](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-i/)**
### **I'll be posting transcripts of all my episode introductions and full episode breakdowns each week.**
Make sure you're following me **@heidiganahl** on social media for all the updates. Here's what you might have missed this week...
### **1\. A list of school safety solutions that don't involve gun control.**
As a member of Governor Hickenlooper's *failed* School Safety Committee in 2015 (shut down with no solutions), and a concerned mom who has been actively engaged in this conversation for 10+ years, [here's a short list of things we CAN do to combat this issue](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-d/) that DON'T involve gun control...[And here's the interview I did with Mandy Connell about keeping our kids safe.](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-h/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-k/)
### **2\. I called out Sen. Hickenlooper for his silence on school safety.**
We met regularly for over a year and heard testimony from 75 presenters. We talked about what schools could put in place and what they were already doing well. We discussed the differences between urban schools and rural schools. We had momentum. There was a lot of great research, presentations, and discussions - all of which ended up going absolutely nowhere.Yup, you heard that correctly. Nothing happened. Read more about the [failures of his School Safety Committee here](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-b/), or listen to the [newest episode of Unleashed](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-n/). [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-p/)
### **3\. Erin Lee has been busy exposing the fake narratives & ugly truths of transparency and parental rights in Colorado.**
This week has been heavy, but I hope it's served as a steady reminder: PARENTS, it's time for us to DO something. Our children are in danger. From the violence, to drugs, to crime, to the indoctrination of our kids. The government and it's schools are FAILING us & our kids in so many ways.Today's example taken from this last week's Unleashed episode... a #MadMom who is fighting with everything she has for parental rights and transparency in education, Erin Lee. And the more she fights, the more truths she's uncovering... right here in our state of Colorado. [Watch the reel I posted here](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-x/), or listen to [Erin's interview](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-m/) on Unleashed. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-c/) See you soon!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-a/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-f/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-z/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-v/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-e/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-qkuujg-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qkuujg-ttjjilthht-g/)
---

name: Adam Frisch
subject: required by federal law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
In less than 36 hours, Lauren Boebert and I are facing a federally-mandated fundraising deadline.

| Peter,

Lauren Boebert and I are facing a federally-mandated fundraising deadline. **After midnight, we’ll both be required by law to file a report with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) saying how much we’ve raised and from how many donors.**

This is our first FEC report of the 2024 campaign, and our fundraising numbers will be closely compared with Boebert’s. It’s also our first opportunity to out-raise Lauren Boebert – purely with the help of grassroots donors like you – and shock everyone.

**Last year, our race was the closest race in the country. After the recount was finished, I lost to Boebert by just 546 votes.** But with Lauren Boebert now on notice, her Super PACs are going to raise millions to attack me – and their lie-filled ads are sure to follow.

This is our first opportunity to show Boebert, every political pundit, and the Democratic and Republican establishment that we _will_ send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024.

**We’ve set a huge goal of raising $1 million online before this first important end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to hit it.**

[_**I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on you to split $5 or more between my campaign and Fight for Progress right now – every dollar you can afford before my first federally-mandated FEC fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert and restore some sanity to Congress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61076495/399131891/2053616000?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230331-2-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkN2Q2ZDg1LTI5ZDAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rv-trw5DNAFGlISRgCP5XSy_qnK27WxYgdGkZbOlKxY=)

After this FEC deadline, all of our fundraising numbers will become public. We cannot afford to fall short now.

Truly, thank you for being a part of this team.

With gratitude -
Adam

clean_body: In less than 36 hours, Lauren Boebert and I are facing a federally-mandated fundraising deadline. | Peter, Lauren Boebert and I are facing a federally-mandated fundraising deadline. After midnight, we’ll both be required by law to file a report with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) saying how much we’ve raised and from how many donors. This is our first FEC report of the 2024 campaign, and our fundraising numbers will be closely compared with Boebert’s. It’s also our first opportunity to out-raise Lauren Boebert – purely with the help of grassroots donors like you – and shock everyone. Last year, our race was the closest race in the country. After the recount was finished, I lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. But with Lauren Boebert now on notice, her Super PACs are going to raise millions to attack me – and their lie-filled ads are sure to follow. This is our first opportunity to show Boebert, every political pundit, and the Democratic and Republican establishment that we will send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024. We’ve set a huge goal of raising $1 million online before this first important end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to hit it. = After this FEC deadline, all of our fundraising numbers will become public. We cannot afford to fall short now. Truly, thank you for being a part of this team. With gratitude - Adam * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Josh
subject: quick call
body:
Hey, it’s Josh. I hate to bother you so late, but we’re only hours away from the first FEC filing deadline of the campaign... and we’re still over $8,000 away from our goal.
Hey, it’s Josh.
I hate to bother you so late, but we’re only hours away from the first FEC filing deadline of the campaign... and we’re still over $8,000 away from our goal.
Martin my Finance Director just called and told me I should send one last email to see if you’d be willing to chip in. I know it’s been a lot, but I wouldn’t be asking if I didn’t think we absolutely needed it. This new Republican opponent is a big deal.
If you can give tonight, I’d really be grateful. Here’s the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-March2023-FR-EOQ?refcode2=Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61077011/399136826/-1774127304?refcode=E20800-20230331-FinalEOQ-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmFlYWE0YjgtMmNkMC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPICet6eRF3IP39OWudodmKjmDV-cQ4xE6o5c72bE0U=)**
Really appreciate it,
Josh

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Trump Indictment Outrage
body:
Clean Elections Success!

[INSIDE JW]

Trump Indictment: A Brazen Attempt to Rig the 2024 Election

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29181&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS84MWtxdEJIZjg2bz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=4688907aad74ea0c6c6ff411b16dc7e48efbc35662c6527ebb3c8bb2be99359a]
Let’s cut to the chase. Trump is a crime victim. New York
Democrats’ reckless scheme to prosecute and jail President Trump is
a dangerous attack on the rule of law and a brazen attempt to rig the
2024 elections for President Biden and Democrats. We denounce Alvin
Bragg’s corrupt attempt to make Trump a political prisoner. Congress
and every responsible government official should do everything
possible under the law to undo this attempt to wreck our republican
form of government. Judicial Watch is on the case and has filed (and
will file) multiple open records requests and other court actions to
expose and try to stop this dangerous abuse of power.

JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: COLORADO AGREES TO SETTLE LAWSUIT OVER
INELIGIBLE VOTERS

We continue our string of successes in cleaning up the nation’s
voter rolls.

In the latest, Colorado's secretary of state agreed to settle
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29169&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZ3Jpc3dvbGQtY29sb3JhZG8tbnZyYS1zZXR0bGVtZW50LTAyOTkyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d6043228196be384102d471924e1e855ff49fda0fb4ecdb5018d25693df792d5]
a lawsuit alleging that Colorado failed to remove ineligible voters
from its rolls. As part of its settlement, Colorado will report to us
on its yearly progress in cleaning up its rolls for the next six
years. Since we filed this lawsuit, Colorado voter roll removals
increased by 78%, from 172,379 to 306,303 per reporting period.

We filed the lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=20868&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY28tdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d3795f13d4c02a37a92de7846bf28c1a52d25fb9cb093659377090a859a72453]
in
October 2020, in the U.S. District Court for the District of Colorado
on behalf of three residents, alleging that the state had failed to
clean its voter rolls as required by the National Voter Registration
Act of 1993 (NVRA
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=4368&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTAzcmQtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8yP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=0923439d0da9956dc97059c7401429fd89f8965482b4ab1687b84695fc861158])
(_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Griswold, et al_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29170&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZ3Jpc3dvbGQtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyOTkyL11fLl8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=582a105922fc6ecf7021d109de2645708717e7a2d772cc83b932d84a7cde20b0
(No. 20-cv-02992)). In August 2021, the court ruled that our lawsuit
could proceed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29171&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291cnQtcnVsZXMtanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtbGF3c3VpdC1jYW4tcHJvY2VlZC1hZ2FpbnN0LWNvbG9yYWRvLW9mZmljaWFscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b9862fb016d3d4d5c1436cf6e549a5b3635aef88c86550498225919c8718fdbb].
We were later joined in the suit by the American Constitution Party of
Colorado and the Libertarian Party of Colorado.

Our lawsuit alleged that high registration rates and other voter roll
metrics “indicate an ongoing, systemic problem with Colorado’s
voter list maintenance efforts.” We sought a court order declaring
that Colorado and its secretary of state violated the NVRA and
ordering them to “develop and implement a general program that makes
a reasonable effort to remove the registrations of ineligible
registrants from the voter rolls in Colorado.”

The number of outdated registrations removed by Colorado under a key
NVRA provision increased after we filed suit, from 172,379
registrations for the reporting period ending in 2018 to 306,303
registrations for the period ending in 2022—an increase of 78%. The
settlement agreement requires Colorado to provide us with its most
recent voter roll data for each Colorado county each year for six
years. This data is to include:

* The total number of registered and eligible voters, active voters,
and inactive voters.
* The total number of address confirmation notices sent to Colorado
voters pursuant to the NVRA, the number received back confirming or
changing an address, and the number that were undeliverable or not
returned.
* The total number of registrations addresses removed pursuant to
key provisions of the NVRA.

Coming on the heels of a massive voter roll clean up in Colorado
thanks to our lawsuit, this settlement agreement is a major victory
for all Colorado voters. Simply put: Cleaner voter rolls mean cleaner
elections.

We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. Our
team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys have stopped
discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in
California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=21208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL252cmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6895639061ab0e9dd273a0f81e79d0c7c0d5d5fea1149f126ef741e00ac8c21d].

In February Los Angeles County confirmed removal of 1,207,613
ineligible voters from its rolls since last year under the terms of a
settlement agreement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=28192&F=T&&hash=2fb2f3be3c5dd2f347c4a52ba8f25affac2f48654381bec0cf2c8b2d1f133656]
in a federal lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=28920&F=T&&hash=fca750e1fa40385a030d9a693ce43596adfa17018004323cf59dc19abfaaea75]
we filed in 2017.

We settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=28646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f85eb002f4b9dfa8334e25686194139c3301a613cd8d8d197cbaf3272fc1aa08]
a federal election integrity lawsuit against New York City after the
city removed 441,083 ineligible names from the voter rolls and
promised to take reasonable steps going forward to clean its voter
registration lists.

Kentucky
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=17111&F=T&&hash=2deb84c5ddb4737f5fce328f8ebe60aacee9ea8f78b1ca64e47172b9aebff839]
also removed hundreds of thousands of old registrations after it
entered into a consent decree to end another Judicial Watch lawsuit.

In February 2022, we settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=26811&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9ydGgtY2Fyb2xpbmEtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a6af463059e34cb9cf1f49fe6b1177525959492193949148e1cd6c3aab20065b]
a
voter roll clean-up lawsuit against North Carolina and two of its
counties after North Carolina removed over 430,000 inactive
registrations from its voter rolls.

In March 2022, a Maryland court ruled in favor
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=27012&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtdmljdG9yeS1jb3VydC1ydWxlcy1hZ2FpbnN0LWdlcnJ5bWFuZGVyLWluLW1hcnlsYW5kLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e0e8b4f9a8733eca65c684d7935978c6c8245938c407e865d000a056917b7bbf]
of our challenge to the Democratic state legislature’s “extreme”
congressional gerrymander.

In May 2022, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=27407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1b8b2e7ef9a18e3f797a44d49d3fad7b007089973d519a020f4f559472dd9712]
Illinois on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two other registered
Illinois voters to stop state election officials from extending
Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.

We expect more voter registration numbers from the various states a
bit later this year so I expect we will have other voter roll clean up
legal actions soon!

WE CONTINUE TO SEEK JUSTICE FOR OUR CLIENT’S BROTHER KILLED BY
ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT

The tragedy caused by criminal illegal aliens in our midst continues
unabated.

We filed a lawsuit against the Justice Department and the State
Department for extradition records of illegal alien Saul Chavez, who
ran over and killed William “Denny” McCann, the brother of our
client Brian McCann (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Justice, et al_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29182&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWFuZC1zdGF0ZS1tY2Nhbm4tY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNzAxL11fLl8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a3d389666a53aa67be8e622f4ac9464cc018e0693aa8b81d27272426f0c5fc05
(No. 1:23-cv-00701).

Judicial Watch sued after both the Justice Department and the State
Department failed to respond adequately to similar FOIA requests
submitted on February 1, 2023, for access to Chavez’s extradition
records.

Our legal team explained to the court:

> In June 2011, Saul Chavez ran over and killed William “Denny”
> McCann, brother of Judicial Watch client Brian McCann. At the time,
> Chavez was an unlawfully present criminal alien and had just
> completed a two-year term of probation for a 2009 DUI conviction.
> Chavez was charged with felony aggravated driving under the
> influence but was released by the Cook County Sheriff’s Office in
> November 2011 despite an U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement
> (ICE) detainer. Chavez subsequently fled to Mexico ...
Chavez was extradited
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29173&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94MzJjaGljYWdvLmNvbS92aWRlby8xMTU1NjkxP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d61579c5d9ddb5d70186293bdd3d3b73ecab5ada000b3dd9395deb2c29d4d48b]
from Mexico in December 2022.

We submitted a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request to the State
Department for Chavez’s extradition records, which include, but are
not limited to, “correspondence between the Office of the Legal
Adviser and the U.S. Department of Justice, state and federal
authorities in the U.S.,” as well as “copies of court records of
the legal proceedings” and “committal documents, such as the
extradition order, affidavit of waiver, legal briefs and hearing
transcript, decision memo to the Secretary of State or to his or her
Deputy, and the surrender warrant.”

To date, the State Department has failed to respond – let alone
produce records – to our request.

The Justice Department denied the request outright, citing, among the
other reasons, the privacy interests of the criminal Chavez.

In July 2015, Brian testified
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29174&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtY2xpZW50LWJyaWFuLW1jY2Fubi10ZXN0aWZpZWQtYmVmb3JlLXNlbmF0ZS1qdWRpY2lhcnktY29tbWl0dGVlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=fe4f741f58da3de1322dcab5191ad472c04f5a56b54ce0fa79af526e87117340]
before the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee in a hearing titled
“Oversight of the Administration’s Misdirected Immigration
Enforcement Policies: Examining the Impact on Public Safety and
Honoring the Victims.” Brian McCann explained:

> Denny was crossing Kedzie Avenue on a marked crosswalk four years
> ago and was violently struck by a drunk driver who dragged Denny
> under his car for a block in an attempt to flee before Denny died.
> The family was notified by the Chicago Police and the killer was
> placed into custody and charged with aggravated DUI causing death.
> Two days later ICE issued a detainer because the young man was an
> illegal alien with a prior felony. The family was assured by the
> Cook County prosecutor that the defendant would not be allowed to
> post bail and be released. Three months later the Cook County Board
> passed the ordinance that effectively requires the sheriff to ignore
> detainers. During the intervening weeks after Denny’s violent
> death, Cook County President Toni Preckwinkle and former mayoral
> candidate and Commissioner Jesus Garcia pushed for the ordinance and
> rammed it through on September 7, 2011. Two months later the killer
> made bail and absconded to Mexico.
“My family and I continue to seek justice for Denny. Now that he
has been extradited from Mexico, we are one step closer. But we still
want to know: What took so long? With the help of Judicial Watch, we
hope to find out,” said Brian McCann.

Denny McCann was killed by an illegal alien with a prior felony –
and then that criminal was released and fled to Mexico as a result of
Chicago’s lawless and deadly sanctuary policies. And to make matters
worse, the Biden administration is unlawfully hiding records about why
it took over a decade to extradite from Mexico this murderous
criminal.

During his effort to obtain justice for his brother’s violent death,
we filed suit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29175&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21jY2Fubi12LWRhcnQtY29tcGxhaW50LTEwNTgzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a47e6a3a218c9c74659c6a8ed8674dc980d2a9e9dda656448411844e2d8ef267]
on behalf of Brian McCann against the Cook County Sheriff in April
2013, asking the court to order the sheriff’s department to carry
out its legal duties under federal immigration law. Chavez had been
charged with felony aggravated driving under the influence but was
released by the sheriff from a Cook County jail in November 2011
despite an ICE immigration detainer. The case was dismissed by the
circuit court and afterward, in March 2015, the Illinois Supreme Court
declined
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29176&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jYXNldGV4dC5jb20vY2FzZS9tY2Nhbm4tdi1kYXJ0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7c9b35ca4e0e0701fd546bb40bcf9dceb7c38c468a2b200022a3ffe687d5dee5]
to hear the case.

In March 2021, our taxpayer lawsuit against the San Francisco
Sheriff’s sanctuary policy uncovered that over 2,400 criminal
illegal aliens
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29177&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjQwMC1hbGllbi1jcmltaW5hbHMtcmVsZWFzZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=da18acd972ce31ac2277b1a3555ae62a8d98d80aa86fd5481b3a1238e51f3cf8]
were
released under the department’s policy on communications with
Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) about criminal illegal
aliens in the Sheriff’s custody.

U.S. GIVES MILLIONS TO RACE, ETHNICITY, SOCIAL INCLUSION PROJECT IN
LATIN AMERICA

The Biden administration’s woke agenda knows no bounds as its
bureaucrats look for novel ways to spend your tax dollars to pursue
radical and Marxist agenda items. Here’s a recent example
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29165&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtZnVuZHMtbWlsbGlvbi1kb2xsYXItcmFjZS1wcm9qZWN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=704bf64469dac1451345e57563e99000ff9924c3b343f3e6b51c07448cfd04cf]
from our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog.

> Weeks after earmarking a million dollars to empower marginalized
> racial and ethnic communities in Europe, the Biden administration is
> spending another million on a State Department program in Latin
> America known as Race, Ethnicity, and Social Inclusion (RESI). The
> new allocation will help Brazil and Colombia “advance reforms that
> promote equity and equality, eliminate barriers to inclusion, and
> create equal access and opportunities for members of marginalized
> and underserved communities,” according to a grant announcement
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29183&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3JhbnRzLmdvdi93ZWIvZ3JhbnRzL3ZpZXctb3Bwb3J0dW5pdHkuaHRtbD9vcHBJZD0zNDcwOTQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=88f7caa620345d95f7dbcd692e058a54498634d2058e5e92608b3440f08b3a61]
> published a few days ago.
>
> The recent European and Latin American grants appear to be the
> global expansion of the Biden administration’s costly, domestic
> effort to advance racial equity and support for underserved
> populations through taxpayer-funded programs. The president launched
> the governmentwide initiative on his first day in office with a
> lengthy executive order titled Advancing Racial Equity and Support
> for Underserved Communities Through the Federal Government
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=27254&F=T&&hash=09eea1ff59f712d6becdff4834520b1419637c8e799f25024e6f3ba157ae1a74].
> The 2021 document claims that “entrenched disparities” in laws,
> public policies, and private institutions have denied equal
> opportunity to individuals and communities and that the health and
> climate crises have exposed inequities while a “historic movement
> for justice has highlighted the unbearable human costs of systemic
> racism.” Therefore, the order states, the federal government
> should pursue a “comprehensive approach to advancing equity for
> all, including people of color and others who have been historically
> underserved, marginalized, and adversely affected by persistent
> poverty and inequality.” It further says that “by advancing
> equity across the Federal Government, we can create opportunities
> for the improvement of communities that have been historically
> underserved, which benefits everyone.”
>
> Many key federal agencies have implemented racial equity plans as
> per Biden’s order. The Department of Labor has dedicated $260
> million to promote “equitable access” to government unemployment
> benefits by addressing disparities in the administration and
> delivery of money by race ethnicity and language proficiency. The
> Treasury Department named its first ever racial equity chief, a
> veteran La Raza official who spent a decade at the nation’s most
> influential open borders group. The Department of Defense (DOD) is
> using outrageous anti-bias materials that indoctrinate troops with
> anti-American and racially inflammatory training on diversity
> topics. The U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) created an equity
> commission to address longstanding inequities in agriculture. The
> nation’s medical research agency has a special minority health and
> health disparities division that issued a study declaring COVID-19
> exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities
> and marginalized communities.
>
> Last month the administration launched the initiative’s global
> version by dedicating a million dollars to “empower marginalized
> racial and ethnic communities in Europe
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29184&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFyZ2luYWxpemVkLWNvbW11bml0aWVzLWluLWV1cm9wZS9dLOKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a1e758567a9086e7eec02a6319a0bd11db0cdc2f10a0ccc1bea6040852c45d57
> focusing on people of African descent and Roma people. Among the
> goals is to mitigate structural racism, xenophobia, and
> discrimination found in institutions designed to protect and serve
> all people in society and ensure the fair administration of, and
> access to, justice for marginalized racial and ethnic communities.
> The U.S. also aims to counter societal discrimination and violence
> by advancing equity, social inclusion, and equality for all. The
> overseas investment is critical, according to the Biden
> administration, because members of marginalized racial, ethnic, and
> indigenous communities around the world often are disproportionately
> discriminated against, forced to endure high levels of violence and
> excruciating labor conditions in migration, are systematically
> denied access to justice, and continually bear the brunt of racial
> discrimination, xenophobia, and violence in society.
>
> The administration’s latest allotment in Latin America will fund
> two programs, the Colombia Action Plan on Racial and Ethnic Equality
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29185&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RhdGUuZ292L3Utcy1jb2xvbWJpYS1hY3Rpb24tcGxhbi1vbi1yYWNpYWwtYW5kLWV0aG5pYy1lcXVhbGl0eS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1161453db66266860c65c55b4cae3ca1dd705f309f48dded0ec0d6d701452264]
> (CAPREE) and the Brazil Joint Action Plan to Eliminate Racial and
> Ethnic Discrimination and Promote Equality
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62786&L=29186&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RhdGUuZ292L3Utcy1icmF6aWwtam9pbnQtYWN0aW9uLXBsYW4tdG8tZWxpbWluYXRlLXJhY2lhbC1hbmQtZXRobmljLWRpc2NyaW1pbmF0aW9uL10oSkFQRVI/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2bbe7b177c74e5217a28d310c39cbb3e9af4314f88d9e30fb1b1ddc8d1771f69).
> CAPREE recognizes the important contributions of African-descendent
> and indigenous peoples and seeks to elevate recognition of their
> cultures in the U.S. and Colombia by implementing programs to
> address social barriers that affect Afro-Colombian and indigenous
> communities. JAPER targets racism and addresses racial health
> disparities, environmental justice, equal access to economic
> opportunities and equal access to the justice system. The initiative
> recognizes that Brazil and the U.S. are multi-ethnic, multi-racial
> democracies that celebrate the rich contributions of people of
> African descent and indigenous populations. Similar to the domestic
> initiatives, the goal in Colombia and Brazil is racial and ethnic
> equality as well as social inclusion.

Until next week ...
