clean_body: Clean Elections Success! [INSIDE JW] Trump Indictment: A Brazen Attempt to Rig the 2024 Election [] Let’s cut to the chase. Trump is a crime victim. New York Democrats’ reckless scheme to prosecute and jail President Trump is a dangerous attack on the rule of law and a brazen attempt to rig the 2024 elections for President Biden and Democrats. We denounce Alvin Bragg’s corrupt attempt to make Trump a political prisoner. Congress and every responsible government official should do everything possible under the law to undo this attempt to wreck our republican form of government. Judicial Watch is on the case and has filed (and will file) multiple open records requests and other court actions to expose and try to stop this dangerous abuse of power. JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: COLORADO AGREES TO SETTLE LAWSUIT OVER INELIGIBLE VOTERS We continue our string of successes in cleaning up the nation’s voter rolls. In the latest, Colorado's secretary of state agreed to settle [] a lawsuit alleging that Colorado failed to remove ineligible voters from its rolls. As part of its settlement, Colorado will report to us on its yearly progress in cleaning up its rolls for the next six years. Since we filed this lawsuit, Colorado voter roll removals increased by 78%, from 172,379 to 306,303 per reporting period. We filed the lawsuit [] in October 2020, in the U.S. District Court for the District of Colorado on behalf of three residents, alleging that the state had failed to clean its voter rolls as required by the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 (NVRA []) (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Griswold, et al [ (No. 20-cv-02992)). In August 2021, the court ruled that our lawsuit could proceed []. We were later joined in the suit by the American Constitution Party of Colorado and the Libertarian Party of Colorado. Our lawsuit alleged that high registration rates and other voter roll metrics “indicate an ongoing, systemic problem with Colorado’s voter list maintenance efforts.” We sought a court order declaring that Colorado and its secretary of state violated the NVRA and ordering them to “develop and implement a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove the registrations of ineligible registrants from the voter rolls in Colorado.” The number of outdated registrations removed by Colorado under a key NVRA provision increased after we filed suit, from 172,379 registrations for the reporting period ending in 2018 to 306,303 registrations for the period ending in 2022—an increase of 78%. The settlement agreement requires Colorado to provide us with its most recent voter roll data for each Colorado county each year for six years. This data is to include: The total number of registered and eligible voters, active voters, and inactive voters. The total number of address confirmation notices sent to Colorado voters pursuant to the NVRA, the number received back confirming or changing an address, and the number that were undeliverable or not returned. * The total number of registrations addresses removed pursuant to key provisions of the NVRA. Coming on the heels of a massive voter roll clean up in Colorado thanks to our lawsuit, this settlement agreement is a major victory for all Colorado voters. Simply put: Cleaner voter rolls mean cleaner elections. We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. Our team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys have stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements []. In February Los Angeles County confirmed removal of 1,207,613 ineligible voters from its rolls since last year under the terms of a settlement agreement [] in a federal lawsuit [] we filed in 2017. We settled [] a federal election integrity lawsuit against New York City after the city removed 441,083 ineligible names from the voter rolls and promised to take reasonable steps going forward to clean its voter registration lists. Kentucky [] also removed hundreds of thousands of old registrations after it entered into a consent decree to end another Judicial Watch lawsuit. In February 2022, we settled [] a voter roll clean-up lawsuit against North Carolina and two of its counties after North Carolina removed over 430,000 inactive registrations from its voter rolls. In March 2022, a Maryland court ruled in favor [] of our challenge to the Democratic state legislature’s “extreme” congressional gerrymander. In May 2022, we sued [] Illinois on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two other registered Illinois voters to stop state election officials from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. We expect more voter registration numbers from the various states a bit later this year so I expect we will have other voter roll clean up legal actions soon! WE CONTINUE TO SEEK JUSTICE FOR OUR CLIENT’S BROTHER KILLED BY ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT The tragedy caused by criminal illegal aliens in our midst continues unabated. We filed a lawsuit against the Justice Department and the State Department for extradition records of illegal alien Saul Chavez, who ran over and killed William “Denny” McCann, the brother of our client Brian McCann (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice, et al [ (No. 1:23-cv-00701). Judicial Watch sued after both the Justice Department and the State Department failed to respond adequately to similar FOIA requests submitted on February 1, 2023, for access to Chavez’s extradition records. Our legal team explained to the court: In June 2011, Saul Chavez ran over and killed William “Denny” McCann, brother of Judicial Watch client Brian McCann. At the time, Chavez was an unlawfully present criminal alien and had just completed a two-year term of probation for a 2009 DUI conviction. Chavez was charged with felony aggravated driving under the influence but was released by the Cook County Sheriff’s Office in November 2011 despite an U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detainer. Chavez subsequently fled to Mexico ... Chavez was extradited [] from Mexico in December 2022. We submitted a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request to the State Department for Chavez’s extradition records, which include, but are not limited to, “correspondence between the Office of the Legal Adviser and the U.S. Department of Justice, state and federal authorities in the U.S.,” as well as “copies of court records of the legal proceedings” and “committal documents, such as the extradition order, affidavit of waiver, legal briefs and hearing transcript, decision memo to the Secretary of State or to his or her Deputy, and the surrender warrant.” To date, the State Department has failed to respond – let alone produce records – to our request. The Justice Department denied the request outright, citing, among the other reasons, the privacy interests of the criminal Chavez. In July 2015, Brian testified [] before the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee in a hearing titled “Oversight of the Administration’s Misdirected Immigration Enforcement Policies: Examining the Impact on Public Safety and Honoring the Victims.” Brian McCann explained: Denny was crossing Kedzie Avenue on a marked crosswalk four years ago and was violently struck by a drunk driver who dragged Denny under his car for a block in an attempt to flee before Denny died. The family was notified by the Chicago Police and the killer was placed into custody and charged with aggravated DUI causing death. Two days later ICE issued a detainer because the young man was an illegal alien with a prior felony. The family was assured by the Cook County prosecutor that the defendant would not be allowed to post bail and be released. Three months later the Cook County Board passed the ordinance that effectively requires the sheriff to ignore detainers. During the intervening weeks after Denny’s violent death, Cook County President Toni Preckwinkle and former mayoral candidate and Commissioner Jesus Garcia pushed for the ordinance and rammed it through on September 7, 2011. Two months later the killer made bail and absconded to Mexico. “My family and I continue to seek justice for Denny. Now that he has been extradited from Mexico, we are one step closer. But we still want to know: What took so long? With the help of Judicial Watch, we hope to find out,” said Brian McCann. Denny McCann was killed by an illegal alien with a prior felony – and then that criminal was released and fled to Mexico as a result of Chicago’s lawless and deadly sanctuary policies. And to make matters worse, the Biden administration is unlawfully hiding records about why it took over a decade to extradite from Mexico this murderous criminal. During his effort to obtain justice for his brother’s violent death, we filed suit [] on behalf of Brian McCann against the Cook County Sheriff in April 2013, asking the court to order the sheriff’s department to carry out its legal duties under federal immigration law. Chavez had been charged with felony aggravated driving under the influence but was released by the sheriff from a Cook County jail in November 2011 despite an ICE immigration detainer. The case was dismissed by the circuit court and afterward, in March 2015, the Illinois Supreme Court declined [] to hear the case. In March 2021, our taxpayer lawsuit against the San Francisco Sheriff’s sanctuary policy uncovered that over 2,400 criminal illegal aliens [] were released under the department’s policy on communications with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) about criminal illegal aliens in the Sheriff’s custody. U.S. GIVES MILLIONS TO RACE, ETHNICITY, SOCIAL INCLUSION PROJECT IN LATIN AMERICA The Biden administration’s woke agenda knows no bounds as its bureaucrats look for novel ways to spend your tax dollars to pursue radical and Marxist agenda items. Here’s a recent example [] from our Corruption Chronicles blog. Weeks after earmarking a million dollars to empower marginalized racial and ethnic communities in Europe, the Biden administration is spending another million on a State Department program in Latin America known as Race, Ethnicity, and Social Inclusion (RESI). The new allocation will help Brazil and Colombia “advance reforms that promote equity and equality, eliminate barriers to inclusion, and create equal access and opportunities for members of marginalized and underserved communities,” according to a grant announcement [] published a few days ago. The recent European and Latin American grants appear to be the global expansion of the Biden administration’s costly, domestic effort to advance racial equity and support for underserved populations through taxpayer-funded programs. The president launched the governmentwide initiative on his first day in office with a lengthy executive order titled Advancing Racial Equity and Support for Underserved Communities Through the Federal Government []. The 2021 document claims that “entrenched disparities” in laws, public policies, and private institutions have denied equal opportunity to individuals and communities and that the health and climate crises have exposed inequities while a “historic movement for justice has highlighted the unbearable human costs of systemic racism.” Therefore, the order states, the federal government should pursue a “comprehensive approach to advancing equity for all, including people of color and others who have been historically underserved, marginalized, and adversely affected by persistent poverty and inequality.” It further says that “by advancing equity across the Federal Government, we can create opportunities for the improvement of communities that have been historically underserved, which benefits everyone.” Many key federal agencies have implemented racial equity plans as per Biden’s order. The Department of Labor has dedicated $260 million to promote “equitable access” to government unemployment benefits by addressing disparities in the administration and delivery of money by race ethnicity and language proficiency. The Treasury Department named its first ever racial equity chief, a veteran La Raza official who spent a decade at the nation’s most influential open borders group. The Department of Defense (DOD) is using outrageous anti-bias materials that indoctrinate troops with anti-American and racially inflammatory training on diversity topics. The U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) created an equity commission to address longstanding inequities in agriculture. The nation’s medical research agency has a special minority health and health disparities division that issued a study declaring COVID-19 exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities and marginalized communities. Last month the administration launched the initiative’s global version by dedicating a million dollars to “empower marginalized racial and ethnic communities in Europe [ focusing on people of African descent and Roma people. Among the goals is to mitigate structural racism, xenophobia, and discrimination found in institutions designed to protect and serve all people in society and ensure the fair administration of, and access to, justice for marginalized racial and ethnic communities. The U.S. also aims to counter societal discrimination and violence by advancing equity, social inclusion, and equality for all. The overseas investment is critical, according to the Biden administration, because members of marginalized racial, ethnic, and indigenous communities around the world often are disproportionately discriminated against, forced to endure high levels of violence and excruciating labor conditions in migration, are systematically denied access to justice, and continually bear the brunt of racial discrimination, xenophobia, and violence in society. The administration’s latest allotment in Latin America will fund two programs, the Colombia Action Plan on Racial and Ethnic Equality [] (CAPREE) and the Brazil Joint Action Plan to Eliminate Racial and Ethnic Discrimination and Promote Equality [). CAPREE recognizes the important contributions of African-descendent and indigenous peoples and seeks to elevate recognition of their cultures in the U.S. and Colombia by implementing programs to address social barriers that affect Afro-Colombian and indigenous communities. JAPER targets racism and addresses racial health disparities, environmental justice, equal access to economic opportunities and equal access to the justice system. The initiative recognizes that Brazil and the U.S. are multi-ethnic, multi-racial democracies that celebrate the rich contributions of people of African descent and indigenous populations. Similar to the domestic initiatives, the goal in Colombia and Brazil is racial and ethnic equality as well as social inclusion. Until next week ... clean_body: | | | | Peter, At midnight, my team and I will close the books on this quarter, and in a few days, our fundraising numbers will become public. With Kevin McCarthy actively recruiting a Republican opponent to take this seat away and the MAGA cult getting more worked up every day, it's critical that we have the resources we need to show them we're ready for the fight. Thanks to supporters like you, we're just $1,477 from our grassroots goal. = = Your support means so much, Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: This grassroots team played a big part in helping Democrats make history last year →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
With the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 just hours away, my friends at the DNC are tracking behind their goal. | |
---
Derek, it’s James Carville. I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: I’m amazed by what this team has accomplished. You took back the White House. You flipped the Senate in 2020 and held it in 2022. The Democrats you helped elect to the House have passed more legislation than any Congress in history. Some people called it impossible. I call it the power of the grassroots! **But let’s be honest, Derek. There’s a lot left to fight for and we can’t take our foot off the gas -- not when Republicans are trying to throw a wrench in Democrats’ plans to fight for American families at every turn.** _The DNC’s first end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 is just hours away, and they are tracking behind their goal._ They need this team to rally together so they can invest in the programs and strategies necessary to help Democrats win in every corner of the country. [This grassroots team played a big part in helping Democrats make history last year. clean_body: With the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 just hours away, my friends at the DNC are tracking behind their goal. | | Derek, it’s James Carville. I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: I’m amazed by what this team has accomplished. You took back the White House. You flipped the Senate in 2020 and held it in 2022. The Democrats you helped elect to the House have passed more legislation than any Congress in history. Some people called it impossible. I call it the power of the grassroots! But let’s be honest, Derek. There’s a lot left to fight for and we can’t take our foot off the gas -- not when Republicans are trying to throw a wrench in Democrats’ plans to fight for American families at every turn. The DNC’s first end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 is just hours away, and they are tracking behind their goal. They need this team to rally together so they can invest in the programs and strategies necessary to help Democrats win in every corner of the country. As a guy born in Georgia, I know firsthand that any state can be a blue state if we invest early enough and get our message out to voters before they head to the ballot box. Extreme Republicans like Nikki Haley are running for president in 2024, and we can expect even more MAGA Republicans to run for office up and down the ticket. We need to fight back as early as possible, and that means meeting the DNC’s end-of-quarter goal before midnight. Let’s do the dang thing, James James Carville Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. We are in the final hours of our goal to raise $15,000 before we close our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and I would like to ask one last time if you could chip in.

There is so much on the line if we cannot reach our goal and lay the groundwork to win every race we can. **Every seat up and down the ballot needs to be blue if we want any chance of actual work being done to improve the lives of every Arizonan.**

That's what's on the line, and that's why I'm asking if you can chip in right now. So please can you click the link below and step up to help us before the deadline?:

| Peter,

We pointed out that Lori was only able to win her Congressional seat with **51.1%** of the vote.

And now that we’re just 3 hours away from her first FEC mandated deadline since taking office – we noticed you still hadn't donated.

_Was this a mistake, Peter? _

We know you’re usually one of Lori’s best supporters, so we were a little surprised, and wanted to give you one last chance to help.

[_**Please make an urgent contribution toward our March end-of-quarter goal before the deadline at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=b1e00cb49d&e=c87c5d8d97)

| \---------- Forwarded message ---------

Peter,

_We wrote to you today because we’re concerned. _

Both Oregon and national Democrats have ramped up attacks against Lori and ramped up their fundraising.

And since Lori was only able to win her Congressional seat with _**51.1%**_ of the vote – we had no choice but to make our fundraising goal for the FEC-mandated March deadline our largest ever. _This is not the news we wanted to share, but with just 6 hours left until the FIRST 2023 deadline we’re still $3,924 behind on our goal._ [_**Please make an urgent contribution toward our March end-of-quarter goal before the deadline at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=a902d95d83&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=7fe9104eb2&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| One thing we wanted to remind you of is that this isn’t just an FEC-mandated quarterly deadline.

Hitting this goal gives Lori the resources she needs to keep fighting for her Parental Rights Bill – a bill that is absolutely critical for the future of Oregon’s students.

And while there isn’t a lot of time left, there is still some time.

We hope you’ll make the most of it.

[_**Please make an urgent contribution toward our March end-of-quarter goal before the deadline at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=1239e0cfd0&e=c87c5d8d97)

Thank you,

Lori for Congress Finance Team

clean_body: Was this a mistake? | | | | | | Peter, We pointed out that Lori was only able to win her Congressional seat with 51.1% of the vote. And now that we’re just 3 hours away from her first FEC mandated deadline since taking office – we noticed you still hadn't donated. Was this a mistake, Peter? We know you’re usually one of Lori’s best supporters, so we were a little surprised, and wanted to give you one last chance to help. | "CONTRIBUTE $250" | "CONTRIBUTE $100" | "CONTRIBUTE $50" | "CONTRIBUTE $25" | Thank you, Lori for Congress Finance Team | "CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT" | \---------- Forwarded message --------- Peter, We wrote to you today because we’re concerned. Both Oregon and national Democrats have ramped up attacks against Lori and ramped up their fundraising. And since Lori was only able to win her Congressional seat with 51.1% of the vote – we had no choice but to make our fundraising goal for the FEC-mandated March deadline our largest ever. This is not the news we wanted to share, but with just 6 hours left until the FIRST 2023 deadline we’re still $3,924 behind on our goal. | "CONTRIBUTE" | One thing we wanted to remind you of is that this isn’t just an FEC-mandated quarterly deadline. Hitting this goal gives Lori the resources she needs to keep fighting for her Parental Rights Bill – a bill that is absolutely critical for the future of Oregon’s students. And while there isn’t a lot of time left, there is still some time. We hope you’ll make the most of it. Thank you, Lori for Congress Finance Team | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. | | Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: | If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 mailto:?subject=Support%20Congresswoman%20Lori%20Chavez-DeRemer&body=Hey!%20Congresswoman%20Lori%20Chavez-DeRemer%20needs%20our%20support!%20Go%20to%20her%20website%20and%20show%20your%20support%20today!%20lorichavezderemer.com Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | ** | | |

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Peace, hope, and comfort for Nashville
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._57Q)
---
Fellow American, This one is going to be special. TPUSA Faith's **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** kicked off a few weeks ago, bringing THOUSANDS of Americans together to worship our great God, to see lives changed, and to pray for revival in our country. **But our stop this weekend in Nashville is going to be especially memorable.** In the wake of the tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, this community is in need of peace... of hope... of comfort. **And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship this weekend.** We're expecting hundreds of grieving brothers and sisters to gather with us, including dozens of pastors and church leaders, as we cry out to God for comfort in this tragedy and for a historic movement of his Spirit among the people of our nation.
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-i2VY2DW3eJqzIUqSuxsg)
---
No matter where you are -- in Nashville, or in the furthest corner of America -- please join us in prayer for Nashville, for our nation, and for our future. As we gather in Nashville this Saturday, and in every state capital in America over the next several months, we need the Lord's presence to be with His people in a powerful and life-changing way. [**But we also need you. In fact, we can't do this without you!**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._VzDlAxsB-PR6TNzAQ) Will you please consider making a generous financial gift to help TPUSA Faith continue gathering God's people together to seek his face, to "seek the welfare of the city" (Jer. 29:7), and to ask that His kingdom would come and His will be done on Earth as it is in heaven?
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-W2-SkJjRAgbdpH5c6frg)
---
[**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._lxjLQ) will enable us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- one in _EVERY STATE CAPITAL IN AMERICA_ \-- over the next several months. **It will help us reach _TENS OF THOUSANDS_ of Americans with the hope of Christ.** And it will help us send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. This important event, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, has the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to Nashville and to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's kingdom near. That's exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._Df_wkFA7A) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._WTQ)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDkxLWM0MjBjMDc1ZTVmZDQwZTdiYjZmODQ1NzMwYmFlZThmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/f-qrUD3YgLTQUiAY2aZoVQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Alan Keck
subject: I know you’re busy.
body:
...but I want to take just a minute to share a personal update on where we are in this race.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-r/) _I know you 're busy, _[__**but I want to take just a minute to share a personal update**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-j/) _on where we are in this race. _⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-t/) [WATCH MY PERSONAL MESSAGE TO YOU](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-i/) We're building so much momentum and I am energized and encouraged every single day. Our message-[__**the Keck Game Plan**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-d/) -_is resonating, and more and more people are jumping on board. __**But we 're getting to the end of the fiscal quarter, close to the end of another financial deadline and **_[_**_I need your help._**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-h/) _The more that we can raise, the more that you can support, the easier it is for us to share this message.__**It 's never fun to ask for resources or money, but I'm going to come to you again and say I need your time, your talent and your treasure.**_ [__**Whether it 's $5, $25 or $500, help us hit our NEW GOAL of $2,500**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-k/) so we can continue to share this message of hope and opportunity, of growing our economy, talking about public safety, education and the pro-family policy that so many of you love. [CHIP-IN $5 | <1% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-u/) [CHIP-IN $25 | 1% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-o/) [CHIP-IN $50 | 2% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-b/) [CHIP-IN $100 | 4% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-n/) [CHIP-IN $500 | 20% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-p/) I'm grateful for what you've already done, [__**but I need you to lean in and sacrifice with me and together, we 'll prove Kentucky Wins.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-x/)Thank you and God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-m/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-c/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-u-pcdihk-dytiuyidkd-q/)

It’s Senator Tim Scott. I’ve been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I’ve always been able to count on you in the past, so please don’t let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654870%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JDXu7X3EC2sJidUTygjpIA&sysid=1 "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎

---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654872%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZTP7v7TsXhU0nWws%2bvkyQ&sysid=1 "Can I count on you to
join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

Tim Scott

name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zinv7ji0b1ssa7vr7ffb5q9fdvchdnjflem93th8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj5c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn2e12fjtbapa4lo8h7ps2h4ktjtjatkumj1cmk0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj5c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zja6um56u4d6mhkrrvqagiubcgs87pan96bcoq8g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj5c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhmp1qg7ctcpkp31ett5i7e57msadm9461hp2en8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zijsmu7rh2gq3f7i4tntbhfsutfdh408j16l6gb0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsje9mtrkuggqjruosl38h8a3959h5fo83iqlv4o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm18ht7t8225n6dliegd2ib38qinm65md5pa7a9o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5deam0edv3s38hd3nlfap3dga3idqsp1oiif3k0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc8qldv84vsjkjmn22n3oh7alscq7fmpgq3ecnn0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkidcnjkkquf6hk73djhtvocijvp98s1a7q78rb0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq4a0obpjflic4vmil1vnkbmlkd2du61a25qp18g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg6vegorta048kf30lvo1qikm65kapa3ibp9s6co_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0t8u76drsssrbksmi8oft66d2iv46v9qcsjv448_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm7nbqd97l65461jjtm9m3rnu7btpj1q92kfq850_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zge5jtoe6774q66p73onh46kec7r0bboa2gblt00_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9dda4gqi0gdljkk1f5nh0c614qev0eqcikcboo8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1kta8nolr9gsmmitfi95fbdtojt0v7r2u4sgv58_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3chh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|

Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5hfu91glg8enapt6m0rn57ftoim2i19e3t5116g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj1cph2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, friend. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn0e9n4fd6084kh4lk104dtnk37stc883uv581ro_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj6c5h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z94pjpuau0a7osi5h3r9mgs98mgbtlrpi1in9r90_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj6c5h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv8dqldothfrfeuo0dgbl5rh10busgvtleb8qml0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj6c5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z003l9hl6utj4lbpknl5h5b5vtbsjnkg9vumutgo_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj6c5h2bs)

[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm816222ihqcl4p49aohu871fd6cfmd1lj3hiob0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj6c5h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zghpc1scls9h8gv4q4dea5nr3ol815o6g2kk8pqg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj6c5h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztcm1rjlo1o7mjnqi48eb587ptg0snohr8n4d6e0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj6c5h2bs)

There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: We need to talk about 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House –

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhkikah4o3bfmbssu4efvusm6hh5vmhi4vtci7go_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj7cth2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0mcjrqd3e3qk6q91vacj1uk484r465gjbf6r8lo_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj7cth2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztie6cien99mlhk46qjtgbmaahr8ik65lismfjv8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj7cth2bs "Confirm you’re with me, %%First_Name__c%%. I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03459%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1peKxH96%2fcn0ZKgVsI7vGg&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03459%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1peKxH96%2fcn0ZKgVsI7vGg&sysid=1)

###
---
| | [ Field of Dreams are back! ](http://click1.srnemail.com/vfvyhgqqhckncczqnkktfnmcdhnjgddcvgtzdvkpvkmypy_njdppttftyfknqpjwfdwtww.html)
### _Friday, March 31, 2023_
Freshly painted fields, the smell of hot dogs in the air, baseball is back! Join James and i on a journey discussing the opening week of Baseball. Stick with the whole show and get a special surprise in the end. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/rljlgvhhgskpssbhpkkqcpwsygptvyysrvqbyrknrkwlkj_njdppttftyfknqpjwfdwtww.html)
---|---
| [ No one wants to see pro golfers shoot 75: The story of LIV Golf and the PGA ](http://click1.srnemail.com/izccmdttmrbwrrqtwbbfywzrpmwndpprhdfqphbvhbzcby_njdppttftyfknqpjwfdwtww.html)
### _Wednesday, March 29, 2023_
We all strive to be better. Mike McCall, is the PGA professional at the Valhalla Resort in Helen, GA, and we discuss ways to improve your golf game and let you get ready for a great summer. We also dive into the PGA/LIV controversy and discuss its long term impact. Links for the Resort: https://valhallaresorthotel.com/ [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/qhhdgfjjgcvtccrjtvvbmthcygtpfyycwfbrywvswvhdvw_njdppttftyfknqpjwfdwtww.html)
| [ A Conversation with Amity Shlaes ](http://click1.srnemail.com/astlhpvvhcynccgvnyywmnscrhntprrckpwgrkydkyslyd_njdppttftyfknqpjwfdwtww.html)
### _Monday, March 27, 2023_
The author of Coolidge, The Forgotten Man and The Great Society sits down to discuss not only her writings but more importantly how our understanding of history can help us as we look to the future. You will want to share this episode with everyone! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/slkpmkzzmgctgghztccdbtlgwmtskwwgrkdhwrcvrclpcc_njdppttftyfknqpjwfdwtww.html)

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Regarding 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House –

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpi1dgascdojnbd5i5ak2m4gb4l4echvutvcvnao_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o74cph2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0g7us4g3276igqkcgrs8auofipkt9bhbq9gc9r8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o74cph2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo7klf58ojop35fl5q9c77patlkpe1a1oop2psa0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o74cph2bs "Confirm you’re with me, %%First_Name__c%%. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:")**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztt0hubtco1s00v2kskerc4k8nvmivtct321t048_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o74cph2bs)
---

I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z04c3n6lhsf1nplligu1jbl0hs3j67d9dml9rqt8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o74cph2bs)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We need you to STAY on our team. Renew your 2023 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zba5c7eiauehvvah4t52hnqn2h2f5es7mjhfvu1o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3oa7blh25pt5q0hfddhjceoc9i91io901otjfl8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zietfc65g52o87ksum23vlv1te1jtji36b3m82o0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdk29rk4t1nr0tth1d6tmtbfoui6rtubpkaoo0q0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcrbh3r6gro279togp8s3oldiamq27aug2cmg3fo_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z180jrdeghpq7u4749ufetu04et6saplf0tgs1e8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0t3f46qaaht10dfhvu2esup45m6lrdqt4d2ns3o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6dq6f2e0q3pag46qas85cjefo2mkd7d3717i6o0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb0qjnuhml5olubbmgv99fai7lkft8dqbmtj5qa8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znjv8d9dpsc2a28258r5np7r4jdslqqdikkq4oe0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgmcoj3c9h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Is the Constitution “trash?!”
body:
You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbml1m23apu4pl2evrnjb542kh9vj1avvbjdnbvg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o72c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. **That 's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, ["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9rnibabfgb5com2mlatflj4gn657e13ep5vn3go_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o72c1h2bs)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlsoos3dq8gi12kpmi46gvaiqlk90uloupd4aj4g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o72c1h2bs)
---
| | _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zba0844sufp0jq8dpag7sfn38er6medj41j243mo_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpgm6o72c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Donald Trump began his campaign last week by honoring the very terrorists who stormed our Capitol Jan 6th, stabbing, spearing, stomping, gouging, kicking, crushing and beating over 150 Capitol Police. Have you seen how awful it was?
body:
Watch the video exposing Trump’s treachery
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b829606-39e5-4f44-bef4-06d799202dcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [Donald Trump began his campaign last week by honoring the very terrorists who stormed our Capitol Jan 6th,](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta51be9fe-8658-44cc-8e6b-3954ed761b2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) stabbing, spearing, stomping, gouging, kicking, crushing and beating over 150 Capitol Police. They broke, stole, and destroyed property, wiped feces on the walls. This was who [Trump chose as his comrades in arms](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ff1c126-5ab2-40bf-94f0-cddb9f6d00f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), or perhaps brownshirts. **[Watch The Video Exposing Trump's Treachery](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85964ab8-6941-494a-82d0-4d9e7136c9a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[In this despicable and incredibly eerie scene at his rally in Waco, TX](https://default.salsalabs.org/T532efba5-fd89-454a-a717-97043f6cc628/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) (sending a clear signal ideologically that he is with David Koresh's cult) he played an anthem they sang while he stood at attention. [All while showing scenes from the vicious, violent attack on a large screen.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8d2bba4-94c3-444c-b9e6-43f641f5926f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [Watch The Video Exposing Trump's Treachery](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27473744-b1d9-440d-87ad-ec56b4642ec5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It was something out of "1984," not to mention Mussolini, Milosevic, Mao or any of the other worst totalitarian tyrants in world history. [Trump--and his allies like Marge Greene--is trying to launder January 6th into something noble.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c859544-a0a8-411b-a8fc-ea090932b81d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And most of the press, knowing them, will allow him to do it. [We. Can't. Let. This. Happen.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c3800d2-6ed8-4562-830c-2568f9ccf41a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [That is why at the Blue Amp Channel we felt it necessary to make a video exposing the blatant psychological manipulation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffed7d27-cb8e-4821-ad5d-cbdafb6b894a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), the fact that Trump knew he was going to be indicted when he did this, so it's clear [he's trying to further radicalize his base towards more violence](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7bc0f6e6-3c7a-45ab-878d-5e833de67ced/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) so he can escape justice. [Watch The Video Exposing Trump's Treachery](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4598894c-c744-4a49-84d9-512546ea2abc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We couldn't ignore it. [Please watch this video.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d665a01-a7e8-407c-8c7e-167b8eb44ac5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And [please SUBSCRIBE to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d0eab70-3f5a-435b-9616-e97f80826215/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) so we can reach more people and protect our democracy.

Thank you for all you are doing to fight for what's right. Have a great weekend, and thanks for being a part of the Blue Amp Action community! Cliff PS: 👍🔥Blue Amp Action's expanding! Sponsors, newsletters, petitions, fundraisers! [Would you consider supporting us with a donation to continue providing the best damn community possible?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e0abb8b-2271-4905-814d-abc39e6ec538/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks! PPS: [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5082c58e-8b98-40a1-9474-6d336f6703e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! [Donate To Blue Amp Action!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc1b83e6-34a4-4317-9905-e48bb77808ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Get OUTSTANDING merch **[at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7dcf8d01-92f2-43b9-92bb-ee0a73148116/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Follow [@cliffschecter on Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9190f1a5-8d91-4aa3-b3cd-909c1b537126/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te991a9a1-ddc4-4f7f-9286-66682a2ff7b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79656%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bJB3Y49TeVFIhqGddW3Y9g&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79656%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bJB3Y49TeVFIhqGddW3Y9g&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79657%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2WV7HkaVeUGFcRVK4DoPzQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79658%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l%2f2R5AzWA%2bfq5w6NryIwPQ&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79659%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vq5vIGclG6%2brDUa4mtljNQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79650%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6vrQU1Sruw8M%2fs4iihb1NQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79651%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bdOn6xy2qS2xM22437sc4g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79652%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2u%2bXwEhW0w%2fIhA762nlkIw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79653%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zM%2fRuPLUDFusgEB6p994cw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79654%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O82OH88b3pjxkUbfvStxZg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79665%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2Tpdy0VjXR%2bcYxKdU2d0RA&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79666%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FQwGAIGY%2f5Awdwbej1Wiyw&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79667%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RuWB2Ig9yUY7X35V4McV%2bA&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79668%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G3lRKJO8o1Go3noCmWkVXA&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79669%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pNt4%2bv1OxpaarA%2f5%2b2jQqw&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: ICYMI News
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1mse8gcv6be8jqij648g7enieq3i6ubjdv0r68o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim0ob5c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. **That 's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, ["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrqad6rq0u1lp8hv86ukra8389odrc7fuq36kma0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim0ob5c9h2bs)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg56ns098evhrpr1i2o8jrldodng5fd1jdhh1jh0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim0ob5c9h2bs)
---
| | _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2m6nahhlbm3tlhmuacfo4sta4k9oc866qn8fcko_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim0ob5c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znm8p63gsg1staaib1tvjl4ibff5in9bbvl7ooq8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim0ob2cth2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z04tm0g0470988jj6i2r04ic2pn957jdi3q1maho_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim0ob2cth2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvnp96v8gmi48erldosk9b9tle3i90tq3ujos91g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim0ob2cth2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |
