subject: We need to talk about 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House –

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkglbkuujenmdtbe7ngs002hntghj7lurqc4sjfg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim2o31clh2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjh2lt2nkht3f4m8pac4hgkal77pt15sd3e276k8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim2o31clh2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z59h5b65r6b7gu34h9gle2gcgla8i4nq31u0si6g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim2o31clh2bs "Confirm you’re with me, %%First_Name__c%%. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:")**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvftjr2pmqi38b0ecebduqdefu74t87i2qnpg4t0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim2o31clh2bs)
---

I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0cq6m9i73aooe8du22gnjniutd8ta0fm9viiuqo_rp22sh2s8i66o70cpim2o31clh2bs)

Peter,
---
Time is running out to ensure voters know the truth about radical Judge Protasiewicz and the destruction she will bring to Wisconsin and our country if she wins this critical election.
---
With just 3 days left until Election Day, we can't slow down our efforts to spread our winning message and ensure conservative voters cast their ballots.

---
_But with your continued support and the future of our great state at stake, we know that conservatives will**out-vote** the Left for a conservative win._

body:

| | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03496%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RIF%2fslgUflJIoplAfCd3MQ&sysid=1)

---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have **INDICTED** me in a disgusting witch hunt.
Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer.
**Never before in our Nation’s history has this been done. **
The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. _Ever._
From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement.
Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement.
The Deep State will use anything at their disposal to shut down the one political movement that puts YOU first.
_**But I promise you this: This Witch Hunt will BACKFIRE MASSIVELY on Joe Biden. **_
_**With your support, we will write the next great chapter of American history - and 2024 will forever go down as the year we saved our Republic.**_

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: DC Statehood Bill introduced with OVERWHELMING SUPPORT from Dem Senators!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---
| | | _Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.)
Tom Carper (D-Del.)

---
| | [STOP DC STATEHOOD](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ea51af17e23f45aeb071367bcd5dfd08&_e=YP9S5DdbLRdSB2XGm-qwCdY-b2k8NAc7tPnjE67OoZkHrZtcp4FtD1tiEJbH1MfgzQA0hPU0vfrFbtyGfuVXeqvBNwTpKhv-IjbnQy5_G3aq30DNh2s2ZfOWSFFJEEikhy2zLl67w5VoLn5P13LiDTfGsUSXF_BdrIlBSFnfQhFDJck4YAtYe71v1haMsvky0NsC4mza8WePaV-sIuKYZEWjCoXoyHqc4ke5dNah0G-B1hCjdcRAppj9Ecmncx5wnXLVQFTcy2BPi_IfOAYWwo8Coo47pt834nZA0ErPIcWqYtyf9c8KNaPZU9oEI40igBBLUjv0JKvkezPh6WUov3C6Gpa8a068tAhLayCTb9w-aSxkSmtqwsHJqyXW9HFWqQ6DuOrKAleOs1IGBy8ia8qRE5ivur126nZDHz_H7kPLyG74gR5sZDEbGnyUpkF7zN-dutd0IuYWhKQTvxhTLw%3D%3D)
---

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ea51af17e23f45aeb071367bcd5dfd08&_e=YP9S5DdbLRdSB2XGm-qwCdY-b2k8NAc7tPnjE67OoZkHrZtcp4FtD1tiEJbH1MfgzQA0hPU0vfrFbtyGfuVXeqvBNwTpKhv-IjbnQy5_G3aq30DNh2s2ZfOWSFFJEEikhy2zLl67w5VoLn5P13LiDTfGsUSXF_BdrIlBSFnfQhFDJck4YAtYe71v1haMsvky0NsC4mza8WePaV-sIuKYZEWjCoXoyHqc4ke5dNah0G-B1hCjdcRAppj9Ecmncx5wnXLVQFTcy2BPi_IfOAYWwo8Coo47pt834nZA0ErPIcWqYtyf9c8KNaPZU9oEI40iwJpW8RbCjTYA8Lz2aqNxIbxRTzyfuq4Ggh861AgIpYfPobWVfOB0uWPY_PEYULjBeiAH_Xu6kOqmGmnNbw-uvcb-xsyG59gPo4APxxK9TeQXMdh1yncm0OdHU4Vg7RtcfTTKRlk_WeduR-18Hy8MnQ%3D%3D "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power? Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION. The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT: | | | Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) Tom Carper (D-Del.) Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.) Tammy Baldwin (D-Wis.) Michael Bennet (D-Colo.) Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.) It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS. Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have **INDICTED** me in a disgusting witch hunt.

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c04f3ee5db6645298a3a8e29f2f738b5&_e=JNMpcy0zIZro3JVupGYy8BxsZtn5pU4J98jLspM9Xzp8mddthuKlvx3I35Mr9gNvZ7mOFtSg9XG7ad_TSCdCxMDsg-ywFKPEu27yNI8XSk75AjeQ53DR4ZW9J4Zxal3Edm1GTDeZoxv5VId5BW4x9sB6zWyoS_QAoJFsjcSZKfM3f0YfSIzDXrw9Ju51fQenNIi6aXOLq-4IuefK2RlY5DgHcmC5zo9-rd48XbUF4peM5QoL8cJ8aSYRA0GFPk9e41SfVQdkq83WBNyExnpoJw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c04f3ee5db6645298a3a8e29f2f738b5&_e=JNMpcy0zIZro3JVupGYy8BxsZtn5pU4J98jLspM9Xzp8mddthuKlvx3I35Mr9gNvZ7mOFtSg9XG7ad_TSCdCxMDsg-ywFKPEu27yNI8XSk75AjeQ53DR4ZW9J4Zxal3EcQp_dYRCzG_7kEBL3_uct-gt2FMdaYitw0hSmqxejCc_46MpxoUQq63-4-xzQwivy_94Ny_HYEhuQVGhmpfde5XP4OfRKHZBWeEvWy88fGS3JaudlRJxCKrh6Zly0zeoa6VN5uoVYgUf2wgGm5pkYg%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c04f3ee5db6645298a3a8e29f2f738b5&_e=JNMpcy0zIZro3JVupGYy8BxsZtn5pU4J98jLspM9Xzp8mddthuKlvx3I35Mr9gNvZ7mOFtSg9XG7ad_TSCdCxMDsg-ywFKPEu27yNI8XSk75AjeQ53DR4ZW9J4Zxal3ErbmbDReqDMQ6NaEGK5x0H00UslSf5rptKsFhEn0ULRKlIeiO2Om1DnGFOeyNH7iIdU8t4JK4RMtbbGL_AtE1jnwQKKsjvqyPBx7_k_lU3cx5wwrv0bqtjOxToQlcvgUgxDGEH4iPYAlhNMr9Np6NmA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. body:

|
Greetings!
Thank you for making a donation to my re-election campaign. I can't thank you enough. It's generous donations like yours that help me continue to fight for you in the Virginia Senate.
The Republican Primary is less than 2 1/2 months away and thanks to your help we are closer to our goal of fully funding my campaign.
We have our biggest campaign expenditures in the next couple of weeks to let voters know about the Republican Primary which will be held on Tuesday, June 20.
Our NEXT BIG fundraising deadline is Thursday, June 8 at midnight, and I will need YOUR help again.
We will be releasing our FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL reporting number on April 17 and thanks to your help we will be able to fund my re-election campaign.
For God and Virginia,
---
---
| Senator Amanda Chase has represented Virginia's 11th Senatorial District , which is made up of Amelia County, Colonial Heights, and parts of Chesterfield County, since 2016. After redistricting, she is running in Virginia's 12 Senatorial District continuing to represent most of Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. Senator Chase is the only incumbent Senator running in Senatorial District 12.

name: Defend Texas Fund
subject: Lone Star State Preservation
body:
| | | | In Texas, we don't depend on the help of the coastal elite...
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507756:Jfzjj_GqN:m:1:3365131770:4EC952BA5254AAB07770554F9D5844AC:r)
---
Peter,

The coastal elites in D.C., New York, and California think they run this country.

But while they're busy bickering back and forth, going to fancy dinners, and running this country into the ground, us Texans are the ones keeping the lights on.
---
* **We 're #1 in livestock production:** Texas leads the nation in revenue from beef sales and produces roughly 20% of the nation's cattle.

* **We 're #1 in cotton production:** Texas generates 29% of the nation's cotton revenue.

* **And we 're #1 in oil and natural gas:** Texas is responsible for 1/5 of the country's oil production and 1/3 of the natural gas supply of the U.S.

---
We're doing just fine for ourselves - but since the coastal elite have destroyed their own states, they're fleeing to Texas to reap the rewards we've worked so hard for.

__And the worst part is, they 're going to bring their failed ____**woke**__ __ideas and__ __**socialist**__ __policies with them.__

It's up to YOU to step up, protect and defend the Lone Star State from these out of state liberals.

subject: Concerning 2024

body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House -

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we’re running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wqhUcQE%2bwUdPIzV8Tf66LQ&sysid=1 "Will you accept my
invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we’re going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we’re going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oCD2upaMnZ2EV%2bvavgGaJw&sysid=1)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It’s the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you’re with me. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yPdbfGphq6%2bMn904%2fozfJA&sysid=1 "Confirm you’re with me,

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

name: Civil Rights Warrior
subject: Equal Justice for All, Not Just the Bidens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ronda Kennedy for Senate**
body:
What we see happening to Donald Trump is a travesty.

Peter: What we see happening to Donald Trump is a travesty. It's insanity! **And it 's a reminder that our nation's Justice Department and Federal Courts are being filled by Joe Biden whose appointees will turn a blind eye to the rogue, woke prosecutors that use our legal system to fulfill political vendettas.** More importantly, it's a driving force for why conservatives need to take back the U.S. Senate so we appoint strict constitutionalists to the bench and as U.S. Attorneys who will reverse Biden's criminal fist agenda that favors violent criminals over law-abiding citizens. As a civil rights lawyer who has beaten back government overreach time and again, I am asking for your help to send me to the U.S. Seante. **[Will you donate $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and send this Civil Rights Warrior to the U.S. Senate so I can stand up to Biden's Abuse of our Judicial system?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507523:6uslj_GxN:m:1:3331421248:E7BE17F36A85EB8171F4078C9AB54C28:r "Will you donate $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and send this Civil Rights
Warrior to the U.S. Senate so I can stand up to Biden’s Abuse of our Judicial system?")** It's not enough to just say we're living in dangerous and unprecedented times. It's not enough to just say that it's disgusting and unacceptable. We need to act now. I have six children who are counting on me to provide them with a safe and free country but that won't happen when our elected leaders are more concerned with power than adhering to the principles of our Founding Fathers. As the great, great granddaughter of a runaway slave, I embrace the American Dream which includes a justice system for the people, not the just the elites like the Bidens and their allies. **[Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 and let's make sure Americans get the justice they deserve by holding the Biden Crime Family accountable!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507523:6uslj_GxN:m:1:3331421248:E7BE17F36A85EB8171F4078C9AB54C28:r "Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 and let’s make sure Americans
get the justice they deserve by holding the Biden Crime Family accountable!")** We owe it to ourselves and our children to keep our nation free and our justice system above reproach, but that won't happen until we clean house in Washington. We've seen how the radical left will use a public health emergency to control us. We've seen how the radical left will use school shootings to ban guns. We've seen how the radical left ignores violent criminals but punishes political opponents. That's why I need your help to win my Senate race so we can insure that "Equal Justice for All" includes the prosecution of every member of the Biden family who took money from our foreign adversaries at the expense of America's safety. The rule of law must apply to all, not just those who oppose Biden's tyranny. **[Help me win my race and together we will take back the U.S. Senate and the U.S. Judicial System!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507523:6uslj_GxN:m:1:3331421248:E7BE17F36A85EB8171F4078C9AB54C28:r "Help me win my race and together we will take back the U.S. Senate
and the U.S. Judicial System!")** For a Better Tomorrow, Ronda Kennedy
Republican for Senate
---
| **Paid for by Ronda Kennedy for Senate**
---

Peter, The Chinese Communist Party _continually_ mocks American sovereignty and threatens our way of life. **Simply put,_we need to defend American sovereignty.[Do you agree?](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=731a15ea7d37aba6f2d2c4b677782b138fd37ea4953be22bf6d2c53ba07cc68de8852688823628e6a95fcd68833fcd81f98dde172bc48ddc "Do you agree?")_**

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3bba9941bc4147fbb0cdb03b4e90db06&_e=KYnvvVwUeJR4NFl36Np0oa4hWHmior6bIL3ubl-0CuituOj1qaVyBqJIBJIK0MTsD2WDMHL8-O-hXHDakBHpKYCJLHX0Rywf6k-AKyG4Mw_RVXEigd8fhuRElaMZFcFuVMZep5yu-j0YMYAqzYLOUXwWstmAZZZWl8KWd8sU7eaVh6CMEGg8p5SUjFMs0S1bM5kW2K1j3P7CWmePtR6DZgMHo2K402tGNOsMhSmePd4itk6_DghxdDuEY2KzOVwO9ffKOOT4NdO4SDrrp4bpEA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3bba9941bc4147fbb0cdb03b4e90db06&_e=KYnvvVwUeJR4NFl36Np0oa4hWHmior6bIL3ubl-0CuituOj1qaVyBqJIBJIK0MTsD2WDMHL8-O-hXHDakBHpKYCJLHX0Rywf6k-AKyG4Mw_RVXEigd8fhuRElaMZFcFuaKtL60wV7hkee3UjNfmNI2RzlKo6PhooWgXsCJUvXqlBG00TlIQGhrhBRfkyd0q7Gw5zVqX8G_s6nUmvbiYShCDupRvf3rF1cpVFY1PDjdzGuvsIBcZpBUfzRd0mQuOgvIVP_GMtw1dV_wRkQfktgw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3bba9941bc4147fbb0cdb03b4e90db06&_e=KYnvvVwUeJR4NFl36Np0oa4hWHmior6bIL3ubl-0CuituOj1qaVyBqJIBJIK0MTsD2WDMHL8-O-hXHDakBHpKYCJLHX0Rywf6k-AKyG4Mw_RVXEigd8fhuRElaMZFcFuuVn9yzZ3gTwA_Fsw_m08zfZhsu5bI5ElgBtZoclkGbrSTjbuWR1KGoBLD3yx4v0md69d2fV4fJdh9UPR-m4YYgpGJcYmEs-DcB73xFwve6TujNSYFpPtL9sky-0ht_2lxaQtEpDKBcwpjj44PLT3EA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: BREAKING: Rudy Giuliani To Join Pastor's For Trump National Prayer Call On Monday
body:
America's Mayor, Rudy Giuliani, will be joining Pastor's For Trump on Monday, April 3 at 6:30pm CT for another National Prayer Call live from Tulsa, O
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11490.1.43a0dc5d38abc7544effb68fe582f3fc)
---
America's Mayor, **Rudy Giuliani** , will be joining [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11491.1.f88c37b6a61a6d18127bc33e842fd24b) on Monday, April 3 at 6:30pm CT for another **National Prayer Call** live from Tulsa, OK (_along with other surprise guests..._)!
Our last National Prayer Call had over 115,000 people watching live while **President Donald Trump** joined us along with **General Michael Flynn** and **Roger Stone**.
This upcoming prayer call is our **National IMPORTANCE** due to the fact that **President Trump** has been indicted by a Grand Jury in NY.
Please plan to join us to pray for our Nation and President Trump on Monday at 6:30pm CT.
If you live in the Tulsa area you are welcome to join us at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11492.1.9d3cc7a3f2c68788b9f28419eba452b9) where the broadcast will take place (doors will open at 6pm CT).
**Date** : Monday, April 3
**Time** : 6:30pm CT
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11493.1.233c954c0c2207bc5b4fa9e1466cadb7) 4121 S Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK
**Online** : [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11494.1.9ed835cc6deed0cf8ef35a42efa545c0) as well as [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11495.1.f3a6b052efcd4cda5b14d2772cbba38d), [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11496.1.6739bf02795d0e7ada5c402d110f7362), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11497.1.a47bb119e600995c72e4f5fece3649fe) & [Rumble](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11498.1.69fd0c84dd92f0cc49e15617ee8d07d9).
Here is how you can help:
1\. Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11499.1.e9ea5f87dfcde738b6dd9926be31ea53) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11500.1.4411a7dd45a1af80b0e759cd710da05d)
2\. Invite your others to join you for Monday's National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11501.1.3ee9b709225967de7b6dec8c2f6f6bc4).
3\. Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11502.1.409e7ce9228879b3fa911eef1e5a76f8)
1. | Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11503.1.f53da83aabd25aad43680058d3786be3) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11504.1.0ccc8b1a2601d023a62df309b2f9cc47)
---|---
2. | Invite your others to join you for Monday's National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11505.1.ba4195cd9bfa9cca100f0d7e1945d4fb).
---|---
3. | Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11506.1.2743e0fa7fc88a7ae7ce27f382552053)
---|---
God Bless America
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11507.1.0db0d4f7965b68d9c5a22a064a0aaa6e), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11508.1.074bff93e6d81781f9e1540ea8d5472e), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11509.1.507f60bcf264412b62fcfe9c917d1aa9), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11510.1.ef57b6300e970651771efd22862126ed), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11511.1.56a8dd9663e67116bd491e1884398b21), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11512.1.9a7db58664377c5d7960d59789ee6b0e)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11513.1.7af430bc0a6d2023e26ddad4a3f573f2)
## Message From President Trump
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11514.1.20da1d945d9f1e4bc0535b9f5d473ad1)
---
**President Trump** issued his statement regarding our National Prayer Call on Monday night through his Truth Social account. The Fake News media called it "_horrible_ " but **President Trump** labeled it an "_honor_." **We had over 3,000 Pastors and 115,000 people live with us on the stream with just ONE days' notice.** We are preparing for the next one and _you will definitely want to be a part of it..._ You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11515.1.947261529846037293cd6bd0ba1b21d1)! **President Trump** also shared on Truth Social my Tweet about how impressive it was for him to request pray for our country instead of himself.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11516.1.da5dfe4b8ed7b77183415ff1ba6ef65f)
---
If you would like to hear me explain what happened on the call when _leftist trolls_ invaded our online backstage you can listen to my interview with **OAN's Dan Ball** here: [https://www.oann.com/video/real-america-video/pastors-4-trump-host-nationwide-prayer/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11517.1.fad5b07e812519f82fe3d660680e11cf)
Please continue to pray for President Trump!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11518.1.d51f72d0acaa2b27dcd9c149c2544a43), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11519.1.029aa52b2d465aec80537de0d215fda5), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11520.1.92fbf227aff6a009621d320fd26a389c), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11521.1.e3a30f6ae520dabad89dd747db1bf999), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11522.1.4858d0b2c43cf7500337fbe2c37dad6c), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11523.1.35f8869d5cac84bb79aef94deaac214d)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11524.1.00fd6f2af5e7f30d973263e7c654b00b)
| | [ Pastors For Trump ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20023882.11525.1.0510f23b9a5a94031199f7114810e81f)
---
---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter.
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4df5444157c6458db2308becb48d2196&_e=M7a0mkyxzFZQLG3q6Ek49KJFx8OxBElF6ZZ7vyUfQeLRD0mMT3kPHPkg5UQiY07m1CXDgM2wPBtxYD6FdnC3wYoV6YT_E0ydvdZ7kfWk9pWtp-SV2GnKvkyOPzhWwnwc3UR1u84DKPiv06a86X4eF0ndDuPtqh8BQpk9_yEdcngXiwajsI26JS6l5PIuR_nweAaU6IZ0byAn3nfei_42XGA0QQw-QWSgqQcaO4gsEyLSN8l1ejxRwAld_8P2M4is3iiybqIFwzKK5_WGCdPK9KQpe-wXikVw7LnzpucKJUN4wPvY-bucWPj9jHEzM8L9Rol6taYIpSu-APihpaL3j-WW5C8x2QYZY1CbjEqpILtX5M0tBOpsvp8f9IghSY4P1VCXbqJC0Zl6WMET9aVX1A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4df5444157c6458db2308becb48d2196&_e=M7a0mkyxzFZQLG3q6Ek49KJFx8OxBElF6ZZ7vyUfQeLRD0mMT3kPHPkg5UQiY07m1CXDgM2wPBtxYD6FdnC3wYoV6YT_E0ydvdZ7kfWk9pWtp-SV2GnKvkyOPzhWwnwc3UR1u84DKPiv06a86X4eF0ndDuPtqh8BQpk9_yEdcngXiwajsI26JS6l5PIuR_nweAaU6IZ0byAn3nfei_42XGA0QQw-QWSgqQcaO4gsEyLSN8l1ejxRwAld_8P2M4ishH4KpfTljppXd6Usy41EzIWzyCmUiWXCL4Hk60w0h03oeNjncwCgZ6vAnU7TfO_TKIlR8iWa8B00wxseUPhLpTWYaREGt3Bcm0w4iNeD0u-IwRFOSUefgxgCpDnfKV377aBNZ8EoyRc78PR-BPIIzA%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4df5444157c6458db2308becb48d2196&_e=M7a0mkyxzFZQLG3q6Ek49KJFx8OxBElF6ZZ7vyUfQeLRD0mMT3kPHPkg5UQiY07m1CXDgM2wPBtxYD6FdnC3wYoV6YT_E0ydvdZ7kfWk9pWtp-SV2GnKvkyOPzhWwnwc3UR1u84DKPiv06a86X4eF0ndDuPtqh8BQpk9_yEdcngXiwajsI26JS6l5PIuR_nweAaU6IZ0byAn3nfei_42XGA0QQw-QWSgqQcaO4gsEyLSN8l1ejxRwAld_8P2M4isTDTPV-7GAche_d8oYFesjUJpQxGpyyQO9lKGpF8G9L0o59IIzX4y82mUZUw9jNSuWw36oWFEABA3AYkR7RCxlJOhcA-iUuyPm14RlqgtPkq5X_FZz9TOxPj6ER3yOis7UqFWqzj_p8-DfsI-8a2Tyg%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today

name: Tim Scott
subject: If you only open one email today, I pray it’s this one
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | | | | [<HUGE ANNOUNCEMENT>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62506886:JyrXN_GNo:m:1:3365131770:E5D8528F5E64EE93FC10C9958460C688:r "Generic Button")
---
It's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I've always been able to count on you in the past, so please don't let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62506886:JyrXN_GNo:m:1:3365131770:E5D8528F5E64EE93FC10C9958460C688:r "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62506887:JyrXN_GNo:m:1:3365131770:E5D8528F5E64EE93FC10C9958460C688:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62506887:JyrXN_GNo:m:1:3365131770:E5D8528F5E64EE93FC10C9958460C688:r "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62506887:JyrXN_GNo:m:1:3365131770:E5D8528F5E64EE93FC10C9958460C688:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts [CLICK TO LISTEN]
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508100:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)

Peter,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508100:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508100:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508100:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)
**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508101:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508105:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508106:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508107:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508100:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**I'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating any amount today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508100:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508100:6skNQ_GNL:m:1:3331421248:BD815F2FC456819516AE90FB6396DD71:r)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

Please read this, friend: **We fell $2,119 short of last night's critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal, so I'm urgently asking for your help to make up this shortfall by midnight tonight. Here's why this is so important:**
* Democrats are clinging to a razor-thin Senate majority, and experts at The Washington Post say that the GOP has a "clear path" to delivering control back to Mitch McConnell.

* After Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they’re targeting me as a vulnerable seat in their efforts to flip the Senate next.

* And while Mitch McConnell and his special-interest allies gear up to spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs.

**That's why this is a goal we cannot afford to miss. name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump [PRESS PLAY]
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508216:JYt8s_GTN:m:1:3391001263:1CC14E4CA463D91F72F868AFFDD7AF83:r)

Peter,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508216:JYt8s_GTN:m:1:3391001263:1CC14E4CA463D91F72F868AFFDD7AF83:r)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508216:JYt8s_GTN:m:1:3391001263:1CC14E4CA463D91F72F868AFFDD7AF83:r)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

subject: So many Republican MVPs have tried to reach you [WATCH VIDEO NOW]

body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507770:61Kys_GON:m:1:3365131770:A96EBA3E4F292303A7EB4849F1D59128:r)

[OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM THE NRSC AND KARL ROVE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507770:61Kys_GON:m:1:3365131770:A96EBA3E4F292303A7EB4849F1D59128:r)

_**************[**VIEW NOW >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507770:61Kys_GON:m:1:3365131770:A96EBA3E4F292303A7EB4849F1D59128:r)**************_

Peter,

We hate to be **critical,** but this is too important.

Multiple influential Republicans have reached out because they know how important you are to our Party and mission to flip the Senate, but they haven't heard back.

NOW, Republican legend Karl Rove went one step further: _**he made this special message about WINNING back the Majority and wants YOU to see it. **_
**************[**< < WATCH NOW >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507770:61Kys_GON:m:1:3365131770:A96EBA3E4F292303A7EB4849F1D59128:r)**************
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507770:61Kys_GON:m:1:3365131770:A96EBA3E4F292303A7EB4849F1D59128:r)
Our records indicate you haven't opened our message. We know things come up, but the fate of our country is at stake in 2024. That's why we NEED dedicated Republicans like you engaged.

**[Please view Karl Rove's message about Senate Republicans flipping the Senate RIGHT NOW. >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507770:61Kys_GON:m:1:3365131770:A96EBA3E4F292303A7EB4849F1D59128:r)**
**
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507770:61Kys_GON:m:1:3365131770:A96EBA3E4F292303A7EB4849F1D59128:r)
Democrats want Republicans to believe we have no chance to win. That's why you HAVE to watch Karl Rove's message about the 2024 election. You are the key to our success, and the Democrats know it.

_Can we count on you to put Republicans back in the majority? _

**[Watch Karl Rove's 2024 election RIGHT NOW to help Republicans FLIP the Senate and cement a HISTORIC majority.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507770:61Kys_GON:m:1:3365131770:A96EBA3E4F292303A7EB4849F1D59128:r)

Thank you,

Senate GOP

**

body:
| | | | See for yourself: China is buying up Texas...
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508149:JmJHs_GcN:m:1:3331421248:972CD7EF9FD3915C9AE34A4407B48675:r)
---
Peter, We wanted to be sure you saw this jaw-dropping map.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508149:JmJHs_GcN:m:1:3331421248:972CD7EF9FD3915C9AE34A4407B48675:r)
---
The vast majority of that "foreign-held" land is held by China.

_The fact that the CHINESE COMMUNIST PARTY owns this much land in Texas - let alone in America - is sickening._

Communism has no place in the freedom-loving, gun-toting, God-fearing state of Texas - and it's up to Texans like you, to send the CCP packing.

[_**Please make a contribution to DEFEND TEXAS LAND from the Chinese Communist Party.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508149:JmJHs_GcN:m:1:3331421248:972CD7EF9FD3915C9AE34A4407B48675:r)

When we talk about the Chinese buying up all our land, we aren't talking about some nice families buying a home and trying to start a new life.

_We 're talking about Chinese owned billionaires buying as much as 140,000 acres at a time, planning massive wind farms that would obstruct the training air space of the U.S. military, and feed into our Texas electrical grid._

We think we speak for all Texans when we say that the last thing we want is Chinese interference with our military or electrical grid.

This is serious stuff - and it often goes unreported.

But we simply can't let this kind of stuff fly under the radar. We must get the word out and we must stop the Chinese from infiltrating the Lone Star State.

[_**So please, make a contribution to DEFEND TEXAS LAND from the Chinese Communist Party.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508149:JmJHs_GcN:m:1:3331421248:972CD7EF9FD3915C9AE34A4407B48675:r)

Thank you,
Defend Texas Fund

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Why is patriotism in decline? - update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132948?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**American patriotism is in decline, according to a recent poll published by the Wall Street Journal.** The WSJ-NORC poll makes grim reading. It shows a steep decline in the number of Americans who say that patriotism is very important to them, down from 70 percent in 1998 to 38 percent today.

There has also been a similar slide in the percentage of Americans who say that religion is very important to them. **Perhaps most disturbing of all, only 23 percent of American adults under the age of 30 regard having children as very important.**

These poll findings suggest the sort of collapse in self confidence that you might expect to find in a country that had suffered defeat in war, or after a cataclysmic economic crisis. **Why this loss of self-belief? **
---
|
---
| What explains this massive change in American attitudes towards their own country in the past twenty five years? And what can we do about it?

**America was founded on the principle that every American is created equal, and that each individual is in possession of inalienable rights.** Of course, there were times when America failed to live up to those lofty ideals, but for the first two centuries of the Republic’s existence, these principles were the essential ingredient of American cohesion.

Thanks to these Founding principles, folk from different ancestral backgrounds in England, Poland or Italy, eastern Europe, west Africa or south Asia, could all come together and see one another as fellow citizens of the same Republic.

About thirty years ago, things started to change.

**Rather than being taught to see themselves as individual citizens, young Americans were increasingly encouraged by left wing educators to define themselves in terms of their racial background, or gender or various other immutable characteristics.** Many young Americans are invited to see their primary loyalty not to fellow citizens of the Republic, but to whichever oppressed group it is that they supposedly belong to, in a hierarchy of victimhood.

**The consequences of seeing the world this way can be murderous, literally.**

For much of the twentieth century, Americans were taught to believe that through hard work and perseverance they could achieve anything. Today, many young Americans are invited to believe that nothing they do matters much, since it is ‘the system’ that either privileges them or stacks the odds hopelessly against them. Is it any wonder that the same poll showed a sharp decline in the percentage of young Americans who believe in the importance of hard work?

**Unequal outcomes between Americans are increasingly attributed to ‘systemic’ discrimination, rather than being seen as reflective of differences in individual behavior. **As a result, in the name of ‘equity’, we have started to see a return of government-sponsored discrimination, further undermining America’s Founding ideals.

If you spend three decades trying to make Americans believe that their country is, as CNN might put it, a Republic founded by slave-owners on stolen land, it is hardly surprising that patriotism then declines.

**If you tell a generation of young Americans that human civilization has messed up the planet and that looming eco-catastrophe means we are all doomed, you should not be surprised that they are less keen on having kids than their grandparents.**

**This new poll shows that bad ideas have bad consequences. **Combating bad ideas, and countering them with good ideas is what we at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy do. **Here is how we are helping lead the fight back.**

Last year we led the campaign for a law to combat Critical Race theory in our state. It was a good start, but it is not enough. Legislation alone will not stop ‘woke’ ideologues pushing their views on kids. We need to inspire the next generation of American leaders to fight back.

**This is why we launched the Mississippi Leadership Academy last year. **Two dozen future Mississippi leaders took part in the six month program, one day a month. They heard from leading conservative historians, academics and authors. They were given an introduction to the morality of the free market and America’s Founding ideals. They listened to talks by some of our state leaders, including Attorney General Lynn Fitch and State Auditor, Shad White.

The program was so successful in energizing a cohort of young Mississippians, we will be expanding the program next year.

**If we are going to root out left-wing ideology from the classroom, American needs an education revolution.** In half a dozen states, including Texas, Florida and Arkansas, moms and dads now have control over their child’s share to education tax dollars. They can allocate their child’s portion of the budget (often around $10,000-15,000 a year) to a school of their choice – public, private or home-school.

**The moment mom and dad have more control, guess what happens? Money gets spent in the classroom, not on an army of ‘woke’ education administrators.** Schools stop promoting left-wing ideology, and start teaching kids the way they should.

**Sadly, in Mississippi too many self-styled ‘conservative’ lawmakers continue have intentionally done everything they can to prevent education freedom.** Every time a supposedly ‘conservative’ lawmaker thwarts school choice, they are helping sustain radical leftist ideas in the classroom. This needs to change.

**Two years ago, shortly after I had arrived in America, I went to watch my first ever game of football.** It was at a local high school on a Friday night, and I did not even know the rules of the game.

Just before the start, the crowd rose to their feet to sing the Star Spangled Banner and declare the Pledge of Allegiance. So new was I to your country, I did not know the words back then.

**But I did know I was witnessing something special; a display of authentic, uncomplicated patriotism.** I was so moved that the hairs on the back of my neck stood on end. Please don’t ever abandon that belief in your own country, as other less happy lands have done. American exceptionalism is worth fighting for.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1172ca18f4&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---

| | Peter,

April Fools Day is a day filled with tricks and deception – but that’s every day for the GOP. Just look at the Republican response when President Biden called them out for wanting to gut Social Security and Medicare: they lied to our faces and claimed they never wanted to do it – _**even though we have them on tape.**_

**The GOP is up to their ears in lies.** Extremist MAGA Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene gain power by spreading baseless conspiracy theories like denying the 2020 election and casting doubt on the effectiveness of COVID vaccines.

And to make matters worse, Marjorie Taylor Greene has risen to the top of the GOP – she’s even being considered as _**a potential VP pick for Donald Trump!**_

Here’s yet another lie that the GOP likes to tell: that grassroots Democrats like us are powerless to stop them. And yet again, they’re dead wrong.

clean_body: | | | Peter, April Fools Day is a day filled with tricks and deception – but that’s every day for the GOP. Just look at the Republican response when President Biden called them out for wanting to gut Social Security and Medicare: they lied to our faces and claimed they never wanted to do it – even though we have them on tape. The GOP is up to their ears in lies. Extremist MAGA Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene gain power by spreading baseless conspiracy theories like denying the 2020 election and casting doubt on the effectiveness of COVID vaccines. And to make matters worse, Marjorie Taylor Greene has risen to the top of the GOP – she’s even being considered as a potential VP pick for Donald Trump! Here’s yet another lie that the GOP likes to tell: that grassroots Democrats like us are powerless to stop them. This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

name: Candace Owens
subject: A bigger plague than COVID
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20207d2231264f76b63bfaef38709445&_e=nYyAg62UgJJZoTd7WMWOgjdtVe5hIr-aD7yID39h_4DyqDNjlyqv6npyJO2wiQAqyiuf4giwG_VauhX8B88hKMgHiIzBQ4hVMPtjJDLC9kQSqcIPZVY2fQh_sJ7zyPT-lp7C2BqAHLLGItifwhckKP23DzX-yL3R4gw1qumMWD492iA6MeIxk5_JREPs3ChWjDq0bResn92b4S0HXZ1v8umQfRn0-LukgaKLZ-Mgidl5VA4wMcYMzr9L3lPH8p9D3QvEe8ITHFBYKh20f4VZqvGvaOyRRknOC0ZaEsKh3b4%3D)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20207d2231264f76b63bfaef38709445&_e=nYyAg62UgJJZoTd7WMWOgjdtVe5hIr-aD7yID39h_4DyqDNjlyqv6npyJO2wiQAqyiuf4giwG_VauhX8B88hKMgHiIzBQ4hVMPtjJDLC9kQSqcIPZVY2fQh_sJ7zyPT-lp7C2BqAHLLGItifwhckKLxF33e_ztFa3JLojt6sfuZQsRomCG0oGAjgyv_19gMHbA72ATHCzuQiJrnarxruwbJMHPHZ0nln3JHxS2hN5kdID_BzrPlNXvqS_IqGoBJKsTQ22H_kTymAtKr1VKc91XBHrKJy8aNeTzxFYnlUT9s%3D)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20207d2231264f76b63bfaef38709445&_e=nYyAg62UgJJZoTd7WMWOgjdtVe5hIr-aD7yID39h_4DyqDNjlyqv6npyJO2wiQAqyiuf4giwG_VauhX8B88hKMgHiIzBQ4hVMPtjJDLC9kQSqcIPZVY2fQh_sJ7zyPT-lp7C2BqAHLLGItifwhckKNCjsek_LasKgo-5kErNxx3eSC8CZ_Y3-ZjrW0zQ8P83WiOSOVWD67fuw5ZzaoUR81cznnvxX6Cmf8KZsp_TZVA2blWSOJLYlKktVv79keVZjQ84EyQ5npSgx4q2EJMmVlOkD1bIjccRH4sbL5LW_4M%3D)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20207d2231264f76b63bfaef38709445&_e=nYyAg62UgJJZoTd7WMWOgjdtVe5hIr-aD7yID39h_4DyqDNjlyqv6npyJO2wiQAqyiuf4giwG_VauhX8B88hKMgHiIzBQ4hVMPtjJDLC9kQSqcIPZVY2fQh_sJ7zyPT-O-6qOqXdnIAjDQgdL4JIk62O8SXqEwtEBAGIOJgF7sfH5LzhmW9iUI1vQQXxuvuFqlSTUTC7BgSZD6CEMf3HN0iU1SMBmmI3FKr4UG9LgrjYt9zIasZD_bIUqQzTl1J1Cz0syOLJcgkiRPTSg9iJjtKJxUJojGQy-jrgW5BwMo0%3D)

clean_body: There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. Friend, There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare. My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities. I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. It taught me never to be a victim again. My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media. As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. Then one night, the KKK showed up. My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds. But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. " My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back! I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me. I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same. Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities: We put together BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back. This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation. In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities. Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events. We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality. Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. | Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: BREAKING: FBI put spy inside disabled Marine’slegal defense team
body:
One of the witnesses for Zach’s defense is an FBI snitch -- a Confidential Human Source (CHS) who’s been spying on Zach and Zach’s lawyer since April, 2021 and informing the FBI and DOJ on how Zach was going to defend himself in court.

One of the witnesses for Zach’s defense is an FBI snitch -- a Confidential Human Source (CHS) who’s been spying on Zach and Zach’s lawyer since April, 2021 and informing the FBI and DOJ on how Zach was going to defend himself in court. | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgd13ufte12hc6hvputa08ntmvi92odb6cempmb0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cphm1ob4cdh2bs)

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdntruqloknfvkr5fuir65hvfpmd6cbq58a5v7q0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cphm1ob4cdh2bs)Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0v5is13fg47jsn10827uuh00qshm8jorg3evh10_rp22sh2s8i66o70cphm1ob4cdh2bs)

Late last year, I wrote you about January 6 peaceful protester and disabled Marine Zach Rehl.

(I’ve included that urgent email below this one, because it has vital information about Zach, his family, and his case.)

I’m writing you about Zach right now, because shocking information just came out in court on March 22:

**One of the witnesses for Zach’s defense is an FBI snitch -- a Confidential Human Source (CHS) who’s been spying on Zach and Zach’s lawyer since April, 2021 and informing the FBI and DOJ on how Zach was going to defend himself in court.**

Joe Biden’s criminally rotten Department of Justice kept this a secret until March 22.

Investigative reporter Julie Kelly broke this critically important story.

**Zach’s attorney has filed a motion to compel the FBI to reveal ALL information they have from their snitch, and from any other snitches that may still be spying on Zach and his lawyer.**

Here’s a direct quote from that legal motion:

“During this period of time, the CHS has been in contact via telephone, text messaging, and other electronic means, with one or more of the counsel for the defense and at least one defendant.

During this time, the CHS also participated in prayer meetings with members of one or more of the defendants’ families.

The CHS also engaged in discussions with one of the defendant’s family members about replacing one of the defense counsel.”

I couldn’t be more disgusted with my former alma mater, the Department of Justice.

**It’s clear that Joe Biden’s lawless “Gestapo” of a DOJ and “Waffen SS” attack dog FBI won’t let the Constitution or the rule of law stand in their way as they use the federal courts in Washington, D.C. to prosecute and persecute the January 6 peaceful protesters.**

And if they get away with it, they will come for you, me, our families, and other patriotic Americans, too!

**But there’s something you can do about it.**

As you know, I’m fighting back peacefully and legally for the January 6 patriots.

I’ve filed lawsuits against Attorney General Merrick Garland and FBI Director Christopher Wray, both criminals of our corrupt government justice system.

And I’m taking other hard-hitting legal actions to protect our fellow Americans and other endangered rights and liberties.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me fully fund these critical fights with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more immediately.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zotvvgpg26j59do47gvo0p5l4pojdm38dfj9qv58_rp22sh2s8i66o70cphm1ob4cdh2bs)

**Very few lawyers are fighting for January 6 peaceful protesters. Some of them have even folded under the intense pressure, and pushed their clients to plead guilty to crimes they didn’t commit.**

But I will FIGHT BACK peacefully and legally, with your vital support.

[**I beg you to help me defend these abused Americans with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zundnjn98uvdti9lq1ejpn2k6afagkvc1i64u360_rp22sh2s8i66o70cphm1ob4cdh2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI planted a snitch inside the legal defense team of disabled Marine Zach Rehl. His right to a solid defense is now in danger.**

[**Please help me fight back peacefully and legally for all January 6 peaceful protesters with your best gift of at least a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6stb4ggue0ufb8odpaeutd4ncgm0d0tc13gfdog_rp22sh2s8i66o70cphm1ob4cdh2bs)

**My previous urgent email about Zach from last October:**

Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.**

Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, for pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen** .

But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s corrupt and criminal Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.

**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!**

As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters.

No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.**

If the FBI can push around a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

**“They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”**

That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdcrtsuvmkrl0lq726dkjq1ncaer0imua7sn3cb0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cphm1ob4cdh2bs)

I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

Patriot,
The Failing New York Times has released rumored details of my coming **ARREST :**
_“He will be fingerprinted._
_He will be photographed._ _He may even be handcuffed._ _The former president is expected to walk through the routine steps of felony arrest processing in New York.”_
_**I am not afraid of what’s to come.**_

**Headlines like these are unsettling, team. But we’re not powerless. Our whole team is working overtime to react to the NC Supreme Court’s rehearing of _Harper v. Hall_ , the case that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state Senate map just last year.** Extreme conservatives are ready to rip up North Carolina's protections against map manipulation and believe they have an ally in the new majority on the state Supreme Court. This is a decision that we’ll be feeling for years. We must be prepared to protect fair maps, no matter how the North Carolina Supreme Court rules.

clean_body: We’re not powerless. | = Headlines like these are unsettling, team. But we’re not powerless. Our whole team is working overtime to react to the NC Supreme Court’s rehearing of Harper v. Hall , the case that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state Senate map just last year. Extreme conservatives are ready to rip up North Carolina's protections against map manipulation and believe they have an ally in the new majority on the state Supreme Court. This is a decision that we’ll be feeling for years. We must be prepared to protect fair maps, no matter how the North Carolina Supreme Court rules. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = All On The Line is working to restore justice to American democracy. We built a grassroots movement for fair maps and helped thousands of folks engage in their state’s redistricting process. Now we must mobilize across the nation to combat a wide range of gerrymandering threats such as this one in North Carolina. And we need support from folks like you. = \-- Brianna Shamsuddoha Interim Mobilization Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. I wanted to share some numbers with you

I wanted to share some numbers with you
| |
