Friend,

You may not know this about me, but I'm an accountant.

I started doing the books at my mom's store when I was just 13. Later, I graduated from Clemson with an accounting degree, gained experience in the corporate world, then made my way back to my family's business.

I know a thing or two about numbers, but it doesn't take having an accounting degree to recognize the _**GRIM REALITY**_ that Republicans are facing heading into the 2024 election cycle. |
**Here are two noteworthy shifts we are seeing:**
1. **CONSERVATIVE DONOR ENGAGEMENT IS DECLINING.**

__**Republicans are being outraised by a growing margin.**__ While Democrats grow their donor base exponentially each year, the number of grassroots conservatives who donated during the midterms actually DECLINED for the first time in years.

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=569e3ce68dbd4309ad3cd83f4cdc74ce&_e=jr3ClQa75QWPIOKh6m1zmfU5rfbZGG8K6CrA3NZ7w5GTDNKHsU91CHiLPcsuJh2qD76AnyW3q25tx06p-W5MNoa8a64xHrkcsRgn7-gjSYUdjIYVcKWlXWHY45NW2wVRP1Kez9UHcJshIRRzCn-UkWgk-lQAA6FwxGOsy3MWVPaKECfwLt65s1YLvpeS97Tctj2aN5EEgvktNt4hZ4EzUn9B1Kd0_4mHDmeIU4UiCOTl5x1LRE9ipPIYjVVc1g-wTKohaZC5IySJ1-lOpfthW4bN24nLD7lPFZ_XVoKqGqY0LnjVMCJo1O_Bk49OQVFkX2g3xTCTongEufcMs0NKcVkicdk_0qEgdHqfy9VR6B8%3D)
---

**2\. DONATION LIMITS ARE INCREASING (I did the math, so you don 't have to).**
The previous limit for an individual was $2,900 per candidate per election. In 2023, the limit was increased to $3,300. _That 's a nearly 14% INCREASE when Democrats already have a head start and more donors funding their campaign war chests._

---
If we keep falling behind as the contribution limit increases, Democrats' advantage will only grow which will have a DETRIMENTAL impact on our ability to compete in the future. The fundraising gap will grow larger and the Democrats' lead will become INSURMOUNTABLE.

Republicans have a choice: We can let these challenges scare us away or we can FIRE UP OUR BASE. **[It will take EVERY single grassroots conservative who reads this to step up and fight back against the well-funded Left. Will you step up, Friend?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=569e3ce68dbd4309ad3cd83f4cdc74ce&_e=jr3ClQa75QWPIOKh6m1zmfU5rfbZGG8K6CrA3NZ7w5GTDNKHsU91CHiLPcsuJh2qD76AnyW3q25tx06p-W5MNoa8a64xHrkcsRgn7-gjSYUdjIYVcKWlXWHY45NW2wVRP1Kez9UHcJshIRRzCn-UkWgk-lQAA6FwxGOsy3MWVPaKECfwLt65s1YLvpeS97Tctj2aN5EEgvktNt4hZ4EzUlNbQZGKaPhJT4_LMzq7wDzaSTM0al4k6f17KfmXi8TqunMLRJj4UXxutWnvlyvOpZFcU7WSHcB4jKpz-R80mW8SSNups7DUAxkY2cQpD5eqMV5jBF_y8uYcFq6cdsr2_dFcEiHjAmk2U2WE2rpmpFU%3D " It will take EVERY single grassroots conservative who reads this to step up and fight back against the well-funded Left. Will you step up, Friend?")**

I started doing the books at my mom's store when I was just 13. Later, I graduated from Clemson with an accounting degree, gained experience in the corporate world, then made my way back to my family's business. I know a thing or two about numbers, but it doesn't take having an accounting degree to recognize the GRIM REALITY that Republicans are facing heading into the 2024 election cycle. | Here are two noteworthy shifts we are seeing: 1. CONSERVATIVE DONOR ENGAGEMENT IS DECLINING. Republicans are being outraised by a growing margin. While Democrats grow their donor base exponentially each year, the number of grassroots conservatives who donated during the midterms actually DECLINED for the first time in years. | 2\. DONATION LIMITS ARE INCREASING (I did the math, so you don 't have to). The previous limit for an individual was $2,900 per candidate per election. In 2023, the limit was increased to $3,300. That 's a nearly 14% INCREASE when Democrats already have a head start and more donors funding their campaign war chests. If we keep falling behind as the contribution limit increases, Democrats' advantage will only grow which will have a DETRIMENTAL impact on our ability to compete in the future. The fundraising gap will grow larger and the Democrats' lead will become INSURMOUNTABLE. Republicans have a choice: We can let these challenges scare us away or we can FIRE UP OUR BASE. Legislative Update for Week Ending March 31, 2023
Another week of liberal leadership purposefully causing chaos in the Unicameral. Regardless, some milestone wins in taxes and the second amendment are on the horizon. This week started with a historic change of rules in the middle of session after yet another week of obstruction by the new leadership of the Democrats. This liberal leadership has clearly hijacked their party and control the branding and messaging. No need for a party governance or even Chairwoman, when 6-7 liberal Democrats set the tone for the entire party. By mid-week, we saw a modification in the rules that still protects the minority in speaking but ensures business will be done. Let’s dive in... Taxes LB 754 advances out of General File and onto Select File! The Revenue Committee, chaired by Senator Lou Ann Linehan, was clearly well organized as 9 Democrats voted for the bill with only 7 Democrats registering a PNV (present, not voting) vote. All Republicans upheld the platform and voted for less taxes. The headline piece is that the top marginal income tax rate will eventually drop to 3.99% (to compete with Iowa). However, interesting debate came from the Democrats to lower the income tax rate further from middle income tax brackets. No one was philosophically opposed to this idea, but budget restraints and a desire to see where property tax relief would end up, kept this idea tabled for now. Fiscal notes are needed to understand what is possible to balance the budget before additional measures can be agreed to. Senator Kauth’s proposal to accelerate the Social Security tax cuts was included. Additional proposals to increase child tax credits, recognize deductions for corporations, and clean up legal language on federal retirees pension benefits were also included in the amended measure. Senator Erdman used his time to support the bill but also to reiterate the need for a bigger overhaul of the tax system with his EPIC tax proposal (LB79). Senator Briese made it clear that property tax relief (LB243) and income tax relief are tied at the hip. Senator Briese was clear, “One doesn’t pass without the other”. LB243, the property tax bill in conjunction with LB 754 was being debated on the floor on Friday. Many amendments were reconciled and the Filibuster Party deployed their tactics again. We are looking forward to Monday. Stay tuned...property tax relief is right behind. On a separate note, the speech by Senator Linehan continues to erode the credibility of OpenSky and the journalists that use their research as a “Credible” source. OpenSky cited that people do not move based on taxation based on a survey THEY conducted. Of course, “Taxes” was not listed in the survey as an option to select for reasons to move. Senator Dungan cited their info and did not vote for this package, though he represents a hard working district in North Lincoln, while liberal Senator Conrad represents hard working North Lincoln and did vote FOR this bill. Conservatives should not be fooled by the clearly biased sources of OpenSky as well as Civic Nebraska on other issues. 2nd Amendment Senator Brewer’s Constitutional Carry bill (LB77) advanced out of Select File and onto Final Reading. The bill received 31 ‘Yes’ votes. The final stage (Final Reading) will be an interesting process. The bill has never advanced this far but has one more hurdle to go. 33 votes will be needed to pass the filibuster. The NEGOP Platform outlines that citizens should be charged fees to exercise their rights. Moreover, the platform promotes foundational constitutional rights that should not be infringed with unnecessary stipulations/regulations. Constitutional Rights are non-negotiable. Education
It was a very frustrating week at the State Board of Education. The newly appointed State Education Commissioner, Brian Maher, was selected by a vote of 5-3. However, the process was highly suspect. Elizabeth Tegtmeier said, “It felt like the process was highly influenced and colluded by outside forces.” The Consultant, (Steve Joel former Lincoln Public Schools Superintendent) did not allow direct questioning of the final candidate by the ELECTED BOARD MEMBERS. Does the tail wag the dog? The questions of Board members had to be written and pre-screened by the unelected consultant. Listen to the failure of “Process” State Board Member Elizabeth Tegtmeier put on the record after she was implored to “Trust the Process” (audio below). We are thankful for the 3 newly elected Republican members standing together for transparency, accountability, and Nebraska parents.
* [SBOE Member Tegtmeier Audio](https://www.ne.gop/so/efOSz85mQ/c?w=0K0jdSE0AJSx-qKJVLPZI8jbIpxfbgtQAKiKvITq0Iw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kcml2ZS5nb29nbGUuY29tL2ZpbGUvZC8xYW1WcFlNUGVralF3X2w1VHBBNFVGazBFVU50T3ZfLWMvdmlldz91c3A9c2hhcmVfbGluayIsInIiOiJhNmViODU0Ny04NzZiLTQ1ZWItYzU1OC03M2ViMDg2ZGM5ZWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ)

Supporting President Trump The Democrats are back to weaponizing our justice department against political opponents. This, after wasting years of our lives with the Russian hoax and one full year of Congressional productivity. You can read our full press release on this event below. We will be watching to see if the same people in justice decide to investigate Clinton and the $850k for Paula Jones to go away so we know they are consistent in their legal work and subject matter. [NEGOP Press Release - 3.31.23](https://www.ne.gop/so/efOSz85mQ/c?w=3ZODQ7H0DNtvuETUKEhUJtR4ghvfjtTrcnxuUnBQxe8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kcml2ZS5nb29nbGUuY29tL2ZpbGUvZC8xczBnZlJFZFVtSWR6bm1FXzRTYkdvZXhiNGpsLUh4S0Qvdmlldz91c3A9c2hhcmVfbGluayIsInIiOiJhNmViODU0Ny04NzZiLTQ1ZWItYzU1OC03M2ViMDg2ZGM5ZWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ) Broadband
Solid debate was had over the future of broadband. The Governor has proposed a new office of 10 employees operating underneath the Department of Transportation to oversee the deployment of broadband. The proposal would eliminate the power of the Public Service Commission (PSC) over the broadband project. Republican senators are divided on this issue. Senator Erdman raised concerns of removing the power of this project from elected officials to appointed entities. Other Senators cited growing government as a problem. Proponents cited past problems of effectiveness with the PSC (issues with past administrations...not necessarily newly elected officials). They couldn’t create a map in a timely fashion and had failed too many times in the past to deliver on key milestones. In summary, the frustrations are very strong amongst a wide variety of elected officials that the PSC could not expedite this project and deliver. Many felt it was time to move on to a new approach. Senator Dorn made an impassioned plea that the execution of this project could not be delayed any longer (especially with the Federal allocation coming soon with strings of expectations attached). The NEGOP is a strong supporter of Broadband expansion. We understand time is of the essence for federal funding. Whoever wins the “Responsibility” argument must execute in a timely manner for federal funding. Responsibility will come with heavy pressure to deliver. However, the argument still revolves around expansion of government versus removal of current Constitutional elected officials. Energy Policy The NEGOP is committed to affordable and reliable energy. This week DC Republicans in the House passed a massive measure to bring back affordable and reliable energy by striking a blow against Biden’s failed energy policy. The bill has no legs to pass with the makeup of the Senate and the White House, but was a show of united commitment across the broad spectrum of Republicans to bring back sanity to national energy policy. We are thankful to our federal delegation who are on the record to prioritize affordable and domestic energy. Waters of the US The dreadful and painful Waters of the US rule was overturned by the Senate. Four Democrats joined with Republicans to overturn this bill. However, the regulations are expected to remain intact as Biden will veto the legislation. However, the Republicans were clear and sent the message that this is a large and egregious overstep by DC. Here in Nebraska, Attorney General Hilgers continues to stay vigilant on this issue. Election Integrity We are anticipating the full language of the Voter ID bill soon. The Key Learnings From the Filibuster
1. The Democrats like to hear themselves talk. In particular, Hunt, Dungan, Conrad, J. Cavanaugh, and M. Cavanaugh desire National attention.
2. M. Cavanaugh has an amazing coffee mug collection.

The serious problem that is very evident in the filibuster process is the dangerous echo chamber many Democrats live in. The discussions they are willing to have in front of kids on suicide and hate are egregious. It is clear where the hate lies. Then we heard Senator McKinney talk about how no one in Nebraska really cares about his community. Senator McKinney said that no one caring was from both sides of the aisle. If you listen long enough you quickly realize the narrative is that everyone dislikes every group of people they can name that are not identified with the majority (whatever that majority is in America since we are all different).
The reality is this is not true. More importantly, it is dangerous. The emotions with a few in these communities are based on rhetoric and not fact. Fortunately, many in these communities are individuals and can think for themselves. We will judge individuals based on the content of their character and documented actions as Republicans. We will continue to build on open dialogue with all Nebraskans. The line we heard all week is that Republicans are trying to deny healthcare from those that identify as trans. This is a lie and should be called out as such. The definition of healthcare they are referencing is absurd. Wyoming smartly took steps to codify what healthcare is this session and Nebraska should do the same. The same Democrat Party is also trying to define that all healthcare should be paid for by the people (National argument). When you want nationally subsidized healthcare and the definition of healthcare grows by the day....guess what happens to the size of government.
Are elective surgeries healthcare? What about cosmetic surgery? Is that now healthcare? The average human looks at healthcare as sickness, cancer, emergency treatment, etc....not elective surgeries to change one’s look or appearance...whether that be a sex change, elective cosmetic change, or ending a baby’s life (definitely not healthcare as Wyoming codified based on Democrat arguments there). It is scary to watch how Democrats are trying to redefine healthcare and worse yet rev up their base with dangerous rhetoric that is just not true. We unfortunately saw what that dangerous rhetoric caused in Tennessee last week. Tolerance seems to be a one way street. Having an opinion that kids cannot make decisions that affect the rest of their life is not hate...it is common sense. Contracts signed by kids are not legal because they are not of age. Not letting kids make permanent decisions that will affect the entirety of their life is legal, common sense, and normal. Calling it hate is irresponsible.
Until Next Week... Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director political@ne.gop

Regardless, some milestone wins in taxes and the second amendment are on the horizon. This week started with a historic change of rules in the middle of session after yet another week of obstruction by the new leadership of the Democrats. By mid-week, we saw a modification in the rules that still protects the minority in speaking but ensures business will be done. Let’s dive in... Taxes LB 754 advances out of General File and onto Select File! The Revenue Committee, chaired by Senator Lou Ann Linehan, was clearly well organized as 9 Democrats voted for the bill with only 7 Democrats registering a PNV (present, not voting) vote. All Republicans upheld the platform and voted for less taxes. The headline piece is that the top marginal income tax rate will eventually drop to 3.99% (to compete with Iowa). However, interesting debate came from the Democrats to lower the income tax rate further from middle income tax brackets. No one was philosophically opposed to this idea, but budget restraints and a desire to see where property tax relief would end up, kept this idea tabled for now. Fiscal notes are needed to understand what is possible to balance the budget before additional measures can be agreed to. Senator Kauth’s proposal to accelerate the Social Security tax cuts was included. Additional proposals to increase child tax credits, recognize deductions for corporations, and clean up legal language on federal retirees pension benefits were also included in the amended measure. Senator Erdman used his time to support the bill but also to reiterate the need for a bigger overhaul of the tax system with his EPIC tax proposal (LB79). Senator Briese made it clear that property tax relief (LB243) and income tax relief are tied at the hip. Senator Briese was clear, “One doesn’t pass without the other”. LB243, the property tax bill in conjunction with LB 754 was being debated on the floor on Friday. Many amendments were reconciled and the Filibuster Party deployed their tactics again. subject: Only three days until Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election on Tuesday -- Will you join the DNC Call Crew?

body:
The Wisconsin state Supreme Court election is right around the corner and we need your help making calls to Wisconsin voters. | |
---
Derek -- In three short days, Wisconsin voters will head to the polls for the first critical judicial election of 2023: a state Supreme Court race that could decide the balance of the court for years to come. **_Every_ recent statewide election in Wisconsin has been decided by razor-thin margins. With abortion access and voting rights on the ballot, I can’t stress enough how important it is that we all come together to help elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court on April 4.** Here at the DNC, we’ve built a grassroots team of phone bankers to support elections from school board to Senate, and it’s this team (_including you_ _, Derek!)_ that will help elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz on Tuesday. **So, I’m coming to you directly:[ Will you join the DNC Call Crew this weekend to make calls to mobilize Wisconsin voters in the final days of this election? Every conversation will make a difference in this election.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HXgISUQ6kaMw7miBXrv1T3MlADiOZYv8ezz9iapm5-c95CWdjhSYamMrGgpNWcOoVM1kvDARGPn6Eqz0ZEz8AuIs5_sA3rUkW5I2aSMw_ususkoObPEASkIgJdlEFRLAnRll0Vc76MzL1n1RWN0KjFqxD_4MVRx14GcL-dDIO9oZFckKKGI6xoPZd83dvHrut6q67vUyH7LLkQLTf9fCCDtkjse8_ao8ObVip36yAKG-YDshMKTaj6pqxQXEYJjAfCwlGe6F8xQLkv0kfBsQCi9Kt0yhgJJAuhY06liLaVV8oQ4njwvvebakU89SWATFrzcQM7vqP-Z0Jmr_m-KB_pk2lRH9j7UUFWTNu7kq3eOFQUZdlHi6n8O2g5ScQj15GX5bg-NbbvNVG-A5qEwrezqKGJcsrDCCcFk4EF_xNJeE/3uz/NgRtkSNDQgqCLuZwK_X20A/h0/asS7tKEo2ADH7WZCiogtd4tRIzXQ0ltLwvsAKuU0opE)**

Judge Janet Protasiewicz is up against an extreme MAGA opponent -- and if this year has shown us anything, it’s that MAGA Republicans will do everything they can to stand in the way of our progress. **That’s why it’s so important to mobilize Wisconsin voters _right now_ ahead of the election on Tuesday.** Making calls to voters is one of the most impactful ways you can help get out the vote in Wisconsin (and it’s one of my favorite ways to reach folks!). With only a few days left, the conversations we’re having with voters could decide this election. I hope to see you there -- let’s bring this one home! Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair

Making calls to voters is one of the most impactful ways you can help get out the vote in Wisconsin (and it’s one of my favorite ways to reach folks!). With only a few days left, the conversations we’re having with voters could decide this election. I hope to see you there -- let’s bring this one home! Jaime Jaime Harrison Chair Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. For nearly four decades, extreme gerrymandering helped the GOP hold a vice grip on power in Michigan, even when Democratic candidates earned more votes in statewide elections. This enabled Republicans to implement their anti-worker agenda while blocking progress on priorities like gun safety.

**_But those days are over now – and our fair maps movement helped make it happen!_**
**FIRST, in 2018,** the NDRC and its affiliates supported the creation of Michigan’s independent redistricting commission to make map drawing fair and nonpartisan.

**THEN, in 2021,** the commission approved fair maps across the board. The _New York Times_ called Michigan’s congressional map “one of the fairest” maps in the country.

**SO, in 2022,** when the NDRC supported Democracy Defenders running across Michigan, these candidates competed on a level playing field. _And – thanks to your grassroots support – many of them won._

[**_NOW, we’re continuing our work to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, and defend democracy in more states across the country. Will you pitch in to help nationwide?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61110468/399177371/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230401_FR_4A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzYmU4NDk5LTk3ZDAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JQMqgQOJiZ-q8CxcLtRvifFhZPFu0mOU7qfPpDfIAfQ=)

**Thanks to our proven strategy, democracy is working in Michigan. But we must not forget what Attorney General Eric Holder said: “Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted.”**

With a crucial state supreme court race approaching next week in Wisconsin that could determine the future of voting rights, abortion rights, and even the 2024 presidential election, your support has never been more important. **Will you donate today to help continue powering the NDRC’s democracy-saving work nationwide?**

clean_body: and we’re just getting started, team | Team – If you want to understand the power of our grassroots movement, just look at headlines like this: | = = For nearly four decades, extreme gerrymandering helped the GOP hold a vice grip on power in Michigan, even when Democratic candidates earned more votes in statewide elections. This enabled Republicans to implement their anti-worker agenda while blocking progress on priorities like gun safety. But those days are over now – and our fair maps movement helped make it happen! FIRST, in 2018, the NDRC and its affiliates supported the creation of Michigan’s independent redistricting commission to make map drawing fair and nonpartisan. THEN, in 2021, the commission approved fair maps across the board. The New York Times called Michigan’s congressional map “one of the fairest” maps in the country. SO, in 2022, when the NDRC supported Democracy Defenders running across Michigan, these candidates competed on a level playing field. And – thanks to your grassroots support – many of them won. = Thanks to our proven strategy, democracy is working in Michigan. But we must not forget what Attorney General Eric Holder said: “Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted.” With a crucial state supreme court race approaching next week in Wisconsin that could determine the future of voting rights, abortion rights, and even the 2024 presidential election, your support has never been more important. Will you donate today to help continue powering the NDRC’s democracy-saving work nationwide? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts [CLICK TO LISTEN]
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507809:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)

Peter,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507809:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507809:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507809:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)
**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507808:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507807:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507806:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507805:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507804:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507803:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507802:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507809:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**I'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating any amount today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507809:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507809:6GHjL_GAN:m:1:3365131770:272738019F7EF8330184BC1A47E23083:r)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. I'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. clean_body: Don’t let this moment go to waste. | | | Friend, There’s no two ways about it... The radical Democrats and Soros’ bought-and-paid-for puppet of a prosecutor are actively interfering in the 2024 election. They know they can’t win fairly on the issues, so they’re doing what they’ve always done – attempting to buy, rig, and cheat their way into power... Even if that means, for the FIRST TIME in the history of our great country, ARRESTING and ARRAIGNING a President of the United States and the leading Republican presidential candidate for committing NO CRIME at all! These witch-hunt crazed radicals are hoping I’ll throw up my hands and give in to these never-ending battles. But they are sorely mistaken, Friend. I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the raging left-wing mob! And after our campaign already posted RECORD NUMBERS just hours following the announcement of this sham indictment, my team has provided an internal*extension for today to show we will only continue to SURGE as peace-loving patriots from every corner of the country join our ranks to SAVE AMERICA. | Thank you, | Donald J. _Peace through Strength_ , my friend. Governor Larry Hogan echoed Ronald Reagan's sage words in his recent interview at the Bastion Institute in Des Moines, IA. The Governor reminded us that the sentiment, **_peace through strength_** , means refusing to minimize the conflict in Ukraine. It isn't merely a "territory dispute" with Russia, it's a dictator grasping for power.

name: PA Democrats
subject: PA Dems Monthly Newsletter
body:
The Newsletter [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/PDP%20Primary%20Logo.png]
Note From the Chair
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/46557A664F4C7668796A716D367639354A76567951726C502F543771324546656469454F7A31754945784343455A45646750464D5443496B6967355566755053/editor_images/Sharif-Street.jpg] I am thrilled to be reaching out after an incredible stretch for the Pennsylvania Democrats, none of which would have been possible without your valued support and hard work.
Not long ago, we had another victorious election night here in Pennsylvania. Democrats swept the special elections in House Districts 32, 34, and 35, securing the state house majority we won on election night this past November.
We are honored to congratulate Joe McAndrew, Abigail Salisbury, and Matt Gergely on becoming our newest state representatives. I think I speak for all of us when I say I cannot wait to see what they are able to accomplish for Allegheny County and our commonwealth as a whole.
Elections have results. As such I’m proud to congratulate State Representative Joanna McClinton on becoming Pennsylvania’s first Black woman Speaker. This historic achievement is well earned after a career spent fighting to better the lives of Pennsylvanians, and would not have been possible without all of your tireless efforts to win state house races across the commonwealth. I’m excited to see what the future holds for Speaker McClinton. Read more... [https://www.padems.com/?page_id=16492]
2023 Winter Pennsylvania State Committee
In addition to awarding our endorsements for our 2023 judicial races, our Winter State Committee was an opportunity for us to come together and map out how we can continue to fight for a better, more equitable Pennsylvania. See below for some highlights:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%288%29.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%287%29.jpg]
Chairman Street kicking of his Democratic Leadership Education Forum A Packed house for our Friday Night Dinner
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%283%29.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%286%29.jpg]
Vice Chair Peggy Grove speaking to our members at the Friday night dinner Lt Governor Austin Davis speaking at our Friday Night Dinner
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%284%29.jpg]
A Standing Room Only crowd at the Women's
Caucus Candidates Forum
Read more [https://www.padems.com/?page_id=16492#State-Committee]
News From Around the Commonwealth
Centre County Adams County Lehigh County
The Centre County Dems have been conducting a robust letter to the editor campaign reflecting on President Jimmy Carter’s life and legacy, which has resulted in publication in more than 60 state papers. The Adams County Dems held their first-ever chili fundraiser and petition signing event just last week. The event featured Gettysburg Mayor Rita Frealing, Adams County Commissioner Marty Qually, Gettysburg Borough Councilor Matt Moon, Adams County Democratic Chair Marcia Wilson, and other local candidates seeking office. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%2813%29.jpg]
The Lehigh County Dems have been busy meeting candidates and staging petition signing events throughout the county.
Read more from around the commonwealth [https://www.padems.com/pa-dems-monthly-newsletter/#News]
Updates From the Pennsylvania College Democrats
College Democrats of PA (PACD) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%282%29.jpg]
Earlier this month, executive officers attended their first state committee meeting at this winter conference of the PA Dems and successfully cast their ballot for the endorsements of Dan McCaffery, Timika Lane, and Jill Beck! Temple University, College Democrats
Right on the heels of the winter conference, PACD executive members took more time off from classes and attended the DNC winter conference from Feb 2-4th. The Temple Democrats have been petitioning for Christy Brady and had meet and greets with Councilmember Isaiah Thomas, Judge candidate Tamika Washington, Council candidate Amanda McIllmurray, Council candidate Jon Hankins. In addition, last week they teamed up with TU Clean Up Club and cleaned multiple plots and streets.
Lastly, as February comes to a close, the PACD executive political affairs committee has been hard at work connecting chapters to local & state candidates, and visa versa, for the petitioning season!
If you are a candidate and wish to be connected with your local college democratic chapter please contact them at pacd.communications@gmail.com
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%2811%29.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%285%29_3.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/FebNewsletter%20%2810%29.jpg]
Gettysburg College, College Democrats West Chester University, College Democrats Pittsburgh University, College Democrats
Hosted a panel on climate change with a huge turnout and several professors from their environmental studies and economics departments As part of their ongoing speaker series, they host Judge Paige Simmons for a meet and greet Hosted a discussion with candidate for Pittsburgh city controller Rachael Heisler and Author Patrick Sweeney
Read more from the PA College Dems [https://www.padems.com/pa-dems-monthly-newsletter/#College-dems]
Upcoming Events
Petitions deadline The Progressive Caucus The Westmoreland County Democratic Committee
A reminder that all petitions must be turned in by 5:00 PM on Tuesday, March 7th. The Progressive Caucus invites all State Committee Members and liked-minded Democrats are invited to join their monthly Zoom convening. We convene on the 2nd Tuesday of the month at 7pm. Our next convening will be on Tuesday, March 14th. The committee will be holding the Obama-Kukovich Spirit of Hope and Change Dinner on Saturday, March 11th inn Crabtree. Click "Read more" to see full details.
Read more about upcoming events across PA [https://www.padems.com/?page_id=16492#Upcoming-events]
Want to stay in the loop?
Sign up to receive email updates from PA Dems! [https://go.padems.com/a/2023-email-signup]
PA Democratic Party
229 State Street
Harrisburg, PA 17101
United States
https://www.padems.com [https://www.padems.com]
unsubscribe: https://go.padems.com/p/hIJ5UTWtvUS0XEFZw_VqjQ2?unsubscribedata=f0FR%2F3kpjFL3wsynMcZSq9eID%2FBFyS8VNhxHKxAQyrlaZpAEJ8LMvJDhVqOKssQYVUORA%2BkaFYt02Xw7Fqjs9cPfKsbtxsXK6XIVTCCxqtM7QIMxL1jwrGkgPWcvrYzdplKl11R0p858A4GgsVuTNzt9Gd5ArlplzI8EXhKRiRcmljMoDmiH1UNaSamTseZfeyL3lim2CZ%2FkypyN9hDSADXEzSV9ZGv3l%2B0EK9JoP%2FG%2F7L7k0XWGz1CdtnHxjElkUkrb6jFY4AFqYiQBnpeR%2BlAwRlaw%2FT8Yb9p%2Fesikpv8wpG2YBd5Fb7uSiZAFED4EPoBUiNOtI77kO9JU1vqVPADZp8WzJIiEv%2BaxFubJ9WJ1dI58Xv%2BwI3jtlh6C7AHzbJ89%2F1yLfeUUFcqEkPZy4n2obWC6EuEtbJrFdjVVF1uvXSNFqegh%2Fb6dPsNCYytq

body:
Look, this headline is absolutely HORRIFYING:

Ron DeSantis is SOARING in the polls against Donald Trump, creating the potential for a HORRIFYING 2024 match up!

We’re not sure how much support DeSantis actually has, and we need to know ASAP so we can prepare for 2024 and make sure we end DeSantis’ career once and for all.

10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Do you approve of Ron DeSantis? »

YES, I DO... »
NO, I ABSOLUTELY DO NOT! »
I’M NOT SURE YET »

THIS POLL WILL BE OPEN FOR 90 MINUTES UPON OPENING, IF YOU DON’T RESPOND WITHIN THAT TIME FRAME, YOUR RESPONSE WILL BE MARKED AS A YES.

Thank you for your response!

name: VoteVets
subject: Just wanted to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
And bring your attention to something
#
Hey there, Derek -
We sent a lot of messages over the last several days, we know.
But we would not do it if it were not so important. The donations we received ahead of yesterday’s FEC deadline are going to have a huge impact down the line.
So, before we get too far, we just wanted to say thank you. This organization is as successful as it is because of support from people like you.
And to that end, we wanted to bring something to your attention:
**Senator Tommy Tuberville is holding up about 160 Military promotions.**
Now, you might be asking yourself — why? Why would a sitting Senator do something like that?
And the answer is as simple as it is infuriating. Tuberville is upset because the Pentagon passed a new policy providing three weeks of leave for abortion-related travel. Ridiculous.
These are dedicated members of our Armed Forces, and this politicization of promotions could have a major impact on our National Security, both in the near and long term. It hampers our ability to deal with rising threats around the world.
[**So today, we’re asking you to tell Tommy Tuberville to stand down. Stop this nonsense, and let the Military get on with the work of defending our country.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230401_vv_tuberville_petition/?source=em230401-1-15&refcode2=8135.3013755.IH8dJx&t=1&akid=8135%2E3013755%2EIH8dJx)
| [Tell Tommy: Stand down](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230401_vv_tuberville_petition/?source=em230401-1-15&refcode2=8135.3013755.IH8dJx&t=2&akid=8135%2E3013755%2EIH8dJx)
---
When you add your voice alongside thousands of others, we can and will make a difference.
Thank you again for all your support.
The team at VoteVets

Dan Kelly excused insurrectionists and election-deniers showing his true colors by helping the Republican Party try to steal the 2020 election for Donald Trump. He’s nowhere near fit enough to decide cases on voting laws, election outcomes, and our government – but time’s running out to stop him. This race is just three days away.****With election-denying dark money groups pouring in $4 million dollars to swing this race for Kelly, we need to amass a huge surge of grassroots support. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Any candidate who can so brazenly say that insurrectionists are “no problem” should not be representing us in elected office. | Peter, I want you to know that I just spoke with President Trump last night in the wake of bombshell news that the never-ending Witch Hunt against him has now led to an **INDICTMENT.**

_Here was his concern: we have just woken up today in a completely different country than the one we once knew._

This politically-motivated indictment - this SOROS-IFICATION of our justice system - has transformed the United States of America into a third-world dystopia before our very eyes.

_**Dictators and despots now find it easier to _jail their political rivals_ than compete against them in free and fair elections!**_

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tuesday election bulletin: Brostrom's a conservative, Milwaukee Circuit Court Judge, yet she makes clear why we MUST elect Protasiewicz over Kelly--the latter a democracy-demolishing loon who last week campaigned with a pastor who advocates murdering abortion doctors.
body:
Election this Tuesday!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d58b0e3-d30c-4610-8518-55e76a449bc0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Dan Kelly's a perverse, Trump-worshipping deviant who helped plot the failed 2020 coup._** **_He's so evil, Ellen Brostrom, daughter of retiring GOP WI Supreme Court Justice, Pat Roggensack, endorsed the liberal Jane Protasiewicz to replace her mom on the state's highest Court._** [**_Will you join us in rushing $5, $10, $15 or whatever you can to the most important race of the year, which may determine our democratic future?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d21923f-8139-41c5-bd55-720c8d17f9a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Brostrom's a conservative, Milwaukee Circuit Court Judge, yet she makes clear why we MUST elect Protasiewicz over Kelly--the latter a democracy-demolishing loon who recently campaigned with a pastor who advocates murdering abortion doctors._ **Here's Brostrom in the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf8010fa-6ee5-46e4-9b69-6b850d5edf92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T566da358-1add-4e3a-99e2-5b224721398a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Jamie Raskin Defends the Right to Protest, Bernie Rallies w/Brandon Johnson in Chicago, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Jamie Raskin & Greenpeace Defend the Right to Protest | Bernie
Rallies w/Brandon Johnson in Chicago | CPC Executive Action Push |
Missouri Votes Tuesday | Dems Must Deliver Ahead of 2024 | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1011&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Don’t miss our next [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1012&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with
Philadelphia mayoral candidate Helen Gym and other progressive leaders on
Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1013&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1014&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

The brand-new Our Revolution Store is now open! We’ve got lots of new
items — from hoodies to coffee mugs, even a baby onesie! Now is a great
time to grab some gear, make a statement, and help fund the movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1015&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]CHECK OUT OUR NEW STORE!
★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1016&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1017&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

LET’S GO! Our Revolution-endorsed Brandon Johnson is SURGING in the
Chicago Mayor’s race, and progressive voter outreach could clinch a
powerful win for the city and our movement.

On Tuesday, the 55th anniversary of MLK Jr.’s assassination, Chicago has a
choice to make: elect a former public school teacher and union organizer
Brandon Johnson, or a school privatizer backed by real estate speculators
and police unions.

Brandon’s opponent Paul Vallas calls himself “more of a Republican,” shut
down public schools in cities across the country, and looted [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8502?t=1018&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]$1.6B from
Chicago public schools to benefit wealthy banks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1019&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

“They have the money, but we have the people, and when the people stand
united, the people win,” Bernie told a packed house at Thursday’s
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8503?t=1020&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Rally with Brandon, MLK III, and US Reps. Delia Ramirez and Jonathan
Jackson.

Brandon said to the crowd: “This moment has been brought to us by a
profound struggle of our ancestors. And, our dream is the nightmare of
these large corporations who don’t want to see this day come.”

“Chicago, we’re not going to let extreme right-wing greedy profiteers turn
us around,” he said. “They said they didn’t know my name, didn’t know
about a progressive movement bringing transformation — well, if you don’t
know, now you know!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?t=1021&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]CHIP IN TO FUND OUR VOTER OUTREACH IN CHICAGO!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1022&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Also in Illinois, Our Revolution is backing Suzanna Ibarra for Joliet City
Council! District 5 needs a change, and Suzanna is committed to better
public safety, water affordability, and equal representation for all
residents. Suzanna is also a leader of Will County Progressives, the Our
Revolution group in Joliet!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1023&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Tuesday is also Election Day in St. Louis, where Our Revolution is
supporting a powerful progressive slate including Mayor Tashaura Jones,
Board President, and former Bernie delegate Megan Green, and a total of 9
ward candidates!

Our movement has been working for multiple election cycles in St. Louis.
Now, we’re looking to strengthen our progressive majority, which passed a
Basic Income trial in the city this year.

Our team is making 150k voter contacts in the city ahead of April 4th, and
we’re hearing a lot of excitement on the ground! Let’s bring home these
wins.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8364?t=1024&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]PHONEBANK FOR ST. LOUIS!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1025&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

And, Our Revolution Kansas City has a progressive slate on the ballot for
City Council, including Jenay Manley, Eric Bunch, Justin Short, Michael
Kelley, Johnathan Duncan, and Brandon Ellington!

Kansas City has become a hotbed of progressive activism with groups like
Jobs with Justice, KC Tenants, and the Missouri Workers Coalition — but,
Missouri is also becoming a testing ground for extremist right-wing
legislation.

This election is a chance to shift the balance of power and push back
against the gerrymandered legislature that controls the state!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1026&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Power is up for grabs in major cities nationwide, and we are investing our
time and resources to elect progressives in Chicago, St. Louis, NYC,
Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. Get involved to help us build local
power!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1027&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1028&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1029&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

The fight for progressive policies is ramping up with the Congressional
Progressive Caucus releasing its 2023 list of [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8504?t=1030&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]executive actions for
President Biden to deliver for people and the planet.

Lately, Biden and Democratic leadership have been tacking to the right
ahead of 2024 — a risky gamble that Our Revolution Executive Director
Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8505?t=1031&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]The Guardian will backfire.

“The base isn’t overly enthusiastic about Joe Biden being the 2024
standard bearer,” Joseph said. “Moving to the right on issues like fossil
fuel extraction might not just dilute enthusiasm, but engender active
opposition.”

“You’re going to see progressives mobilizing to hold Biden’s feet to the
fire,” he said. “We’re not going to pull our punches in this moment.”

Biden has the power to raise wages, strengthen unions, lower healthcare
costs, and more. It’s time to prove that Democrats and democracy can work
for the people.

★ ★ ★

BERNIE VS. STARBUCKS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1032&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

HELP Chair Bernie Sanders put billionaire Howard Schultz [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8506?t=1033&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]in the hot
seat this week — grilling him about Starbucks’ illegal union-busting
activities and showing that big corporations and wealthy CEOs are not
above the law.

Under oath at the hearing, Schultz admitted unionized workers were being
excluded from higher pay and benefits provided to the rest of the company.

Starbucks is facing 80+ NLRB complaints and 500 unfair labor practices
charges, and judges found the company has broken the law 130x across 6
states since workers began organizing in the fall of 2021. More than 360
stores unionized but have yet to see a contract.

PROTECT THE RIGHT TO PROTEST

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1034&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

“SLAPP stands for Strategic Litigation Against Public Participation,” US
Rep. Jamie Raskin [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8507?t=1035&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]told Our Revolution Monday. “It’s when a big
corporation brings a lawsuit against people for exercising their First
Amendment rights.”

“They don’t have any real cause, they’re just trying to drive a community
action or a civil liberties group into the ground with litigation costs,”
he said.

Rep. Raskin will be reintroducing his landmark bill to protect free speech
from baseless legal attacks and combat SLAPP suits — building on the
success of legislation in 32 states and DC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1036&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

As [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8508?t=1037&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Robert Reich explains in this video, corporations are using “SLAPP”
lawsuits to tie up organizations’ resources — some originally filed by a
former member of Trump’s personal law firm!

This is a coordinated attack, but we are organizing with a broad coalition
of groups and elected allies to protect the right to protest.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/end_slapp/?t=1038&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Call your representatives and tell them to cosponsor Rep. Raskin’s
bill in the House!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1039&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Also joining our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8509?t=1040&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Live National Call was Greenpeace USA’s Deepa
Padmanabha, who dug into the impact of SLAPP suits on movements.

“Behind every SLAPP suit is a story of resistance and speaking truth to
power,” Deepa said. “The goal is to scare people into silence and drain
time and money otherwise spent on protecting our planet and communities.”

She said we don’t hear about most SLAPPs because they are usually filed
against ordinary people advocating to protect fundamental rights
threatened by corporate greed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1041&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

“SLAPPs are driven by fear. Our movements are growing stronger, and these
corporations are feeling the force of people power,” she said. “They’re
desperate to put a price tag on First Amendment-protected activity.”

We need both federal anti-SLAPP legislation and anti-SLAPP laws in every
state. As Deepa told us: “Absent these laws, the cost of a SLAPP suit is
nothing compared to the benefit of silencing a powerful critic.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/end_slapp/?t=1042&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Our movement must send a loud message refusing to be silenced. Add
your voice to demand federal protection of the right to protest. Call your
Reps!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1043&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

“With anti-protest bills popping up around the country, we’re seeing a
resurgence of efforts to crush progressive movements,” Mara
Verheyden-Hilliard, Partnership for Civil Justice Fund executive director,
told us on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8509?t=1044&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Monday Call.

In the past 6 years, there have been 39 anti-protest laws in 20 states —
ratcheting up punishments from misdemeanors to felonies, penalizing
protests near pipelines as “critical infrastructure,” and more.

In the wake of the movement for black lives, new laws penalize marching on
the streets and even eliminate liability for cars that drive into
protestors, she said. Another law, enacted after the WV teacher's strikes,
eliminates police liability.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1045&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Ariel Moger, Government & Political Affairs Director of Friends of the
Earth as House Republicans called on us to fight HR1 — the newest version
of the Dirty Deal introduced by House Republicans this week.

“Thank you to the activists who mobilized to defeat the Manchin’s Dirty
Deal multiple times last year,” Ariel said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8509?t=1046&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Monday Call. “That’s
almost unheard of — Manchin usually gets whatever he wants.”

“The new version is even worse than Manchin’s so we need to show up in
full force to make sure it dies in the Senate,” she told us. “It is full
of handouts and loopholes to oil, gas, and mining industries, giving them
more incentives to pollute the planet and our communities.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1047&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1048&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Our Revolution’s newest local group SF Education Alliance has had some
early successes, including restoring English as Second Language (ESL)
classes at a community college after a petition drive.

The Alliance is also leading the fight to have the San Francisco Board of
Supervisors pass a resolution to protect Trans rights, which will be voted
on Tuesday. So far, all 11 supervisors have signed on!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1049&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1050&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Don’t miss our next [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1051&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with
Philadelphia mayoral candidate Helen Gym and other progressive leaders on
Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1052&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1053&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

Half a million Americans go bankrupt every year from Medical Debt — a
foreign concept to countries with single-payer healthcare. We’re compiling
stories to bring pressure and we need folks to stand up and speak out!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1054&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1055&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1056&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230401_NL_RevReport_0_Members_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.poD32C&t=1007&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230401_NL_RevReport_0_Members_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.gJg7nZ&t=1008&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230401_NL_RevReport_0_Members_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.UooBy4&t=1009&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230401_NL_RevReport_0_Members_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.hIMedA&t=1010&akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4170%2E5885482%2E0IBA3j

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

[ ][IMG] “They have the money, but we have the people, and when the people stand united, the people win,” Bernie told a packed house at Thursday’s [ ]Rally with Brandon, MLK III, and US Reps. Delia Ramirez and Jonathan Jackson. Brandon said to the crowd: “This moment has been brought to us by a profound struggle of our ancestors. And, our dream is the nightmare of these large corporations who don’t want to see this day come.” “Chicago, we’re not going to let extreme right-wing greedy profiteers turn us around,” he said. “They said they didn’t know my name, didn’t know about a progressive movement bringing transformation — well, if you don’t know, now you know!” [ ]CHIP IN TO FUND OUR VOTER OUTREACH IN CHICAGO! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Also in Illinois, Our Revolution is backing Suzanna Ibarra for Joliet City Council! District 5 needs a change, and Suzanna is committed to better public safety, water affordability, and equal representation for all residents. Suzanna is also a leader of Will County Progressives, the Our Revolution group in Joliet! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tuesday is also Election Day in St. Louis, where Our Revolution is supporting a powerful progressive slate including Mayor Tashaura Jones, Board President, and former Bernie delegate Megan Green, and a total of 9 ward candidates! Our movement has been working for multiple election cycles in St. Louis. Now, we’re looking to strengthen our progressive majority, which passed a Basic Income trial in the city this year. Our team is making 150k voter contacts in the city ahead of April 4th, and we’re hearing a lot of excitement on the ground! Let’s bring home these wins. [ ]PHONEBANK FOR ST. LOUIS! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] And, Our Revolution Kansas City has a progressive slate on the ballot for City Council, including Jenay Manley, Eric Bunch, Justin Short, Michael Kelley, Johnathan Duncan, and Brandon Ellington! Kansas City has become a hotbed of progressive activism with groups like Jobs with Justice, KC Tenants, and the Missouri Workers Coalition — but, Missouri is also becoming a testing ground for extremist right-wing legislation. This election is a chance to shift the balance of power and push back against the gerrymandered legislature that controls the state! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Power is up for grabs in major cities nationwide, and we are investing our time and resources to elect progressives in Chicago, St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. Get involved to help us build local power! [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The fight for progressive policies is ramping up with the Congressional Progressive Caucus releasing its 2023 list of [ ]executive actions for President Biden to deliver for people and the planet. Lately, Biden and Democratic leadership have been tacking to the right ahead of 2024 — a risky gamble that Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Guardian will backfire. “The base isn’t overly enthusiastic about Joe Biden being the 2024 standard bearer,” Joseph said. “Moving to the right on issues like fossil fuel extraction might not just dilute enthusiasm, but engender active opposition.” “You’re going to see progressives mobilizing to hold Biden’s feet to the fire,” he said. “We’re not going to pull our punches in this moment.” Biden has the power to raise wages, strengthen unions, lower healthcare costs, and more. It’s time to prove that Democrats and democracy can work for the people. ★ ★ ★ BERNIE VS. STARBUCKS [ ][IMG] HELP Chair Bernie Sanders put billionaire Howard Schultz [ ]in the hot seat this week — grilling him about Starbucks’ illegal union-busting activities and showing that big corporations and wealthy CEOs are not above the law. Under oath at the hearing, Schultz admitted unionized workers were being excluded from higher pay and benefits provided to the rest of the company. Starbucks is facing 80+ NLRB complaints and 500 unfair labor practices charges, and judges found the company has broken the law 130x across 6 states since workers began organizing in the fall of 2021. More than 360 stores unionized but have yet to see a contract. PROTECT THE RIGHT TO PROTEST [ ][IMG] “SLAPP stands for Strategic Litigation Against Public Participation,” US Rep. Jamie Raskin [ ]told Our Revolution Monday. “It’s when a big corporation brings a lawsuit against people for exercising their First Amendment rights.” “They don’t have any real cause, they’re just trying to drive a community action or a civil liberties group into the ground with litigation costs,” he said. Rep. Raskin will be reintroducing his landmark bill to protect free speech from baseless legal attacks and combat SLAPP suits — building on the success of legislation in 32 states and DC. [ ][IMG] As [ ]Robert Reich explains in this video, corporations are using “SLAPP” lawsuits to tie up organizations’ resources — some originally filed by a former member of Trump’s personal law firm! This is a coordinated attack, but we are organizing with a broad coalition of groups and elected allies to protect the right to protest. [ ]Call your representatives and tell them to cosponsor Rep. Raskin’s bill in the House! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Also joining our [ ]Live National Call was Greenpeace USA’s Deepa Padmanabha, who dug into the impact of SLAPP suits on movements. “Behind every SLAPP suit is a story of resistance and speaking truth to power,” Deepa said. “The goal is to scare people into silence and drain time and money otherwise spent on protecting our planet and communities.” She said we don’t hear about most SLAPPs because they are usually filed against ordinary people advocating to protect fundamental rights threatened by corporate greed. [ ][IMG] “SLAPPs are driven by fear. Our movements are growing stronger, and these corporations are feeling the force of people power,” she said. “They’re desperate to put a price tag on First Amendment-protected activity.” We need both federal anti-SLAPP legislation and anti-SLAPP laws in every state. As Deepa told us: “Absent these laws, the cost of a SLAPP suit is nothing compared to the benefit of silencing a powerful critic.” [ ]Our movement must send a loud message refusing to be silenced. Add your voice to demand federal protection of the right to protest. Call your Reps! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] “With anti-protest bills popping up around the country, we’re seeing a resurgence of efforts to crush progressive movements,” Mara Verheyden-Hilliard, Partnership for Civil Justice Fund executive director, told us on our [ ]Monday Call. In the past 6 years, there have been 39 anti-protest laws in 20 states — ratcheting up punishments from misdemeanors to felonies, penalizing protests near pipelines as “critical infrastructure,” and more. In the wake of the movement for black lives, new laws penalize marching on the streets and even eliminate liability for cars that drive into protestors, she said. Another law, enacted after the WV teacher's strikes, eliminates police liability. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Ariel Moger, Government & Political Affairs Director of Friends of the Earth as House Republicans called on us to fight HR1 — the newest version of the Dirty Deal introduced by House Republicans this week. “Thank you to the activists who mobilized to defeat the Manchin’s Dirty Deal multiple times last year,” Ariel said on our [ ]Monday Call. “That’s almost unheard of — Manchin usually gets whatever he wants.” “The new version is even worse than Manchin’s so we need to show up in full force to make sure it dies in the Senate,” she told us. “It is full of handouts and loopholes to oil, gas, and mining industries, giving them more incentives to pollute the planet and our communities.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution’s newest local group SF Education Alliance has had some early successes, including restoring English as Second Language (ESL) classes at a community college after a petition drive. The Alliance is also leading the fight to have the San Francisco Board of Supervisors pass a resolution to protect Trans rights, which will be voted on Tuesday. So far, all 11 supervisors have signed on! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t miss our next [ ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with Philadelphia mayoral candidate Helen Gym and other progressive leaders on Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Half a million Americans go bankrupt every year from Medical Debt — a foreign concept to countries with single-payer healthcare. We’re compiling stories to bring pressure and we need folks to stand up and speak out! [ ]SHARE YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Chairman Steve Daines and Senator Lindsey Graham have a critical message just for you. They recorded an URGENT video message to emphasize how critical it is to WIN in 2024. This is our BEST CHANCE in years to take back the Majority, and they need you to hear why. Republicans must win to ensure we secure our southern border, FIX Biden's broken economy, END “wokeness” in our schools, and restore FAITH in our country again. Your link to view this video is active for 30 minutes only, and Chairman Daines and Senator Lindsey Graham REALLY need you to watch. | | 2024 is our best chance to take on the Democrats andsecure a SENATE MAJORITY FOR THE NEXT 10 YEARS. We CANNOT afford to fall behind, or else the Democrats will take advantage, and our country will suffer the consequences. Peter, Senator Lindsey Graham and Chairman Steve Daines know OUR success runs through grassroots Conservatives like you. That’s why we’re reaching out to you before anyone else to see the video they recorded for YOU. body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here Peter, No one can outwork Nikki Haley. It was another jam-packed week with Nikki hosting two town halls in New Hampshire, meeting with grassroots supporters, taking on Biden’s failed policies, and announcing her upcoming trip to the border. Take a closer look at what Nikki’s been up to this week. ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL Nikki started the week off with two back to back town halls in New Hampshire. Hundreds of proud patriots were in attendance, fired up to hear Nikki. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f224f965401beb6a9ea2165574132749418e1d6b853d8dbdf7e382fec2c7681c2b05812a64f879ac42f36403cd9e7302285efbba02bc1c6b131f If you couldn’t be there in person, take a look at the recap: https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f224f965401beb6a9ea2165574132749418e1d6b853d8dbdf7e382fec2c7681c2b05812a64f879ac42f36403cd9e7302285efbba02bc1c6b131f WATCH NOW >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f224f965401beb6a9ea2165574132749418e1d6b853d8dbdf7e382fec2c7681c2b05812a64f879ac42f36403cd9e7302285efbba02bc1c6b131f → Read more:“Meeting 2024 voters face-to-face in New Hampshire. Haley was the first candidate to jump in the race after former President Donald Trump…Her accessibility compared to other figures such as DeSantis is something especially appreciated among Granite State voters. John Burns, 75, a Dover resident, said Haley's early stops in the state impressed him and that he loves the ‘small town meetings.’ Her town halls are a sign she respects ‘the New Hampshire public,’ he said.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f224093e73acaee98fb3cbdbd111ae416178cc8a29d55d41f26025a0689023458dd275665ea9e403c488fc6df21c0f2c537e57d73d336de807b0 USA Today , 3/28/23) → Read more:“Beth Voce, an independent, said she is interested in the prospect of a female candidate for president ‘because I’m tired of the good old boys system that is not working for our country.’ ‘So I’m very excited,’ she said. ‘Nikki Haley has a good reputation and has proven results.’” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f2248417595e94be0deb54ec0e6dd671947cfc682ec3e834d9f6928e063d2e8e070145e49c582f49ca38d6c7af76e9503128c84968c3640e3504 National Review , 3/27/23) https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f2242858427824c870e1148ea45f0702c321c71f07f7b84616d3e86aa1634ec691fb9dceb33a520ff5f9eff6d7d4a36bb440727c7aa367aeb50d Get excited! This week Nikki Haley announced she is launching Women for Nikki! She’ll be hosting her first Women for Nikki town hall in Des Moines, IA on April 12! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f2242858427824c870e1148ea45f0702c321c71f07f7b84616d3e86aa1634ec691fb9dceb33a520ff5f9eff6d7d4a36bb440727c7aa367aeb50d RSVP for Nikki’s town hall here. Or, if you want to be a part of Women for Nikki, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f22427c7584971b92a4ba145c96aa73c0f325dbfa01c99f6ca75c7c788a5bd01a4314017c081bb26d58ce495631687777fa7e9bf5d22d3d86d68 sign up to join Women for Nikki here. → Read more about Women for Nikki: Nikki Haley campaign launches 'Women for Nikki' ahead of Iowa campaign stops ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f2247c2f14ebe5642c1d516750717c9822bdb7eaa29cd18466cc07afa2f99754d9d072a08220bd128b568cc83217a437eaaca5b0be599c35c94d Fox News ) IN THE NEWS Nikki Haley highlighted her plan to secure the southern border. On Monday, she will be the first 2024 presidential candidate to visit the border. Haley’s actions stand in stark contrast to Joe Biden’s cavalier approach and reckless policies. It took Joe Biden two years to visit the border and earlier this week his Department of Homeland Security secretary refused to admit there is a “crisis” at the border. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f224e283c2c5dadfe1b0317a9c3248a627605ef900b5eabb7b15b31e557d6436605d2209718bb50a81b2a55d4b880f00edc97d02d5e876213d4b Nikki Haley vs. Joe Biden on the Border Crisis: https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f224e283c2c5dadfe1b0317a9c3248a627605ef900b5eabb7b15b31e557d6436605d2209718bb50a81b2a55d4b880f00edc97d02d5e876213d4b → Read More: Haley’s op-ed: “Ending the Fentanyl Crisis Starts by Securing the Border” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f224ba429fb436d370f6dd866bb5d9bc3e581e934b2ce030f12874c897d1ce185acc9bf67b757d4a358c1aec50bcdefa3ee351b87f849439e7fe National Review , 3/28/23) → Read More: Fox News: “Haley will become the first presidential candidate to visit the border when she travels to Texas on April 3. She will be accompanied by Rep. Tony Gonzales, R-Texas, and will make several stops between San Antonio and Eagle Pass.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f2247c2f14ebe5642c1d516750717c9822bdb7eaa29cd18466cc07afa2f99754d9d072a08220bd128b568cc83217a437eaaca5b0be599c35c94d Fox News , 3/28/23) → Read More: Daily Caller: “‘Leaders Show Up’: Nikki Haley To Become First Presidential Candidate To Visit Southern Border” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f2243ec22b926c155326eddcfcb32b8d8bc55b78255cc13d68167721c4828e9f9a518abceb51e34a1b003f8ebedde231f245b9e8054ccd0066ee Daily Caller , 3/28/23) → Watch Now: Nikki’s interview on The Story with Fox’s Martha MacCallum ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=05b0a675ae65f2242cdf0fb9fd416d57666a2a4bccb0efd75b1266f7255ece4bd7564c6db510dbf6808b5f7ee19cc0c96b0ba9632e4a78cf5e340ced2d01356f Fox News ) UPCOMING EVENTS → Nikki Haley’s Border Visit: Monday, April 3 → Lexington, South Carolina Rally: Thursday, April 6 → Sioux City, Iowa Town Hall: Monday, April 10 → Des Moines, Iowa Women for Nikki Town Hall: Wednesday, April 12 We hope to see you at her next rally and town hall!
