It was another jam-packed week with Nikki hosting two town halls in New Hampshire, meeting with grassroots supporters, taking on Biden’s failed policies, and announcing her upcoming trip to the border. Take a closer look at what Nikki’s been up to this week. ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL Nikki started the week off with two back to back town halls in New Hampshire. Hundreds of proud patriots were in attendance, fired up to hear Nikki. If you couldn’t be there in person, take a look at the recap: WATCH NOW >> → Read more:“Meeting 2024 voters face-to-face in New Hampshire. Haley was the first candidate to jump in the race after former President Donald Trump…Her accessibility compared to other figures such as DeSantis is something especially appreciated among Granite State voters. John Burns, 75, a Dover resident, said Haley's early stops in the state impressed him and that he loves the ‘small town meetings.’ Her town halls are a sign she respects ‘the New Hampshire public,’ he said.” ( USA Today , 3/28/23) → Read more:“Beth Voce, an independent, said she is interested in the prospect of a female candidate for president ‘because I’m tired of the good old boys system that is not working for our country.’ ‘So I’m very excited,’ she said. ‘Nikki Haley has a good reputation and has proven results.’” ( National Review , 3/27/23) Get excited! This week Nikki Haley announced she is launching Women for Nikki! She’ll be hosting her first Women for Nikki town hall in Des Moines, IA on April 12! RSVP for Nikki’s town hall here. Or, if you want to be a part of Women for Nikki, sign up to join Women for Nikki here. → Read more about Women for Nikki: Nikki Haley campaign launches 'Women for Nikki' ahead of Iowa campaign stops ( Fox News ) IN THE NEWS Nikki Haley highlighted her plan to secure the southern border. On Monday, she will be the first 2024 presidential candidate to visit the border. Haley’s actions stand in stark contrast to Joe Biden’s cavalier approach and reckless policies. It took Joe Biden two years to visit the border and earlier this week his Department of Homeland Security secretary refused to admit there is a “crisis” at the border. Nikki Haley vs. Joe Biden on the Border Crisis: → Read More: Haley’s op-ed: “Ending the Fentanyl Crisis Starts by Securing the Border” ( National Review , 3/28/23) → Read More: Fox News: “Haley will become the first presidential candidate to visit the border when she travels to Texas on April 3. She will be accompanied by Rep. Tony Gonzales, R-Texas, and will make several stops between San Antonio and Eagle Pass.” ( Fox News , 3/28/23) → Read More: Daily Caller: “‘Leaders Show Up’: Nikki Haley To Become First Presidential Candidate To Visit Southern Border” ( Daily Caller , 3/28/23) → Watch Now: Nikki’s interview on The Story with Fox’s Martha MacCallum ( Fox News ) UPCOMING EVENTS → Nikki Haley’s Border Visit: Monday, April 3 → Lexington, South Carolina Rally: Thursday, April 6 → Sioux City, Iowa Town Hall: Monday, April 10 → Des Moines, Iowa Women for Nikki Town Hall: Wednesday, April 12 We hope to see you at her next rally and town hall! RSVP BELOW: RSVP RSVP RSVP If you haven’t followed Nikki Haley on social media yet, make sure to follow her on Facebook , Twitter , and Instagram for more of the latest updates. Have a great weekend! -Team Haley GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President mug today. >> Claim Your Mug JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations…and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? Thank you in advance for your support. Thank you, Team Haley P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today. name: The Team at the Long Run
subject: IMPEACH Judge Janet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Did you see this?
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sinykin-split.Oxomx6&refcode=em230401-1-t2&t=1&akid=4318%2E196590%2EPrQqcP)
That is Dan Knodl — the Republican candidate running in a special election against Democrat Jodi Habush Sinykin for the 8th district of the Wisconsin State Senate this Tuesday. And if he wins, he's considering impeaching Judge Janet if she is elected to the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
**Here are the stakes of this State Senate special election:**
If Knodl is elected this Tuesday, the Wisconsin Senate Republicans will have a supermajority that will give them the power to impeach state officials, including Judge Janet, and override Governor Evers’ veto.
If we elect his Democratic opponent, Jodi Habush Sinykin, we can block the Republican supermajority and protect Judge Janet from the threat of impeachment.
Under no circumstance can we let Dan Knold win his race on April 4th and allow the Senate Republicans a supermajority.
So it’s time we put our full force behind Democratic candidate Jodi Habush Sinykin, who, if elected, will not only prevent the supermajority from falling into the hands of Republicans and prevent them from abusing their power, but protect the vote and voice of Wisconsinites.
So join us in uniting behind Democratic candidate Jodi Habush Sinykin to make sure she has the support to win on April 4th and protect our democracy in the State Senate.
[**Please split a contribution between Jodi Habush Sinykin and The Long Run today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sinykin-split.Oxomx6&refcode=em230401-1-t2&t=2&akid=4318%2E196590%2EPrQqcP)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sinykin-split.Oxomx6&refcode=em230401-1-t2&t=3&akid=4318%2E196590%2EPrQqcP)
Your donation today will be a step towards protecting democracy in Wisconsin.
The team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4318%2E196590%2EPrQqcP). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4318%2E196590%2EPrQqcP)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=4318_196590_PrQqcP&akid=4318%2E196590%2EPrQqcP)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4318%2E196590%2EPrQqcP)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: 2023 Membership Cards are on the way!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5880c1460e&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,

I'm excited to let you know that **our[2023 Washington State Republican Party Membership cards](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4204111140&e=6a281f566d) are on the way**, and I am asking you to join the thousands who have already renewed their membership by investing in a stronger Republican Party.

By renewing your Sustaining Membership today, you'll be joining us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction. Your support will help us to recruit and train new activists and volunteers, launch effective advertising campaigns, and support our Republican candidates at all levels of government.

Embossed with your name and featuring our logo, I hope your Card will be a constant reminder that Sustaining Members like you are the cornerstone of our party.

I also hope your Card will be a symbol of the victories that we’ll earn if we unify and continue to focus on the Democrats and the disasters they’ve created across our state and America.

Most importantly, I want your Card to be a reminder of our Republican solutions to those problems – solutions that will give hope to millions of voters who’ve lost faith in a process that’s led by woke liberals.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=49149fc7fc&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=172b93d63d&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| By earning victory in local elections this year and flipping seats in Olympia next year, Washington Republicans can fight to put convicted criminals behind bars. We can cut wasteful and corrupt government programs and lower your taxes. And we can protect the sanctity of your vote. But we can’t do this without your support.

[I'm asking you today to become a 2023 Sustaining Member TODAY with a donation of ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4691bdf863&e=6a281f566d)[$10,](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=623b8fd3c9&e=6a281f566d) [$25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ede41d5052&e=6a281f566d), [$50](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c46b3097eb&e=6a281f566d),[ or more.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=dcc6beebe2&e=6a281f566d) Every dollar counts, and every contribution makes a difference in our fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction.
---
| [Renew you membership Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fed41ca65b&e=6a281f566d "Renew you membership Today!")
---
| As a [card carrying member of the Republican Party](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=36a82906cb&e=6a281f566d), you can know that you are making the difference and helping us recruit and support strong candidates that will win in 2023 as we set the stage to win big in 2024.

Thank you for your continued support of our party and our mission. Together, we can make a real difference and ensure that Washington State doesn’t fall any further to the radical out-of-touch democrats.

Thank you in advance for your support,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
---
| [Become a Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7cb1523679&e=6a281f566d "Become a Sustaining Member Today!")

subject: re: EXTENSION
body:
Just because it’s that critical | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aab31e812c1a/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8121667?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=7675922a74&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

Last night was my first FEC deadline since taking office in November -- and I regret to tell you that we fell **$2,380 SHORT.**

The Democrats seem to gain fundraising momentum by the minute, and so I wanted to give my campaign a fair chance at gaining our own momentum.

That’s why I’ve personally made the decision to extend the deadline for just 1 MORE HOUR.

[_**Please make a contribution within the next HOUR and it will go towards helping me hit my critical FEC mandated end-of-quarter goal.**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=a9961a6165&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $100](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=0b6df7b0be&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE $100")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=df3e9c010f&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE $50")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=3201e38b0b&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE $25")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $5](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=94f2634332&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE $5")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=fca5e8035a&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT")
---
| I know end-of-quarter has been a lot. I’ve requested a lot of you.

So I just wanted to take this opportunity to say thank you.

Your support, whether it’s a sign in your yard, a $1 donation, or a $2,000 donation, means the world to me – and has truly changed the trajectory of my campaign and of my life.

I’m so thankful to have been given the opportunity to work for you. With your support, I can only hope to re-earn that opportunity in 2024.

[_**So if you’re able, please make a contribution within the next HOUR and it will go towards helping me hit my critical FEC mandated end-of-quarter goal – I would be extremely grateful.**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=0330daf655&e=c87c5d8d97)

Thank you,
---

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05

* [Restoring our Economy](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=8c015ded25&e=c87c5d8d97)

* [Supporting our Veterans and Armed Forces](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=9691ece5f6&e=c87c5d8d97)

clean_body: Just because it’s that critical | | | | | | Peter, Last night was my first FEC deadline since taking office in November -- and I regret to tell you that we fell $2,380 SHORT. The Democrats seem to gain fundraising momentum by the minute, and so I wanted to give my campaign a fair chance at gaining our own momentum. That’s why I’ve personally made the decision to extend the deadline for just 1 MORE HOUR. | "CONTRIBUTE $100" | "CONTRIBUTE $50" | "CONTRIBUTE $25" | "CONTRIBUTE $5" | "CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT" | I know end-of-quarter has been a lot. I’ve requested a lot of you. So I just wanted to take this opportunity to say thank you. Your support, whether it’s a sign in your yard, a $1 donation, or a $2,000 donation, means the world to me – and has truly changed the trajectory of my campaign and of my life. body:
.....Special Edition Issues Survey | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b94f7b9d1455/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8120335?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=efabb2f748&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

I wasn’t elected to Congress to serve myself, serve a political party, or serve my colleagues in Congress – _**I was elected to represent and serve my constituents in Oregon and the American people. **_

That’s why polls put together by the media or by special interest groups aren’t very helpful to me – I can’t be sure just who’s taking them, and I simply can’t rely on their results.

So my team and I have decided to put together a unique issues survey, one that only my supporters and constituents have access to.
---
| [ ](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=75ea0a1d63&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| That includes you, Peter.

[_**So please, take my Special Edition Issues Survey to help shape my teams focus heading into the 2nd quarter of 2023. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=a19b8d8124&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=fd10f4825a&e=c87c5d8d97 "TAKE THE SURVEY")
---
| My first quarter as a Congresswoman was a lot about learning the ropes.

But now that I have my footing, I’m ready to bring about policy that will benefit the people of Oregon.

I just need you to let me know where you want my focus.

[_**So please, take my Special Edition Issues Survey to help shape my teams focus heading into the 2nd quarter of 2023. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=526aeed5ea&e=c87c5d8d97)

Thank you,

[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=e1c95807ef&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=6a60a9052f&e=c87c5d8d97 "TAKE THE SURVEY")

body:
I knew I needed to reach out.

Peter, I can't tell you how hard this is for me to send to you right now. March just ended, and with it, my first End-of-Quarter deadline of 2023.

We were making great progress toward hitting our goal, and then things tailed off. My finance team just informed me that we ended up **_$14,829 short of our projections_** for the quarter. **_THAT 'S NOT GOOD. _**

As I'm writing this, the Socialist Left is looking at this as an opportunity to attack all our campaign's progress to protect our God-given rights, values, and freedoms that make this country _**WORTH FIGHTING FOR.**_

With this being said, I'm going to ask that you help me make up ground in the next 12 hours. **[If you can, please rush an emergency donation below to make an immediate 5X IMPACT towards helping our campaign, and it would mean more to me than you could imagine.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=7fd21bf012164db4aa0653183bb338b1&_e=DSfcBzKfrUK5ts_v-wH9cTVom10gBEEQQJs_4MrBUHXcoRGzggDx9RvRbth-iI55zFlitvSI4ufY4_3n5NjUuRMU75ulbdDwxZXfxCXC_ypvkJVu88Xtw4Kng1RhyUzjYVC7e-rjCETbsLt-51MYqFXf1Ek5uy-4SLGMzQK6ZyxxzCEuOoPmJ5e98c6t-Klsu6MMT58IWYUeJ8sCLbKnzLZuVrnAf2-AQ_v43G8AxlEEu1Tk0e1eaMi6_RtnHLY8G_2HL2G45oAWczWctGVLEFaOtSL9_Ia21dfbX0sA1UYvkMP5r22ZvpmP8U7awnbJAW03ewCOBMvdd6RQqgwCaTWRyOIHFW8cu4dWyGOJAEuqXer0rihSA9xr6qsJtRfF1Dwf6iKNXYZXTR7KH_yZBhK4A0Lsm3CmiB6IKewerhSWBFzTKZ_p0kmdTnS7pzxELSzp2W_fQQuz4qKo7C6itSnQDw1XyC21t4xcIpR_iUWMcXG7dDVwRMQnLoGZuzp2On2D2L-KVqr-kND-avipxVivWfasMLfIWcHUrtD3E0VfTxAcRh-kpKfqhHhUnQ67bqAJVAs3o1bQELdLfGJr0Q%3D%3D)** | [**RUSH $500**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=7fd21bf012164db4aa0653183bb338b1&_e=DSfcBzKfrUK5ts_v-wH9cTVom10gBEEQQJs_4MrBUHXcoRGzggDx9RvRbth-iI55zFlitvSI4ufY4_3n5NjUuRMU75ulbdDwxZXfxCXC_ypvkJVu88Xtw4Kng1RhyUzjYVC7e-rjCETbsLt-51MYqFXf1Ek5uy-4SLGMzQK6ZyxxzCEuOoPmJ5e98c6t-Klsu6MMT58IWYUeJ8sCLbKnzLZuVrnAf2-AQ_v43G8AxlEEu1Tk0e1eaMi6_RtnHLY8G_2HL2G45oAWczWctGVLEFaOtSL9_Ia21dfbX0sA1UYvkMP5r22ZvpmP8U7awnbJAW03ewCOBMvdd6RQqgwCaTWRyOIHFW8cu4dWyGOJAEuqXer0rihSA9xr6qsJtRfF1Dwf6iKNXYZXTR7KH_yZBoQ7Dh-Pk1ZIoZ6rQvFkERtADDN63apdhVJwlkI42QRQPs0wop-jVWTB331bkvv_vBEWKej8UzL2d7cOcf21XIb3lD3zY8Pd-UVlLA9OcWxu2m7JTg8BZO0p4efaAQcayTlsWArtiMjtXCanQbj5aaOzlGDxdMZ5FEjWtbKsyfPcA_3Plj9v4eOggoqOME3Yvw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I knew I needed to reach out. | Peter, I can't tell you how hard this is for me to send to you right now. March just ended, and with it, my first End-of-Quarter deadline of 2023. We were making great progress toward hitting our goal, and then things tailed off. My finance team just informed me that we ended up $14,829 short of our projections for the quarter. THAT 'S NOT GOOD. As I'm writing this, the Socialist Left is looking at this as an opportunity to attack all our campaign's progress to protect our God-given rights, values, and freedoms that make this country WORTH FIGHTING FOR. With this being said, I'm going to ask that you help me make up ground in the next 12 hours. | God Bless you and your family, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. | Peter, I want you to know that I just spoke with President Trump last night in the wake of bombshell news that the never-ending Witch Hunt against him has now led to an **INDICTMENT.**

_Here was his concern: we have just woken up today in a completely different country than the one we once knew._

This politically-motivated indictment - this SOROS-IFICATION of our justice system - has transformed the United States of America into a third-world dystopia before our very eyes.

_**Dictators and despots now find it easier to _jail their political rivals_ than compete against them in free and fair elections!**_
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507909:6RCZC_GUN:m:1:3365131770:63B5B3B99E673AC1C5398E535CA0732D:r)
---
| It's clear why this dark day for America has sadly become a reality: President Donald J. Trump always fought for us. He puts the American People above corrupt interests. And for that reason alone, the powerful will NEVER stop coming after him.

**So I will continue to stand with President Trump - because I know that he has always stood with us. **

[**Will you help me continue to be one of 45 's strongest defenders in the wake of this POLITICAL PERSECUTION?? He needs his top allies to be with him now more than EVER BEFORE!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507909:6RCZC_GUN:m:1:3365131770:63B5B3B99E673AC1C5398E535CA0732D:r)

| When he wasn't letting felons and murderers out on the streets, D.A. Alvin Bragg openly spoke about going after President Trump.

George Soros shelled out A MILLION DOLLARS to get this rogue prosecutor elected.

And now, he has just carried out the Regime's bidding with this Grand Jury Indictment based on sham legal charges!

By nearly a 2-to-1 margin, the American People see this stunt for what it is...

...a politically motivated WITCH HUNT.

[**So I need your help making sure that our voice - the voice of the Silent Majority - is not drowned out by these corrupt actors who are trying to JAIL the leader of our movement! name: URD
subject: This is not an April Fool's joke, this is a nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
We can't believe this, Peter... | | | Hi Peter – The Texas Republican Party wants to enable ordinary citizens to battle with "cartel operators" and hunt down families crossing the border. **This state run "vigilante death squad policy," as the Texas Democrats put it, is not an April Fool's joke – it’s a nightmare.** Unfortunately, the Texas Republican Party has been unabashed in its desire to focus more on harming vulnerable immigrants than helping its own constituents. Here's what Victoria Neave Criado, the Democratic chair of Mexican American Legislative Caucus, had to say about the GOP's bill in Texas: _“This dangerous, radical, and unconstitutional proposal which empowers border vigilantes to hunt migrants and racially profile Latinos is going to result in the death of innocent people."_ **Texas Republicans have voted for everything but the policies that will actually help Americans. They've voted against abortions, public school funding, healthcare, and job growth.** It's time we had new leadership. We need Democrats who will fight for the rights of Americans and protect our country responsibly – not create a dangerous militia to carry out their partisan agenda. **_[We're working against the GOP's partisan tide to elect Democrats and fight for progress in rural districts. Are you with us, Peter?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc5QVEbtRd_qPt2ZhuPblCZfUyIgx4atlB-AsBDMwtXGU4i8ygv1VMhRjU8d9QBVVz3yBQHmm25cv1Xac_vg0jDR_OWpnmk5JyUF-dYXJAPBo7SoLOCw2laTKDeVVca8HbqprJA3PjrkK8vvE0ptD1m4dXYBINmS9OnM6f28383tKm7jVDB97mT1ddBHcJkrV6_RFs2df5WM_nwVkwdQagvspTDcUFrruIOi8kOW1J6uj6oizPVv8ULu18yLzBTM1VLX7TweyxlIZkqCpxk6eADmIr0EqmYFElGquuRGe12zdVi8k2XHgvgP2wUUwYP1uX1wJYH4BFYb8kqzJiKz1_UnGjYrxomyAC15p-EfIWxMuvzi3PUjXzaCysgf8fe3NR/3uz/7Fn0pEMgSgqHmBHPXerX-Q/h0/3Q8Wqw9sBt7BgmxTNbkMPMRpwVVFte0_5jBNHyB9uCM)_** clean_body: We can't believe this, Peter... | | | Hi Peter – The Texas Republican Party wants to enable ordinary citizens to battle with "cartel operators" and hunt down families crossing the border. This state run "vigilante death squad policy," as the Texas Democrats put it, is not an April Fool's joke – it’s a nightmare. Unfortunately, the Texas Republican Party has been unabashed in its desire to focus more on harming vulnerable immigrants than helping its own constituents. Here's what Victoria Neave Criado, the Democratic chair of Mexican American Legislative Caucus, had to say about the GOP's bill in Texas: “This dangerous, radical, and unconstitutional proposal which empowers border vigilantes to hunt migrants and racially profile Latinos is going to result in the death of innocent people." Texas Republicans have voted for everything but the policies that will actually help Americans. They've voted against abortions, public school funding, healthcare, and job growth. It's time we had new leadership. We need Democrats who will fight for the rights of Americans and protect our country responsibly – not create a dangerous militia to carry out their partisan agenda. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, Peter. – URD United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I just spoke with President Trump...[WATCH HERE]

body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508523:JprQY_GXN:m:1:3331421248:6C5C8D22AFFBDFA6E59F6BC75C7779A4:r)
---
| |
---
| Peter, I want you to know that I just spoke with President Trump last night in the wake of bombshell news that the never-ending Witch Hunt against him has now led to an **INDICTMENT.**

_Here was his concern: we have just woken up today in a completely different country than the one we once knew._

This politically-motivated indictment - this SOROS-IFICATION of our justice system - has transformed the United States of America into a third-world dystopia before our very eyes.

_**Dictators and despots now find it easier to _jail their political rivals_ than compete against them in free and fair elections!**_
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508523:JprQY_GXN:m:1:3331421248:6C5C8D22AFFBDFA6E59F6BC75C7779A4:r)
---
| It's clear why this dark day for America has sadly become a reality: President Donald J. Trump always fought for us. He puts the American People above corrupt interests. And for that reason alone, the powerful will NEVER stop coming after him.

**So I will continue to stand with President Trump - because I know that he has always stood with us. **

[**Will you help me continue to be one of 45 's strongest defenders in the wake of this POLITICAL PERSECUTION?? He needs his top allies to be with him now more than EVER BEFORE!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508523:JprQY_GXN:m:1:3331421248:6C5C8D22AFFBDFA6E59F6BC75C7779A4:r)

Recent reports suggest that potential rivals of former President Donald Trump are casting doubt over his inevitability as the GOP nominee, but it's important to remember that it's _THE VOTERS_ who ultimately decide the winner. As a Republican activist and donor, _your voice is critical in shaping the direction of our party._ We need to hear from YOU on who you support for President in 2024. **[Please take a moment to respond to our official survey by 11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://vtgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYgU6j7Am6gC471idLqEyVojB1EAF0ViDcl-DpDVMegBb4uoKn85RNdxU4vGyCyxyEg9XnidlpIHt9SRfnqguoctT3_xZuszPLXc51x3DQfK8x81_ijYpV84Ge9G9XG6k6ArPYYTciUM1-WbnSTe53AS3eFlmEaOJWrzUiSrR4PGAcJzFMaeLWJFMtmc5BiDH5d52-EHCyxRHiN4tmOS013lwqq6GUOZL-fF7sL-LpcpM1Aa171NSsq-1WGiACtRxpXBgWx9PTUz6xtrfHvfqgPyZ7p5yqvKm_X9aSSt-Sf3RJ3SQxCSjgeDPFHHDqGti81S7Y-nrUA_8FBTJT8StgdPf2lIkr1cYJ8ciPOU33KUVPF7d-sfQHHw5fgKJnlATmPJwjx5jZAnYYrEGe4XcX5ut7DLqDAnFtVsNN2Ue4hSpuO37vR_jj8LPIvCZZJj1uLYEIa4Q6q247w8Oo2XLw5yebLmGKDexdhOA1tPrb600tAF_vtyLyxVl2CvvTsFiem64EDrloCfVJxabOFg6JsqmT1Vi_oMmYCLKIYCXSh5budPreWNom8lwI0nV9PQGV29etzsxGFbhxN8wudH8Bts&e=541e81b2a652adbc7e93973f82cc3809&utm_source=vtgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230308_hd_2024_gop_pri_57_31&n=4)** Your response is vital to the future of our party and our country. Don't wait, respond now! |

name: Katie Hill
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61132190/399211644/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20230401_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTJjNWQwODAtYjJkMC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O6C87nvnQ_C2m9BxK8xcPWYcl1W8zFIXZEIf-VINkek=)
---
Peter, I wanted you to hear it from me – **Thank you!** Because of the support of this team, we were able to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. I know we ask you to chip in to HER Time a lot, so I wanted to explain what it truly means to be a donor to this organization: When you make a donation to HER Time, you’re sending a message to Kevin McCarthy, Mitch McConnell, and their conservative extremist buddies that we won’t roll over as they strip away our rights right before our eyes. When you chip in $3 here or $10 there, you’re rejecting the corruption that has run Washington for too long. You’re fighting back against the wealthy special interests that stand in the way of progress. **When you pitch in whatever you can afford, you’re powering our work to tear down the current system and build up a new one led by women and young people with the vision and drive to create lasting change. ** I bet you didn’t know your $3 donation could mean all that — _but it does._ That’s why we ask you to contribute, and why we’re so grateful when you do. America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** Last week, Democrat political operative Lanny Davis bragged to Politico that he triggered the District Attorney's investigation of President Trump. Davis's claims might be pathetic puffery, but they provide an additional reason to believe that the District Attorney's unusual interest in President Trump has been based on _improper partisan considerations_ from the very start. **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**_WE WILL EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: The Mississippi Legislature is Broken
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| By Dana CriswellI am writing this at 11:57 pm on March 31 and we have three minutes to make the final vote on the last appropriations bill. If we don’t take this vote, then we have missed the constitutional deadline and the bill is dead, maybe.
### How did we get here?
The legislature is controlled by deadlines that have been set by the state constitution. The constitution determines when the legislature begins, when bills must be filed and most importantly, it strictly controls how long the session will last.
> Article 4 Section 68Appropriation and revenue bills shall, at regular sessions of the Legislature, have precedence in both houses over all other business, and **no such bills shall be passed during the last five days of the session.**
One of the most important deadlines is set by Section 68, above. Last week, the leadership could see they were not going to make the March 27th deadline to pass bills that would spend your money. So they went to the members of the House and the Senate and told them they needed to extend the session. One thing I’ve learned around here is that the legislature can do anything they want, suspend rules, make new rules or ignore rules with a simple majority vote to do so. The constitution and the rules really do not apply.So a resolution was presented to the House and the Senate to suspend the rules and extend the session until April 4, (on paper only because we actually ended the session today, April 1) instead of the constitutional date of April 2.That is why I am sitting here on March 31, and waiting as they scramble to get an agreement on this one last bill.But wait, the dysfunction isn’t over. We missed the new March 31 deadline. So at 12:01 am on April 1 we gaveled in a new legislative day. We did all the required items, we were led in prayer, said the pledge, and voted present for the new day.But what about the deadline? We are now less than 5 days until the end of the new extended end of the session. So what do we do? Well, now I’m told that this bill doesn’t directly appropriate money from the state treasury, it just “transfers” money from one place to another so it can be passed and we don’t have to abide by the deadline. Only a politician could come up with this foolishness.The point of relating all of this fiasco to you is to show just how dysfunctional the Mississippi legislature has become. How can a legislature controlled by people of the same party be completely unable to come to any agreement on spending your money? Are they arguing over differences in ideology? Are they so far apart in their desire of how to spend your money that they just can’t agree?Or is it, as one senior legislator put it, they are simply arguing over control and personality?Whatever the problem, I can tell you one thing for sure. This is not how your legislature is supposed to operate.
### It’s now 4:00 pm April 1
I’m completing this at 4:00 pm on April 1. I’ve left the Capitol and I’m home reflecting on the events of the last couple of days. The hold up last night and the reason for all the delay and fighting was disagreements over the “member projects” bill, House Bill 603.The last bill voted on in the 2023 legislative session contained $700 million dollars of special projects requested by legislators.This money is what the leadership uses to keep legislators in line during the session. If a legislator votes how they are told during the session, then they get to take home some cash for unneeded roads, ballparks, running trails and any number of projects.If your legislator brags about how much of this money they have brought home, you need to know that during the session they have sold their vote (your vote) for this cash.The Mississippi legislature is broken, it works against the people of this state and until the citizens make some major changes, Mississippi will always be last economically, last educationally, and first in corruption.
---
|
---

* * *
**2023's Biggest, Most Unusual Race Centers on Abortion and Democracy**
_"The election for a swing seat on Wisconsin's Supreme Court... will determine the fate of abortion rights, gerrymandered legislative maps ... and perhaps even influence the state's 2024 presidential election."
\-- New York Times_
* * *
Experts are calling the Wisconsin Supreme Court election the most high-stakes race so far of 2023. **Democracy is on the line and we can not afford to ignore this race.**
**The outcomes of this race could determine:**
➡️ Whether Wisconsin conservatives will be allowed to enforce an abortion ban,
➡️ Whether the court will uphold maps that are so gerrymandered,
➡️ And, crucially, whether conservative lawmakers can ignore the will of Wisconsin voters by overturning the state’s 2024 presidential election results.
You can take action today and get involved ahead of Tuesday's election.

name: James Carville
subject: re: assault weapons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
It's Carville, friend – did you get our message?
With 130 mass shootings already this year alone, President Biden has once again called on Congress to pass a bill banning assault weapons.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Steel is forged in fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
**Derek, steel is forged in fire.**
It’s true in PA mills & factories, and it’s also true for Team Fetterman. As John knows better than most, making it through adversity can build an ability to withstand anything. He’s made remarkable progress in his mental health journey and come back from incredible challenges, all while we’ve faced vicious attacks from the worst of the worst.
That’s why we decided to commemorate John’s strength, and the strength of the Fetterman team, with new merch. **[You can shop the official Fetterman online store for Steel is Forged in Fire merch now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49681?t=1&akid=8316%2E434096%2E5mSFpi)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49681?t=2&akid=8316%2E434096%2E5mSFpi)
**[VIST THE STORE »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49681?t=3&akid=8316%2E434096%2E5mSFpi)**
_Every purchase directly supports John’s work to fight for working families in the Senate and defend our Democratic majority._
Thanks team!
JohnFetterman.com 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230401-8316-footer&t=4&refcode2=8316_434096_5mSFpi&akid=8316%2E434096%2E5mSFpi)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Trump supporters enraged
| | | | |

Not because of how much we detest the living embodiment of the seven deadly sins (+ others he's invented). Yet, because, with his assault on our democratic government and rule of law, it proves our justice system still can work. For everyone. Even a former "President."** [**_So, will you join us in splitting a donation of $2, $5, $25 or whatever you can RIGHT NOW to Joe Biden's reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action, to end the authoritarian menace at the polls in 2024?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff24fc71-4b63-45a3-81f1-b4c966931f01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: So many Republican MVPs have tried to reach you [WATCH VIDEO NOW]

body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508848:656qu_GyN:m:1:3391001263:7DF732EF7E674FC5C96859DC2161BD81:r)

[OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM THE NRSC AND KARL ROVE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508848:656qu_GyN:m:1:3391001263:7DF732EF7E674FC5C96859DC2161BD81:r)

_**************[**VIEW NOW >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508848:656qu_GyN:m:1:3391001263:7DF732EF7E674FC5C96859DC2161BD81:r)**************_

Peter,

We hate to be **critical,** but this is too important.

Multiple influential Republicans have reached out because they know how important you are to our Party and mission to flip the Senate, but they haven't heard back.

NOW, Republican legend Karl Rove went one step further: _**he made this special message about WINNING back the Majority and wants YOU to see it. **_
**************[**< < WATCH NOW >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508848:656qu_GyN:m:1:3391001263:7DF732EF7E674FC5C96859DC2161BD81:r)**************
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508848:656qu_GyN:m:1:3391001263:7DF732EF7E674FC5C96859DC2161BD81:r)
Our records indicate you haven't opened our message. We know things come up, but the fate of our country is at stake in 2024. That's why we NEED dedicated Republicans like you engaged.

**[Please view Karl Rove's message about Senate Republicans flipping the Senate RIGHT NOW. >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508848:656qu_GyN:m:1:3391001263:7DF732EF7E674FC5C96859DC2161BD81:r)**
**
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508848:656qu_GyN:m:1:3391001263:7DF732EF7E674FC5C96859DC2161BD81:r)
Democrats want Republicans to believe we have no chance to win. That's why you HAVE to watch Karl Rove's message about the 2024 election. You are the key to our success, and the Democrats know it.

_Can we count on you to put Republicans back in the majority? _

**[Watch Karl Rove's 2024 election RIGHT NOW to help Republicans FLIP the Senate and cement a HISTORIC majority.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508848:656qu_GyN:m:1:3391001263:7DF732EF7E674FC5C96859DC2161BD81:r)

Thank you,

Senate GOP

**

name: Adam Frisch
subject: may I say thank you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
There’s something that politicians don’t say enough: Thank you. Yesterday, we were facing our first FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign – and I’m happy to report that not only did we hit our goal, we crushed it. That’s because of people like you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61133718/399217915/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzExYjYyZi1iZmQwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHRGvsmAeH39_jB0pAwkQSXCKSBs65l_1f8b9JfMDCE=&emci=ea3d57f5-bdd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1711b62f-bfd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61133719/399217916/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzExYjYyZi1iZmQwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHRGvsmAeH39_jB0pAwkQSXCKSBs65l_1f8b9JfMDCE=&emci=ea3d57f5-bdd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1711b62f-bfd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
There’s something that politicians don’t say enough: Thank you.
Yesterday, we were facing our first FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign – and I’m happy to report that not only did we hit our goal, we _crushed_ it. That’s because of people like you.
These FEC reports are important because our fundraising numbers are now going to become public – both ours and Lauren Boebert’s.
Reporters are going to go through each line of our FEC report. People at Democratic national headquarters and Republican national headquarters will look to see how much support we have. Political pundits will go on cable news and talk about who raised more. And the Super PACs will be watching, like sharks in the water.
We’re going to have a strong report – a very strong report – and we never could have done it without you. **So thank you.**
I’ve already been out on the road again, driving across the district in our red pickup truck – with our 17-year-old son Felix, once his homework is finished.
Last year, we clocked 24,000 miles going from town to town – meeting farmers, ranchers, small business owners, and everyday people who are just sick and tired of Lauren Boebert’s circus.
Even a third of Republican voters I meet are ready to throw their support behind our campaign. They want a representative who is going to put Colorado water, Colorado energy, and Colorado jobs first – not herself and her corporate PAC donors.
The odometer on our truck is already ticking up, and every time we fill up, I’m reminded that it’s people like you who fuel this campaign. Literally.
I’m ready to out-work Lauren Boebert. With your continued help, we can out-raise her. And next November, when we finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress, it’ll be because of people like you.
Thank you, from the bottom of my heart.
With gratitude -
Adam

| **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61133720/399217917/1610638071?refcode=em20230401pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=1711b62f-bfd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzExYjYyZi1iZmQwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHRGvsmAeH39_jB0pAwkQSXCKSBs65l_1f8b9JfMDCE=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: fighting for freedom (3 min read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Here's what House Republicans are up to >> | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. We just wrapped up a busy week in Washington and I wanted to give you a quick update on what I've been working on.

Last week on Capitol Hill, I was focused on rolling back Biden regulations and unleashing American energy, protecting parents' rights, holding liberal politicians accountable for their soft-on-crime policies, and demanding answers on why the Biden administration is forcing their progressive ideology on our military.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your continued trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICANS ARE PUSHING BACK ON TRUMP INDICTMENT**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9d82338eb2&e=1050d051da)
---
| On Thursday night, President Trump was indicted by liberal Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg. Democrats have continuously weaponized the federal government to target Americans based on their political beliefs.

**First, it was concerned parents at school board meetings, then practicing Catholics, and now President Trump.**

House Republicans are pushing back on this politically motivated indictment. We have already requested documents and communications from Alvin Bragg to uncover the truth for the American people. [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=30159e764f&e=1050d051da)

---
|
---
| **AMERICANS DESERVE ANSWERS ON BIDEN FAMILY PAYMENTS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a5b201e5f7&e=1050d051da)
---
| [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8d302e6d72&e=1050d051da)
---
| After a ton of stonewalling by the Biden administration, the Oversight Committee finally received the Biden family bank records we subpoenaed from the Treasury.

**What we found is deeply concerning. The Biden family received over $1,000,000 in payments linked to Chinese companies—some transactions even occurring while Biden was VP.**

Communist China is the biggest threat to America's national security. The American people deserve to know what the Biden family was doing in return for that money. I joined Fox Business to talk about the Oversight Committee's investigation into the Biden family's business schemes. [**Watch the interview here. **](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=40385a80fd&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **UNLEASHING AMERICAN ENERGY**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c5a9bf56cf&e=1050d051da)
---
| [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE FULL SPEECH**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=04fa5c33b4&e=1050d051da)
---
| This week, House Republicans delivered on our promise to unleash American energy dominance.**Since day one in the oval office, President Biden has done everything in his power to destroy the American energy industry.** He canceled the Keystone Pipeline XL project, banned new leasing on government land, and sold off our emergency energy supply.

As Joe Biden and AOC cozied up with climate activists in Washington, families and businesses across the country were left to foot the bill—paying the **HIGHEST GAS AND UTILITY PRICES** in our country's history.

I proudly supported the **Lower Energy Costs Act** to roll back burdensome Biden regulations, maximize American energy production, and lower costs for Americans. I spoke on the House Floor about the importance of this bill. [**Watch my speech here. **](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=70106abe01&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOLDING DEMOCRATS ACCOUNTABLE FOR SOFT-ON-CRIME POLICIES**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=07ef3e2805&e=1050d051da)
---
| AOC, Hakeem Jeffries, and House Democrats are even **MORE EXTREME** than Joe Biden. Last month, **173 Democrats** voted against a bill to strengthen penalties for violent crime—including carjackings and robberies.
**This week I slammed far-left liberals for their soft-on-crime policies that have caused rampant crime in cities across America. **
I told Democrats that they need to stop trying to defund our law enforcement officers and instead ensure our brave men and women in blue have the resources they need to keep our communities safe. **I WILL ALWAYS BACK THE BLUE.** [**Read more here.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6b655fd228&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
|
---
| **FIGHTING TO END BIDEN'S WOKE MILITARY AGENDA**
---
|
---
| Joe Biden and liberal bureaucrats at the Department of Defense are forcing their progressive agenda on our brave men and women who serve our nation. They have repeatedly prioritized woke issues such as race, gender, and sexual preference, over America's military's readiness.

_**_The result? America's military has missed recruiting goals and strayed from its primary mission of protecting American interests at home and abroad._**_

During an Oversight Committee hearing this week, I demanded that we remove this harmful ideology from our armed forces and slammed the Biden administration for prioritizing their woke agenda over America's national security.
---
|
---
| **PROTECTING PARENTS' RIGHTS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=cc605ecdd3&e=1050d051da)
---
| [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=677e57e014&e=1050d051da)
---
| As a father of four young kids, I know how important it is that parents, **NOT POLITICANS** , are in control of their children's education.

In 2021, Merrick Garland issued a memo calling concerned parents at school board meetings "domestic terrorists." **This is completely outrageous.** That's just one example of how the Biden administration has used the DOJ and FBI to target Americans.

Last week, **I voted to pass the Parents Bill of Rights** —a commonsense bill that ensures parents always have a seat at the table when it comes to their children's education. I joined Mornings with Maria on Fox to talk about this crucial legislation. [**Watch the interview here. **](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=389c7f8ae6&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Stop Democrats from forcing their woke climate agenda into retirement funds
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Create a subcommittee on the weaponization of government
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=de27a5ebba&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")

We just wrapped up a busy week in Washington and I wanted to give you a quick update on what I've been working on. Last week on Capitol Hill, I was focused on rolling back Biden regulations and unleashing American energy, protecting parents' rights, holding liberal politicians accountable for their soft-on-crime policies, and demanding answers on why the Biden administration is forcing their progressive ideology on our military. Thanks to all your help, we are FINALLY getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your continued trust and support. Yours in the fight, Jake | | HOUSE REPUBLICANS ARE PUSHING BACK ON TRUMP INDICTMENT | | On Thursday night, President Trump was indicted by liberal Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg. Democrats have continuously weaponized the federal government to target Americans based on their political beliefs. First, it was concerned parents at school board meetings, then practicing Catholics, and now President Trump. House Republicans are pushing back on this politically motivated indictment. We have already requested documents and communications from Alvin Bragg to uncover the truth for the American people. | | AMERICANS DESERVE ANSWERS ON BIDEN FAMILY PAYMENTS | | | After a ton of stonewalling by the Biden administration, the Oversight Committee finally received the Biden family bank records we subpoenaed from the Treasury. What we found is deeply concerning. The Biden family received over $1,000,000 in payments linked to Chinese companies—some transactions even occurring while Biden was VP. Communist China is the biggest threat to America's national security. The American people deserve to know what the Biden family was doing in return for that money. I joined Fox Business to talk about the Oversight Committee's investigation into the Biden family's business schemes. | | UNLEASHING AMERICAN ENERGY | | | This week, House Republicans delivered on our promise to unleash American energy dominance.Since day one in the oval office, President Biden has done everything in his power to destroy the American energy industry. He canceled the Keystone Pipeline XL project, banned new leasing on government land, and sold off our emergency energy supply. As Joe Biden and AOC cozied up with climate activists in Washington, families and businesses across the country were left to foot the bill—paying the HIGHEST GAS AND UTILITY PRICES in our country's history. I proudly supported the Lower Energy Costs Act to roll back burdensome Biden regulations, maximize American energy production, and lower costs for Americans. I spoke on the House Floor about the importance of this bill. | | HOLDING DEMOCRATS ACCOUNTABLE FOR SOFT-ON-CRIME POLICIES | | AOC, Hakeem Jeffries, and House Democrats are even MORE EXTREME than Joe Biden. Last month, 173 Democrats voted against a bill to strengthen penalties for violent crime—including carjackings and robberies. This week I slammed far-left liberals for their soft-on-crime policies that have caused rampant crime in cities across America. I told Democrats that they need to stop trying to defund our law enforcement officers and instead ensure our brave men and women in blue have the resources they need to keep our communities safe. I WILL ALWAYS BACK THE BLUE. | | | FIGHTING TO END BIDEN'S WOKE MILITARY AGENDA | | Joe Biden and liberal bureaucrats at the Department of Defense are forcing their progressive agenda on our brave men and women who serve our nation. They have repeatedly prioritized woke issues such as race, gender, and sexual preference, over America's military's readiness. The result? America's military has missed recruiting goals and strayed from its primary mission of protecting American interests at home and abroad. During an Oversight Committee hearing this week, I demanded that we remove this harmful ideology from our armed forces and slammed the Biden administration for prioritizing their woke agenda over America's national security. | | PROTECTING PARENTS' RIGHTS | | | As a father of four young kids, I know how important it is that parents, NOT POLITICANS , are in control of their children's education. In 2021, Merrick Garland issued a memo calling concerned parents at school board meetings "domestic terrorists." This is completely outrageous. That's just one example of how the Biden administration has used the DOJ and FBI to target Americans. Last week, I voted to pass the Parents Bill of Rights —a commonsense bill that ensures parents always have a seat at the table when it comes to their children's education. I joined Mornings with Maria on Fox to talk about this crucial legislation. | | HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE | I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that REVERSES Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts AMERICA FIRST : ✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army ✅ Protect parents' rights ✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech ✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak ✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending ✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes ✅ Stop Democrats from forcing their woke climate agenda into retirement funds ✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable ✅ Create a subcommittee on the weaponization of government ✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda ✅ Unleash domestic energy production ✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency | "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY" | | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Kansans for LaTurner, All rights reserved. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I announced that I’m officially running for re-election. Here’s why.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=115%2E35263%2Ecqpy0Q ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter,

I just officially announced that [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-warren.0Hh7zQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230401_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=115%2E35263%2Ecqpy0Q ]I’m running for re-election in 2024. I
never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. Senator. But my life has
had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's.

I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart
attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother
got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family.

I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at
a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of
becoming a public school teacher.

I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to
rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I
fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect
people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. The CFPB has
already returned about $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been
cheated.

After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the
CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against
one of them — and I beat him. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest
in jobs and our infrastructure, and to rein in student loan companies. And
guess what? We got it all done.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-warren.0Hh7zQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230401_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=115%2E35263%2Ecqpy0Q ]But the fight to make our government work for everyone — not just the
wealthy and well-connected — isn’t over. So I’m running for re-election to
keep up the fight. Will you split a donation between Tammy Baldwin and my
re-election today so I can keep fighting for working families alongside
her?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-warren.f_21Ao&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230401_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=115%2E35263%2Ecqpy0Q ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-warren.s1zbrW&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230401_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=115%2E35263%2Ecqpy0Q ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-warren.0AgjK_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230401_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=115%2E35263%2Ecqpy0Q ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-warren.yQVcyp&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230401_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=115%2E35263%2Ecqpy0Q ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-warren.ollNNi&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230401_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=115%2E35263%2Ecqpy0Q ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

My supporters like YOU are my motivation to keep fighting the false attacks to destroy our movement.

George Soros, Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Crooked Hillary are hoping that this will finally be the _“end of Trump.”_
But these left-wing radicals will never understand that this movement is much bigger than _me_.
Our movement is about giving a voice to the millions of Americans who feel betrayed by the Washington ruling class – and who feel that America has become a rigged system that benefits political insiders at the expense of the rest of us.
**They can try to stop me all they want with threats, indictments, and even arrests, but they can NEVER crush the spirits of 74 million patriots who want to _make our country great again!_**
_NOTHING can stand in the way of a patriot’s desire to be free._

You are the source of my courage, my hope, and my resolution. You are the reason I will never give up our mission to save America. That’s why I decided it would be right to deliver my FIRST recorded statement to YOU – NOT the Fake News. | George Soros, Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Crooked Hillary are hoping that this will finally be the “end of Trump.” But these left-wing radicals will never understand that this movement is much bigger than me. Our movement is about giving a voice to the millions of Americans who feel betrayed by the Washington ruling class – and who feel that America has become a rigged system that benefits political insiders at the expense of the rest of us. They can try to stop me all they want with threats, indictments, and even arrests, but they can NEVER crush the spirits of 74 million patriots who want to make our country great again! NOTHING can stand in the way of a patriot’s desire to be free. As always, if you and your family are getting crushed by the Left’s rigged economic policies, just ignore what I’m about to ask... ...But if you can chip in, our movement can certainly use your support right now. body:
here's why we need to care about the Supreme Court election

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61135371/399222301/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjdhNmM2MC1jN2QwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7vvbsdJnwSJepfYaujYtiG0Wi99urYLy8n4uq_ROgA=&emci=301d9118-c7cf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8f7a6c60-c7d0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, it's Team Janet for Justice – the folks working on behalf of Judge Janet Protasiewicz to elect her to the ten-year swing seat on Wisconsin's Supreme Court. **With just a few days left before Tuesday's election, we're writing to ask you to support Judge Janet and defend Wisconsin's democracy.** **The stakes are clear: everything from abortion access to fair maps to voting rights will come before Wisconsin's Supreme Court, and we need a pro-democracy voice to defend our values.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re still counting all the numbers, but it’s safe to say we beat our end-of-quarter goal.
#
Hi Peter — I know it’s Saturday, but I wanted to reach out with a quick update.
**We’re still counting all the numbers, but it’s safe to say we beat our EOQ goal.** My team and I will share more about that soon... but for now, I wanted to reach out to say thank you.
Your support since I launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley — whether you chipped in or just spread the word — is helping us build the foundation for a powerful grassroots movement. And that’s the surest way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat and take back power for everyday Missourians next year.
**But we still have lots of work ahead of us.** From hiring staff to opening offices to getting our message in front of voters across the state, your support is what will make all that possible for our campaign — and I am just so grateful for it.
Thank you again for helping us make this a record-breaking first quarter, Peter. I’m so glad to have you on this team and can’t wait to see what we’ll get up to this year.
Now, let’s keep moving and flip this seat,
— Lucas Kunce
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30680?refcode=em20230401-2947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2947%2E614464%2Ei_uxkg)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230401-2947-footer&t=2&refcode2=2947_614464_i_uxkg&akid=2947%2E614464%2Ei_uxkg)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2947%2E614464%2Ei_uxkg). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

body:

From Big Oil raking in jaw-dropping profits by raising gas prices, to Big Pharma’s price gouging, Katie can see through their B.S. and will always stand up to the status quo and corporate special interests.

name: Robert Duran IV
subject: ICYMI: Introducing Dr. Kelli Ward as Arizona Chairwoman of Rethink! GOP
body:
Huge announcement...
| | |
---
|
---
| Introducing Dr. Kelli Ward as Arizona Chairwoman of Rethink! GOP
---
| Friend,
I am excited to announce that Dr. Kelli Ward, an accomplished American osteopathic physician and politician, has joined Rethink! GOP as our Chairwoman for Arizona. With Dr. Ward's leadership, we will continue to provide innovative get -out - the - vote solutions that make it easier for people to cast their ballots, and help to ensure that all votes are counted fairly.
At Rethink! GOP, we believe that maximizing voter turnout among Republican supporters is crucial to winning future elections. Our methods can help to increase voter participation, especially among groups that may have difficulty getting to the polls on Election Day. With our solutions, you can be sure that your vote will count!
Dr. Kelli Ward is no stranger to politics. She served as the chair of the Arizona Republican Party from 2019 to 2023, and prior to that, she served in the Arizona State Senate from 2013 to 2015. She won the District 5 seat in the highly contested 2012 Republican primary with 42.2% of the vote and later won the general election with 71.2% of the vote.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Trump appointed Judge, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, will almost certainly overturn FDA approval for the extremely safe & popular medication abortion pill, Mifepristone. And while Sen. Josh Hawley’s wife, Erin Morrow Hawley, is leading the court efforts to end abortion pill access, Kacsmaryk just donated to Hawley’s Senate campaign.
body:
The fightback starts now
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c8bae6c-d623-44e4-8ac7-59beb5057350/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_We thought we'd heard the worst about Trump appointed Judge, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, who'll almost definitively overturn the FDA approved, extremely safe/popular abortion pill, Mifepristone. But it's so much worse than we thought._** **It turns out Kacsmaryk doesn't even care to hide he's a right-wing advocate, even as a "judge." Erin Morrow Hawley'****_s one of the lawyers leading the charge vs. the FDA to have the abortion pill banned._ If the name sounds familiar, it's because _her husband is repulsive, seditionist Senator Josh Hawley._** **_You know whose campaign this "judge" just donated to? Josh Hawley, of course(!), the husband of a lawyer appearing before him in court._** **_We can't allow this extremist to hijack women's rights. We maybe can't stop his decision, but we sure as hell can have it overturned on appeal._** **_[_So,_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba3ab06a-77c3-408c-b6a3-11d2d55ebf9d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_[_ w_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4136c32-5a28-43dc-9883-8a7223eaeca0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[** _ill you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Center for Reproductive Rights' Abortion Defense Network to fight this attack on our basic rights?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1065cefc-5565-4017-b31e-30888cd3908d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| _Kacsmaryk even has a bizarre obsession with the sexuality of others, referring to gay Americans as "disordered" and saying the "Sexual Revolution" was about how "...marriage, sexuality, gender identity, and even the unborn child must yield to the erotic desires of liberated adults." Get the man in therapy, and away from women's bodies._ **_We can't allow this extremist to hijack women's rights, but we sure as hell can work to have it overturned on appeal.[_So,_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf674b899-734e-45ec-b9e3-d5001b97bcff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_[_ w_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c4e08ea-64c9-4fb4-9362-dd914c4054c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[** _ill you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Center for Reproductive Rights' Abortion Defense Network to fight this attack on our basic rights?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd64b21c-9d0b-4f73-8563-6c0440732fc8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for never giving in to extremists who think they get to substitute their warped judgment for that of well-adjusted human beings._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53dbdc04-3676-4eb0-9a58-544e352ecf9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

Friend,
Patriots all across America rushed to our defense after news broke that I was INDICTED in an act of blatant Election Interference.
But there’s one number that really stood out to me...
_**...Over 25% of our campaign’s donations were made by FIRST-TIME donors.**_

clean_body: This one number says it all. | | | Friend, Patriots all across America rushed to our defense after news broke that I was INDICTED in an act of blatant Election Interference. But there’s one number that really stood out to me... ...Over 25% of our campaign’s donations were made by FIRST-TIME donors. That tells you how shocking this politically motivated indictment was to our nation. Americans watched as the ruling political party INDICTED its leading opponent heading straight into a presidential election – despite committing NO CRIME. After YEARS of opportunities to donate to our campaign, these patriots saw that THIS WAS THE DECISIVE MOMENT to take action. A line was crossed on March 30, 2023. Our Republic was no longer the same – and Americans saw supporting our campaign as vital to saving our nation. Now, I’m asking YOU to peacefully show our enemies that we will not let our Great Republic become a Marxist Third-World Nation that criminalizes dissent and imprisons its opposition. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
