name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Demand humane treatment for animals on organic farms
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702402?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the USDA to hold Big Ag accountable for disregarding animal welfare, misleading consumers, and attacking organic farming!** When organic shoppers look for the organic label, they are trusting that the USDA has taken necessary steps to ensure the products are sourced from sustainable farms that _**treat animals humanely.**_ But unlike _**most**_ organic farmers who already meet the high-quality standards that consumers put their faith in, Big Ag has been fighting against a USDA rule that would close an important loophole -- even pushing the _Trump administration to overturn this critical animal welfare rule in 2017._ It’s imperative that we keep the organic label strong to provide a necessary alternative to factory farms that **deprive** helpless animals of outdoor access to fresh air, **cramming** them into tight spaces without enough room to move around, and _**even sometimes performing cruel and unnecessary physical alterations!**_ **_Friend, don’t you think it’s time that the USDA does the right thing and holds Big Ag accountable for attempting to weaken the organic standard? _[Demand urgent action from the USDA now! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702403?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702404?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_We need you to stand up for organic farmers and animals, Friend._ Even though Trump reversed the rule in 2017, we are so close to the USDA implementing the **Organic Livestock and Poultry Standards rule (OLPS).** The rule would ensure the _humane treatment of animals_ on organic farms and give _consumers the peace of mind_ that they deserve.
_**And right now, we’ve got a critical opportunity to get this critical rule reinstated.**_
Organic farmers, consumers, and animal activists overwhelmingly support the OLPS -- yet of course, major meat and dairy corporations don’t want stricter guidelines that will make it harder to compete against _true_ organic farmers for profits.
Even pesticides companies like Bayer have spent MILLIONS of dollars **attacking the organic industry** and covering up the**dangers of their toxic products.****_But environmentalists like you know the truth, Friend \-- that real organic farming is a sustainable climate solution that MUST be protected from Big Ag’s lies. _[Add your name right now to tell the USDA to protect organic animals, consumers, and the environment by enacting the OLPS rule immediately! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702405?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702404?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for being a true climate champion,
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:
desperate

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=0930da72cef7470e989cd43dc43495ca&_e=cADCvU4tIPO_yZ4N1OTj9cBLaGPm_j995LP1MX62hNVimUpN_GQS1KKjveMVaqo9c8zfdXDjfwgBXN9VbZb2HdamoOhVw5kB58vSwuWUoJWUyBk8kwf3XQRO6zNsRyHL6duA7_nIrOIcQr7bu-2-qR_0qHwVXiUqrZfUKNGaMj192SsV1b04k1ATo2MUWsX2EXJy0Si70C9qMbciifcq8761sQlgqEAO_6gGD1gOQMmbRnaUZX2u-yYetogN8u4c-mTNKvSRxs0MvkS1ajanHK_vb83RWdxHIjUykB6g8oCTqpGsYYXw16BS4iR3Ue_6vseFWKmKB84riJVUdejgyudRhZUPVkAqYARQULX52n_2CO0PETjtRewYyq12yEJ4zIy_q91KgeinMnA5NVLgQwG7xmqiiDld7dQlWuC4BHsuM4MTaEIAdNvtj5a5OYn73KSQpPKMF2P10ua-SauC8JspKvHx76JosBwGj40MSPwG1qPu7AIn4SFWnWcU_Pi5zOl7_Ijy3TR5wPK7fQmKAf05gkvEkHibtZXnQpcPWHwX_irX2HINI2x1uMBK7xVyfjGDBqXpWoXN6FJxoqZnQA%3D%3D)
---
My friend,

We just passed my End-of-Quarter deadline, and I have some bad news.....we came up **_$3,579_** short of our fundraising goal.

Our fight to **[Take Back the White House in 2024](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=0930da72cef7470e989cd43dc43495ca&_e=cADCvU4tIPO_yZ4N1OTj9cBLaGPm_j995LP1MX62hNVimUpN_GQS1KKjveMVaqo9c8zfdXDjfwgBXN9VbZb2HdamoOhVw5kB58vSwuWUoJWUyBk8kwf3XQRO6zNsRyHL6duA7_nIrOIcQr7bu-2-qR_0qHwVXiUqrZfUKNGaMj192SsV1b04k1ATo2MUWsX2EXJy0Si70C9qMbciifcq8761sQlgqEAO_6gGD1gOQMmbRnaUZX2u-yYetogN8u4c-mTNKvSRxs0MvkS1ajanHK_vb83RWdxHIjUykB6g8oCTqpGsYYXw16BS4iR3Ue_6vseFWKmKB84riJVUdejgyudRhZUPVkAqYARQULX52n_2CO0PETjtRewYyq12yEJ4zIy_q91KgeinMnA5NVLgQwG7xmqiiDld7dQlWuC4BHsuM4MTaEIAdNvtj5a5OYn7dDcyXS55DIv10l0iFz7r67_lHoCuaX5LuhRM1MPyH0bgEPkLCJZbtmvmu7Ho4SqrxvXPsHNGM72X5qQu4fQ9Y_-Wuzq99rNL39g-JB3dIXgKt3RJtTRAWnE5N7prVslQ2LWVww6i9y-0LDTnKg0WKA%3D%3D)** will not be triumphant unless we have the help of loyal patriots like YOU.

I know we can make up this deficit and FIGHT BACK against the Liberal fundraising machines, and you know why?

**[Because I have supporters like you on my team, our grassroots campaign is a movement that HAS and will CONTINUE to shock the nation.](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=0930da72cef7470e989cd43dc43495ca&_e=cADCvU4tIPO_yZ4N1OTj9cBLaGPm_j995LP1MX62hNVimUpN_GQS1KKjveMVaqo9c8zfdXDjfwgBXN9VbZb2HdamoOhVw5kB58vSwuWUoJWUyBk8kwf3XQRO6zNsRyHL6duA7_nIrOIcQr7bu-2-qR_0qHwVXiUqrZfUKNGaMj192SsV1b04k1ATo2MUWsX2EXJy0Si70C9qMbciifcq8761sQlgqEAO_6gGD1gOQMmbRnaUZX2u-yYetogN8u4c-mTNKvSRxs0MvkS1ajanHK_vb83RWdxHIjUykB6g8oCTqpGsYYXw16BS4iR3Ue_6vseFWKmKB84riJVUdejgyudRhZUPVkAqYARQULX52n_2CO0PETjtRewYyq12yEJ4zIy_q91KgeinMnA5NVLgQwG7xmqiiDld7dQlWuC4BHsuM4MTaEIAdNvtj5a5OYn7Rt3MZTEVVifg5vKHd39ywl4cIW-K8F7ytL7SB5fk8ZvWwhTzZhMLyogPOdOoudBMjo34CyE0_db6SvPqkvooFhp75oaOTHCCuB_7hdKhHQGmPL8vgjcJM4Pjj0Ko9dcMc44pyu744fpofvCZBSheEw%3D%3D)

| George Santos’ list of lies is growing EVERY DAY – so when we reached out to top Democrats to sign our letter demanding his resignation, we thought signatures would POUR IN. **__Butwe couldn’t have been more wrong.__** We’re sending our letter to Santos tomorrow morning at 9am sharp, and we need a SURGE of signatures before we do!

_If we don’t, Santos will think nobody cares about his lies and he’ll get away scot-free!_ [We’re asking one last time: Chip in $3 to add your name to our letter demanding George Santos resigns from Congress »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42701?t=6&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS) | [**DONATE $3 AND ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42701?t=7&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42702?t=8&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS)
* * *
**TO: Rep. George Santos**
**FROM: Add your name**
Dear Rep. George Santos,

I’m SICK and TIRED of your misinformation, lies, and constant scandals.

American working families need REAL support, but you’re too busy playing politics and covering up your potential crimes!!

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42701?t=9&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS)
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42701?t=10&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS)
---
We deserve genuine, honest Representatives that care about healthcare, voting rights, LGBTQ rights, accountability in our Democracy...

NOT an ultra MAGA fan who lied about his entire identity while running for office!!

[That’s why I’m signing this letter calling on you to RESIGN immediately and pitching in $3 to Voter Protection Project to ensure far-right Republicans like you never hold office again »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42701?t=11&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS)

With conviction,

_**_X Add your name_**_
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42701?t=12&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS)
---
***SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION***
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6857%2E878179%2EfFlvXS) to request fewer emails. I've got something you're gonna like:

It's a new optic that turns hobby shooters into grizzled sniper school veterans... with no additional training.

It harnesses the technology used by the US military to make sure our boys have the upper hand.

We're calling it the [**Hawkeye Upgraded Precision Scope.**](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/12049/6374453/15232c4e366117d68603993e37e0f901995fa6aa/71cbdaa1e0e783ed4ed2e41dab15075dd7466e00)

In our field testing, it whooped up on competition. Everyone shot tighter groups, and way faster.

But the group that benefitted the most was shooters wearing corrective lenses...They got on target 3X faster and shot 2X tighter groups!
